authors_text: Chen Min,Xinli Xu,Dawei Zhao,Liang Xiao,Yiming Nie,Bin Dai
title: Occupancy-MAE: Self-supervised Pre-training Large-scale LiDAR Point Clouds with Masked Occupancy Autoencoders
title_zh: Occupancy-MAE：使用掩模占用自动编码器进行自监督预训练大规模 LiDAR 点云
comment: Accepted by TIV
comments: Accepted by TIV
abstract: Current perception models in autonomous driving heavily rely on large-scale labelled 3D data, which is both costly and time-consuming to annotate. This work proposes a solution to reduce the dependence on labelled 3D training data by leveraging pre-training on large-scale unlabeled outdoor LiDAR point clouds using masked autoencoders (MAE). While existing masked point autoencoding methods mainly focus on small-scale indoor point clouds or pillar-based large-scale outdoor LiDAR data, our approach introduces a new self-supervised masked occupancy pre-training method called Occupancy-MAE, specifically designed for voxel-based large-scale outdoor LiDAR point clouds. Occupancy-MAE takes advantage of the gradually sparse voxel occupancy structure of outdoor LiDAR point clouds and incorporates a range-aware random masking strategy and a pretext task of occupancy prediction. By randomly masking voxels based on their distance to the LiDAR and predicting the masked occupancy structure of the entire 3D surrounding scene, Occupancy-MAE encourages the extraction of high-level semantic information to reconstruct the masked voxel using only a small number of visible voxels. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of Occupancy-MAE across several downstream tasks. For 3D object detection, Occupancy-MAE reduces the labelled data required for car detection on the KITTI dataset by half and improves small object detection by approximately 2% in AP on the Waymo dataset. For 3D semantic segmentation, Occupancy-MAE outperforms training from scratch by around 2% in mIoU. For multi-object tracking, Occupancy-MAE enhances training from scratch by approximately 1% in terms of AMOTA and AMOTP. Codes are publicly available at https://github.com/chaytonmin/Occupancy-MAE.

abstract_zh: 当前自动驾驶中的感知模型严重依赖于大规模标记的 3D 数据，而这些数据的注释既昂贵又耗时。这项工作提出了一种解决方案，通过使用掩模自动编码器 (MAE) 对大规模未标记室外 LiDAR 点云进行预训练，减少对标记 3D 训练数据的依赖。虽然现有的掩模点自动编码方法主要关注小规模室内点云或基于柱的大规模室外激光雷达数据，但我们的方法引入了一种新的自监督掩模占用预训练方法，称为 Occupancy-MAE，专门为基于体素的大规模室外激光雷达点云而设计。 Occupancy-MAE 利用室外 LiDAR 点云逐渐稀疏的体素占用结构，并结合了范围感知随机掩蔽策略和占用预测的借口任务。通过根据与 LiDAR 的距离随机屏蔽体素并预测整个 3D 周围场景的屏蔽占用结构，Occupancy-MAE 鼓励提取高级语义信息，从而仅使用少量可见体素来重建屏蔽体素。大量实验证明了 Occupancy-MAE 在多个下游任务中的有效性。对于 3D 物体检测，Occupancy-MAE 将 KITTI 数据集上的汽车检测所需的标记数据减少了一半，并将 Waymo 数据集上的 AP 中的小物体检测提高了约 2%。对于 3D 语义分割，Occupancy-MAE 的 mIoU 优于从头开始的训练约 2%。对于多目标跟踪，Occupancy-MAE 在 AMOTA 和 AMOTP 方面将训练从头开始增强了约 1%。代码可在 https://github.com/chaytonmin/Occupancy-MAE 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Occupancy-MAE的自监督预训练方法，用于处理大规模室外LiDAR点云数据，以减少对标注3D数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶感知模型严重依赖成本高昂且耗时的标注3D数据，而现有方法在处理大规模室外LiDAR点云时效果有限。
AI.method: 通过引入基于体素的掩码占用预训练方法，结合距离感知的随机掩码策略和占用预测任务，利用稀疏体素结构从少量可见体素中重建被掩码区域的语义信息。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上将汽车检测所需标注数据减少50%，在Waymo数据集上小物体检测提升约2% AP；语义分割mIoU提升约2%，多目标跟踪AMOTA/AMOTP提升约1%。
AI.conclusion: Occupancy-MAE有效提升了自动驾驶场景下3D感知任务的性能，为大规模未标注LiDAR数据的利用提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Pablo Bermejo,Roman Orus
title: Variational Quantum and Quantum-Inspired Clustering
title_zh: 变分量子和量子启发的聚类
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, revised version
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, revised version
abstract: Here we present a quantum algorithm for clustering data based on a variational quantum circuit. The algorithm allows to classify data into many clusters, and can easily be implemented in few-qubit Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) devices. The idea of the algorithm relies on reducing the clustering problem to an optimization, and then solving it via a Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) combined with non-orthogonal qubit states. In practice, the method uses maximally-orthogonal states of the target Hilbert space instead of the usual computational basis, allowing for a large number of clusters to be considered even with few qubits. We benchmark the algorithm with numerical simulations using real datasets, showing excellent performance even with one single qubit. Moreover, a tensor network simulation of the algorithm implements, by construction, a quantum-inspired clustering algorithm that can run on current classical hardware.
summary: Here we present a quantum algorithm for clustering data based on a variational quantum circuit. The algorithm allows to classify data into many clusters, and can easily be implemented in few-qubit Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) devices. The idea of the algorithm relies on reducing the clustering problem to an optimization, and then solving it via a Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) combined with non-orthogonal qubit states. In practice, the method uses maximally-orthogonal states of the target Hilbert space instead of the usual computational basis, allowing for a large number of clusters to be considered even with few qubits. We benchmark the algorithm with numerical simulations using real datasets, showing excellent performance even with one single qubit. Moreover, a tensor network simulation of the algorithm implements, by construction, a quantum-inspired clustering algorithm that can run on current classical hardware.
abstract_zh: 在这里，我们提出了一种基于变分量子电路的数据聚类量子算法。该算法允许将数据分类为许多簇，并且可以轻松地在少量子位噪声中尺度量子 (NISQ) 设备中实现。该算法的思想依赖于将聚类问题简化为优化，然后通过变分量子本征求解器（VQE）结合非正交量子位状态来求解。在实践中，该方法使用目标希尔伯特空间的最大正交状态而不是通常的计算基础，即使只有很少的量子位也可以考虑大量的簇。我们使用真实数据集的数值模拟对算法进行基准测试，即使使用单个量子位也显示出出色的性能。此外，该算法的张量网络模拟通过构造实现了可以在当前经典硬件上运行的量子启发的聚类算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于变分量子电路的量子聚类算法，通过变分量子本征求解器（VQE）和非正交量子态实现数据分类，并可在经典硬件上模拟实现。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类算法在处理高维数据时存在局限性，而量子计算有望通过量子态叠加和纠缠特性提升聚类效率，尤其适用于噪声中等规模量子（NISQ）设备。
AI.method: 将聚类问题转化为优化问题，利用VQE结合非正交量子态进行求解，并通过张量网络模拟实现经典硬件上的量子启发式聚类算法。
AI.result: 数值模拟表明，即使使用单个量子比特也能实现优异聚类性能，且经典模拟方法在实际数据集上表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为在NISQ设备上实现高效聚类提供了新思路，同时通过张量网络模拟扩展了经典计算平台的应用潜力。

authors_text: Vasanth Kalingeri
title: Latent Variable Modelling Using Variational Autoencoders: A survey
title_zh: 使用变分自动编码器的潜变量建模：一项调查
abstract: A probability distribution allows practitioners to uncover hidden structure in the data and build models to solve supervised learning problems using limited data. The focus of this report is on Variational autoencoders, a method to learn the probability distribution of large complex datasets. The report provides a theoretical understanding of variational autoencoders and consolidates the current research in the field. The report is divided into multiple chapters, the first chapter introduces the problem, describes variational autoencoders and identifies key research directions in the field. Chapters 2, 3, 4 and 5 dive into the details of each of the key research areas. Chapter 6 concludes the report and suggests directions for future work. A reader who has a basic idea of machine learning but wants to learn about general themes in machine learning research can benefit from the report. The report explains central ideas on learning probability distributions, what people did to make this tractable and goes into details around how deep learning is currently applied. The report also serves a gentle introduction for someone looking to contribute to this sub-field.

abstract_zh: 概率分布允许从业者发现数据中的隐藏结构并构建模型以使用有限的数据解决监督学习问题。本报告的重点是变分自动编码器，这是一种学习大型复杂数据集概率分布的方法。该报告提供了对变分自编码器的理论理解，并巩固了该领域当前的研究。报告分为多个章节，第一章介绍问题，描述变分自编码器并确定该领域的关键研究方向。第 2、3、4 和 5 章深入探讨了每个关键研究领域的细节。第六章总结了报告并提出了未来工作的方向。对机器学习有基本了解但想要了解机器学习研究一般主题的读者可以从该报告中受益。该报告解释了学习概率分布的中心思想，人们做了什么来使其易于处理，并详细介绍了深度学习目前的应用方式。该报告还为那些希望为该子领域做出贡献的人提供了温和的介绍。

search_text: Latent Variable Modelling Using Variational Autoencoders: A survey 使用变分自动编码器的潜变量建模：一项调查 A probability distribution allows practitioners to uncover hidden structure in the data and build models to solve supervised learning problems using limited data. The focus of this report is on Variational autoencoders, a method to learn the probability distribution of large complex datasets. The report provides a theoretical understanding of variational autoencoders and consolidates the current research in the field. The report is divided into multiple chapters, the first chapter introduces the problem, describes variational autoencoders and identifies key research directions in the field. Chapters 2, 3, 4 and 5 dive into the details of each of the key research areas. Chapter 6 concludes the report and suggests directions for future work. A reader who has a basic idea of machine learning but wants to learn about general themes in machine learning research can benefit from the report. The report explains central ideas on learning probability distributions, what people did to make this tractable and goes into details around how deep learning is currently applied. The report also serves a gentle introduction for someone looking to contribute to this sub-field. 概率分布允许从业者发现数据中的隐藏结构并构建模型以使用有限的数据解决监督学习问题。本报告的重点是变分自动编码器，这是一种学习大型复杂数据集概率分布的方法。该报告提供了对变分自编码器的理论理解，并巩固了该领域当前的研究。报告分为多个章节，第一章介绍问题，描述变分自编码器并确定该领域的关键研究方向。第 2、3、4 和 5 章深入探讨了每个关键研究领域的细节。第六章总结了报告并提出了未来工作的方向。对机器学习有基本了解但想要了解机器学习研究一般主题的读者可以从该报告中受益。该报告解释了学习概率分布的中心思想，人们做了什么来使其易于处理，并详细介绍了深度学习目前的应用方式。该报告还为那些希望为该子领域做出贡献的人提供了温和的介绍。 本文主要综述了使用变分自编码器进行潜在变量建模的方法。 Vasanth Kalingeri cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Eugene Vinitsky,Nathan Lichtlé,Xiaomeng Yang,Brandon Amos,Jakob Foerster
title: Nocturne: a scalable driving benchmark for bringing multi-agent learning one step closer to the real world
title_zh: Nocturne：一种可扩展的驾驶基准，使多智能体学习更接近现实世界
abstract: We introduce Nocturne, a new 2D driving simulator for investigating multi-agent coordination under partial observability. The focus of Nocturne is to enable research into inference and theory of mind in real-world multi-agent settings without the computational overhead of computer vision and feature extraction from images. Agents in this simulator only observe an obstructed view of the scene, mimicking human visual sensing constraints. Unlike existing benchmarks that are bottlenecked by rendering human-like observations directly using a camera input, Nocturne uses efficient intersection methods to compute a vectorized set of visible features in a C++ back-end, allowing the simulator to run at over 2000 steps-per-second. Using open-source trajectory and map data, we construct a simulator to load and replay arbitrary trajectories and scenes from real-world driving data. Using this environment, we benchmark reinforcement-learning and imitation-learning agents and demonstrate that the agents are quite far from human-level coordination ability and deviate significantly from the expert trajectories.
summary: We introduce Nocturne, a new 2D driving simulator for investigating multi-agent coordination under partial observability. The focus of Nocturne is to enable research into inference and theory of mind in real-world multi-agent settings without the computational overhead of computer vision and feature extraction from images. Agents in this simulator only observe an obstructed view of the scene, mimicking human visual sensing constraints. Unlike existing benchmarks that are bottlenecked by rendering human-like observations directly using a camera input, Nocturne uses efficient intersection methods to compute a vectorized set of visible features in a C++ back-end, allowing the simulator to run at over 2000 steps-per-second. Using open-source trajectory and map data, we construct a simulator to load and replay arbitrary trajectories and scenes from real-world driving data. Using this environment, we benchmark reinforcement-learning and imitation-learning agents and demonstrate that the agents are quite far from human-level coordination ability and deviate significantly from the expert trajectories.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 Nocturne，一种新的 2D 驾驶模拟器，用于研究部分可观察性下的多智能体协调。 Nocturne 的重点是能够在现实世界的多智能体环境中研究推理和心理理论，而无需计算机视觉和图像特征提取的计算开销。该模拟器中的代理仅观察场景的受遮挡视图，模仿人类视觉传感约束。现有的基准测试因直接使用相机输入渲染类似人类的观察结果而受到瓶颈，与此不同的是，Nocturne 使用高效的交集方法在 C++ 后端计算一组可见特征的矢量化，使模拟器能够以每秒超过 2000 步的速度运行。使用开源轨迹和地图数据，我们构建了一个模拟器来加载和重放现实世界驾驶数据中的任意轨迹和场景。使用这种环境，我们对强化学习和模仿学习代理进行了基准测试，并证明这些代理与人类水平的协调能力相距甚远，并且与专家轨迹存在显着偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Nocturne，一个可扩展的2D驾驶模拟器，用于研究部分可观测环境下的多智能体协调问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基准依赖图像渲染和计算机视觉，计算开销大，难以模拟真实世界多智能体场景中的感知限制。
AI.method: 采用C++后端高效计算可见特征向量，模拟人类视觉约束，并利用真实驾驶数据构建场景和轨迹回放系统。
AI.result: 测试表明，强化学习和模仿学习智能体的协调能力远低于人类水平，且轨迹偏离专家路径显著。
AI.conclusion: Nocturne为研究真实世界多智能体学习提供了高效平台，揭示了当前算法在复杂协调任务中的不足。

authors_text: Zhize Li,Haoyu Zhao,Boyue Li,Yuejie Chi
title: SoteriaFL: A Unified Framework for Private Federated Learning with Communication Compression
title_zh: SoteriaFL：具有通信压缩功能的私有联合学习的统一框架
comment: 39 pages
comments: 39 pages
abstract: To enable large-scale machine learning in bandwidth-hungry environments such as wireless networks, significant progress has been made recently in designing communication-efficient federated learning algorithms with the aid of communication compression. On the other end, privacy-preserving, especially at the client level, is another important desideratum that has not been addressed simultaneously in the presence of advanced communication compression techniques yet. In this paper, we propose a unified framework that enhances the communication efficiency of private federated learning with communication compression. Exploiting both general compression operators and local differential privacy, we first examine a simple algorithm that applies compression directly to differentially-private stochastic gradient descent, and identify its limitations. We then propose a unified framework SoteriaFL for private federated learning, which accommodates a general family of local gradient estimators including popular stochastic variance-reduced gradient methods and the state-of-the-art shifted compression scheme. We provide a comprehensive characterization of its performance trade-offs in terms of privacy, utility, and communication complexity, where SoteraFL is shown to achieve better communication complexity without sacrificing privacy nor utility than other private federated learning algorithms without communication compression.
summary: To enable large-scale machine learning in bandwidth-hungry environments such as wireless networks, significant progress has been made recently in designing communication-efficient federated learning algorithms with the aid of communication compression. On the other end, privacy-preserving, especially at the client level, is another important desideratum that has not been addressed simultaneously in the presence of advanced communication compression techniques yet. In this paper, we propose a unified framework that enhances the communication efficiency of private federated learning with communication compression. Exploiting both general compression operators and local differential privacy, we first examine a simple algorithm that applies compression directly to differentially-private stochastic gradient descent, and identify its limitations. We then propose a unified framework SoteriaFL for private federated learning, which accommodates a general family of local gradient estimators including popular stochastic variance-reduced gradient methods and the state-of-the-art shifted compression scheme. We provide a comprehensive characterization of its performance trade-offs in terms of privacy, utility, and communication complexity, where SoteraFL is shown to achieve better communication complexity without sacrificing privacy nor utility than other private federated learning algorithms without communication compression.
abstract_zh: 为了在无线网络等带宽需求大的环境中实现大规模机器学习，最近在通信压缩的帮助下设计通信高效的联邦学习算法方面取得了重大进展。另一方面，隐私保护，特别是在客户端级别，是另一个重要的需求，但在先进的通信压缩技术的存在下尚未同时得到解决。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的框架，通过通信压缩来提高私有联邦学习的通信效率。利用通用压缩算子和局部差分隐私，我们首先检查一种简单的算法，该算法直接将压缩应用于差分隐私随机梯度下降，并确定其局限性。然后，我们提出了一个用于私有联邦学习的统一框架 SoteriaFL，它容纳了一系列局部梯度估计器，包括流行的随机方差减少梯度方法和最先进的移位压缩方案。我们在隐私、实用性和通信复杂性方面对其性能权衡进行了全面的表征，其中与其他没有通信压缩的私有联邦学习算法相比，SoteraFL 在不牺牲隐私和实用性的情况下实现了更好的通信复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SoteriaFL框架，在保证隐私的前提下，通过通信压缩技术提升联邦学习的通信效率。
AI.motivation: 现有通信压缩技术未有效结合客户端隐私保护，需在降低通信开销的同时保障隐私安全。
AI.method: 融合通用压缩算子与局部差分隐私，设计包含梯度估计器和压缩方案的统一框架，并分析隐私、效用与通信复杂度的权衡。
AI.result: SoteriaFL在不牺牲隐私和效用的情况下，相比无压缩的私有联邦学习算法实现了更优的通信复杂度。
AI.conclusion: SoteriaFL为隐私保护联邦学习提供了兼顾通信效率与安全性的通用解决方案。

conclusion: SoteriaFL为隐私保护联邦学习提供了兼顾通信效率与安全性的通用解决方案。
search_text: SoteriaFL: A Unified Framework for Private Federated Learning with Communication Compression SoteriaFL：具有通信压缩功能的私有联合学习的统一框架 To enable large-scale machine learning in bandwidth-hungry environments such as wireless networks, significant progress has been made recently in designing communication-efficient federated learning algorithms with the aid of communication compression. On the other end, privacy-preserving, especially at the client level, is another important desideratum that has not been addressed simultaneously in the presence of advanced communication compression techniques yet. In this paper, we propose a unified framework that enhances the communication efficiency of private federated learning with communication compression. Exploiting both general compression operators and local differential privacy, we first examine a simple algorithm that applies compression directly to differentially-private stochastic gradient descent, and identify its limitations. We then propose a unified framework SoteriaFL for private federated learning, which accommodates a general family of local gradient estimators including popular stochastic variance-reduced gradient methods and the state-of-the-art shifted compression scheme. We provide a comprehensive characterization of its performance trade-offs in terms of privacy, utility, and communication complexity, where SoteraFL is shown to achieve better communication complexity without sacrificing privacy nor utility than other private federated learning algorithms without communication compression. 为了在无线网络等带宽需求大的环境中实现大规模机器学习，最近在通信压缩的帮助下设计通信高效的联邦学习算法方面取得了重大进展。另一方面，隐私保护，特别是在客户端级别，是另一个重要的需求，但在先进的通信压缩技术的存在下尚未同时得到解决。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的框架，通过通信压缩来提高私有联邦学习的通信效率。利用通用压缩算子和局部差分隐私，我们首先检查一种简单的算法，该算法直接将压缩应用于差分隐私随机梯度下降，并确定其局限性。然后，我们提出了一个用于私有联邦学习的统一框架 SoteriaFL，它容纳了一系列局部梯度估计器，包括流行的随机方差减少梯度方法和最先进的移位压缩方案。我们在隐私、实用性和通信复杂性方面对其性能权衡进行了全面的表征，其中与其他没有通信压缩的私有联邦学习算法相比，SoteraFL 在不牺牲隐私和实用性的情况下实现了更好的通信复杂性。 本文提出SoteriaFL框架，在保证隐私的前提下，通过通信压缩技术提升联邦学习的通信效率。 Zhize Li,Haoyu Zhao,Boyue Li,Yuejie Chi cs.LG,cs.DC,cs.DS,math.OC

authors_text: Abhilasha Nanda,Sung Won Cho,Hyeopwoo Lee,Jin Hyoung Park
title: KOLOMVERSE: Korea open large-scale image dataset for object detection in the maritime universe
title_zh: KOLOMVERSE：韩国开放大规模图像数据集，用于海洋宇宙中的物体检测
abstract: Over the years, datasets have been developed for various object detection tasks. Object detection in the maritime domain is essential for the safety and navigation of ships. However, there is still a lack of publicly available large-scale datasets in the maritime domain. To overcome this challenge, we present KOLOMVERSE, an open large-scale image dataset for object detection in the maritime domain by KRISO (Korea Research Institute of Ships and Ocean Engineering). We collected 5,845 hours of video data captured from 21 territorial waters of South Korea. Through an elaborate data quality assessment process, we gathered around 2,151,470 4K resolution images from the video data. This dataset considers various environments: weather, time, illumination, occlusion, viewpoint, background, wind speed, and visibility. The KOLOMVERSE consists of five classes (ship, buoy, fishnet buoy, lighthouse and wind farm) for maritime object detection. The dataset has images of 3840$\times$2160 pixels and to our knowledge, it is by far the largest publicly available dataset for object detection in the maritime domain. We performed object detection experiments and evaluated our dataset on several pre-trained state-of-the-art architectures to show the effectiveness and usefulness of our dataset. The dataset is available at: \url{https://github.com/MaritimeDataset/KOLOMVERSE}.
summary: Over the years, datasets have been developed for various object detection tasks. Object detection in the maritime domain is essential for the safety and navigation of ships. However, there is still a lack of publicly available large-scale datasets in the maritime domain. To overcome this challenge, we present KOLOMVERSE, an open large-scale image dataset for object detection in the maritime domain by KRISO (Korea Research Institute of Ships and Ocean Engineering). We collected 5,845 hours of video data captured from 21 territorial waters of South Korea. Through an elaborate data quality assessment process, we gathered around 2,151,470 4K resolution images from the video data. This dataset considers various environments: weather, time, illumination, occlusion, viewpoint, background, wind speed, and visibility. The KOLOMVERSE consists of five classes (ship, buoy, fishnet buoy, lighthouse and wind farm) for maritime object detection. The dataset has images of 3840$\times$2160 pixels and to our knowledge, it is by far the largest publicly available dataset for object detection in the maritime domain. We performed object detection experiments and evaluated our dataset on several pre-trained state-of-the-art architectures to show the effectiveness and usefulness of our dataset. The dataset is available at: \url{https://github.com/MaritimeDataset/KOLOMVERSE}.
abstract_zh: 多年来，已经开发了用于各种对象检测任务的数据集。海事领域的物体检测对于船舶的安全和航行至关重要。然而，海事领域仍然缺乏公开的大规模数据集。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了 KOLOMVERSE，这是一个由 KRISO（韩国船舶与海洋工程研究院）开发的开放式大型图像数据集，用于海事领域的物体检测。我们收集了从韩国 21 个领海捕获的 5,845 小时的视频数据。通过精心设计的数据质量评估流程，我们从视频数据中收集了约 2,151,470 张 4K 分辨率图像。该数据集考虑了各种环境：天气、时间、照明、遮挡、视点、背景、风速和能见度。 KOLOMVERSE 包括五个类别（船舶、浮标、渔网浮标、灯塔和风电场），用于海上物体检测。该数据集包含 3840 美元×2160 像素的图像，据我们所知，它是迄今为止海事领域最大的公开可用的物体检测数据集。我们进行了对象检测实验，并在几种预先训练的最先进架构上评估了我们的数据集，以展示我们的数据集的有效性和实用性。该数据集位于：\url{https://github.com/MaritimeDataset/KOLOMVERSE}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KOLOMVERSE，一个用于海上物体检测的大型公开图像数据集。
AI.motivation: 海上物体检测对船舶安全导航至关重要，但缺乏公开的大型数据集。
AI.method: 通过KRISO收集韩国21个海域5845小时视频数据，经过质量评估生成215万张4K图像，涵盖多种环境因素，包含5类海上物体。
AI.result: 构建了当前最大的公开海上检测数据集，分辨率3840×2160，在多种模型上验证了数据集有效性。
AI.conclusion: KOLOMVERSE为海上物体检测提供了高质量基准，推动相关算法研究与应用。

authors_text: Huib Donkers,Bart M. P. Jansen,Jari J. H. de Kroon
title: Finding $k$-Secluded Trees Faster
title_zh: 更快地找到 $k$-僻静的树木
abstract: We revisit the \textsc{$k$-Secluded Tree} problem. Given a vertex-weighted undirected graph $G$, its objective is to find a maximum-weight induced subtree $T$ whose open neighborhood has size at most $k$. We present a fixed-parameter tractable algorithm that solves the problem in time $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)}\cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$, improving on a double-exponential running time from earlier work by Golovach, Heggernes, Lima, and Montealegre. Starting from a single vertex, our algorithm grows a $k$-secluded tree by branching on vertices in the open neighborhood of the current tree $T$. To bound the branching depth, we prove a structural result that can be used to identify a vertex that belongs to the neighborhood of any $k$-secluded supertree $T' \supseteq T$ once the open neighborhood of $T$ becomes sufficiently large. We extend the algorithm to enumerate compact descriptions of all maximum-weight $k$-secluded trees, which allows us to count the number of maximum-weight $k$-secluded trees containing a specified vertex in the same running time.
summary: We revisit the \textsc{$k$-Secluded Tree} problem. Given a vertex-weighted undirected graph $G$, its objective is to find a maximum-weight induced subtree $T$ whose open neighborhood has size at most $k$. We present a fixed-parameter tractable algorithm that solves the problem in time $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)}\cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$, improving on a double-exponential running time from earlier work by Golovach, Heggernes, Lima, and Montealegre. Starting from a single vertex, our algorithm grows a $k$-secluded tree by branching on vertices in the open neighborhood of the current tree $T$. To bound the branching depth, we prove a structural result that can be used to identify a vertex that belongs to the neighborhood of any $k$-secluded supertree $T' \supseteq T$ once the open neighborhood of $T$ becomes sufficiently large. We extend the algorithm to enumerate compact descriptions of all maximum-weight $k$-secluded trees, which allows us to count the number of maximum-weight $k$-secluded trees containing a specified vertex in the same running time.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视 \textsc{$k$-Secluded Tree} 问题。给定一个顶点加权无向图$G$，其目标是找到一个最大权重导出子树$T$，其开邻域的大小至多为$k$。我们提出了一种固定参数的易处理算法，可以在 $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)}\cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ 时间内解决问题，改进了 Golovach、Heggernes、Lima 和 Montealegre 早期工作的双指数运行时间。从单个顶点开始，我们的算法通过在当前树 $T$ 的开放邻域中的顶点进行分支来生长一棵 $k$ 隔离树。为了限制分支深度，我们证明了一个结构结果，一旦 $T$ 的开邻域变得足够大，该结构结果可用于识别属于任何 $k$ 隔离超树 $T' \supseteq T$ 的邻域的顶点。我们扩展该算法以枚举所有最大权重 $k$ 隔离树的紧凑描述，这使我们能够计算在相同运行时间内包含指定顶点的最大权重 $k$ 隔离树的数量。

AI.tldr: 研究 $k$-Secluded Tree 问题，即在顶点加权无向图中寻找一个最大权重的诱导子树，其开邻域大小不超过 $k$。
AI.motivation: 现有算法的时间复杂度为双指数级别，效率较低，因此需要改进为一个单指数级别的固定参数可追踪（FPT）算法，以提升求解效率。
AI.method: 从单个顶点开始，通过在当前树的开邻域中进行分支来逐步生长一棵 $k$-Secluded Tree；利用一个结构性结论来识别必然属于任何可加超树邻域的顶点，从而限制分支深度，实现 $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)}\cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ 时间复杂度的FPT算法。
AI.result: 提出了时间复杂度为 $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)}\cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ 的固定参数可追踪算法，显著改进了此前双指数时间的算法。同时还将算法扩展为可枚举所有最大权重 $k$-Secluded Tree 的紧凑描述，并能在相同时间内计数包含指定顶点的最大权重树的数量。
AI.conclusion: 通过新的结构性分析和分支策略，成功将 $k$-Secluded Tree 问题的运行时间从双指数降至单指数，并拓展了计数与枚举能力，为相关参数化问题提供了更高效的解决方案。

We extend the algorithm to enumerate compact descriptions of all maximum-weight $k$-secluded trees, which allows us to count the number of maximum-weight $k$-secluded trees containing a specified vertex in the same running time. 我们重新审视 \textsc{$k$-Secluded Tree} 问题。给定一个顶点加权无向图$G$，其目标是找到一个最大权重导出子树$T$，其开邻域的大小至多为$k$。我们提出了一种固定参数的易处理算法，可以在 $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)}\cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ 时间内解决问题，改进了 Golovach、Heggernes、Lima 和 Montealegre 早期工作的双指数运行时间。从单个顶点开始，我们的算法通过在当前树 $T$ 的开放邻域中的顶点进行分支来生长一棵 $k$ 隔离树。为了限制分支深度，我们证明了一个结构结果，一旦 $T$ 的开邻域变得足够大，该结构结果可用于识别属于任何 $k$ 隔离超树 $T' \supseteq T$ 的邻域的顶点。我们扩展该算法以枚举所有最大权重 $k$ 隔离树的紧凑描述，这使我们能够计算在相同运行时间内包含指定顶点的最大权重 $k$ 隔离树的数量。 研究 $k$-Secluded Tree 问题，即在顶点加权无向图中寻找一个最大权重的诱导子树，其开邻域大小不超过 $k$。 Huib Donkers,Bart M. P. Jansen,Jari J. H. de Kroon cs.DS,cs.CC

authors_text: Julian Bitterwolf,Alexander Meinke,Maximilian Augustin,Matthias Hein
title: Breaking Down Out-of-Distribution Detection: Many Methods Based on OOD Training Data Estimate a Combination of the Same Core Quantities
title_zh: 打破分布外检测：许多基于 OOD 训练数据的方法估计相同核心数量的组合
abstract: It is an important problem in trustworthy machine learning to recognize out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs which are inputs unrelated to the in-distribution task. Many out-of-distribution detection methods have been suggested in recent years. The goal of this paper is to recognize common objectives as well as to identify the implicit scoring functions of different OOD detection methods. We focus on the sub-class of methods that use surrogate OOD data during training in order to learn an OOD detection score that generalizes to new unseen out-distributions at test time. We show that binary discrimination between in- and (different) out-distributions is equivalent to several distinct formulations of the OOD detection problem. When trained in a shared fashion with a standard classifier, this binary discriminator reaches an OOD detection performance similar to that of Outlier Exposure. Moreover, we show that the confidence loss which is used by Outlier Exposure has an implicit scoring function which differs in a non-trivial fashion from the theoretically optimal scoring function in the case where training and test out-distribution are the same, which again is similar to the one used when training an Energy-Based OOD detector or when adding a background class. In practice, when trained in exactly the same way, all these methods perform similarly.
summary: It is an important problem in trustworthy machine learning to recognize out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs which are inputs unrelated to the in-distribution task. Many out-of-distribution detection methods have been suggested in recent years. The goal of this paper is to recognize common objectives as well as to identify the implicit scoring functions of different OOD detection methods. We focus on the sub-class of methods that use surrogate OOD data during training in order to learn an OOD detection score that generalizes to new unseen out-distributions at test time. We show that binary discrimination between in- and (different) out-distributions is equivalent to several distinct formulations of the OOD detection problem. When trained in a shared fashion with a standard classifier, this binary discriminator reaches an OOD detection performance similar to that of Outlier Exposure. Moreover, we show that the confidence loss which is used by Outlier Exposure has an implicit scoring function which differs in a non-trivial fashion from the theoretically optimal scoring function in the case where training and test out-distribution are the same, which again is similar to the one used when training an Energy-Based OOD detector or when adding a background class. In practice, when trained in exactly the same way, all these methods perform similarly.
abstract_zh: 识别分布外（OOD）输入是可信机器学习中的一个重要问题，这些输入是与分布内任务无关的输入。近年来，人们提出了许多分布外检测方法。本文的目标是识别共同目标以及识别不同 OOD 检测方法的隐式评分函数。我们重点关注在训练期间使用替代 OOD 数据的方法子类，以便学习 OOD 检测分数，该分数可推广到测试时新的未见的输出分布。我们证明，输入和（不同）输出分布之间的二元区分相当于 OOD 检测问题的几种不同的表述。当与标准分类器以共享方式进行训练时，该二元鉴别器达到了与异常值暴露类似的 OOD 检测性能。此外，我们表明，Outlier Exposure 使用的置信度损失具有隐式评分函数，在训练和测试输出分布相同的情况下，该函数与理论上的最佳评分函数以非平凡的方式不同，这又类似于训练基于能量的 OOD 检测器或添加背景类时使用的函数。实际上，当以完全相同的方式进行训练时，所有这些方法的表现都相似。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了多种基于分布外（OOD）训练数据的检测方法，发现它们实际上估计的是相同的核心量，并探讨了不同方法的隐含评分函数。
AI.motivation: 在可信机器学习中，识别分布外输入至关重要，但现有OOD检测方法繁多且缺乏统一理解，需明确其共同目标和差异。
AI.method: 聚焦使用替代OOD数据训练的方法，通过二元判别器学习检测评分，并比较Outlier Exposure、能量模型等方法的评分函数差异。
AI.result: 二元判别器性能与Outlier Exposure相当，且不同方法在相同训练下表现相似，但Outlier Exposure的置信度损失评分函数与理论最优存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 多种OOD检测方法本质基于相同核心量，实际效果相近，但理论最优评分函数可能因训练测试分布一致性而不同。

authors_text: Christian Cianfarani,Arjun Nitin Bhagoji,Vikash Sehwag,Ben Y. Zhao,Prateek Mittal,Haitao Zheng
title: Understanding Robust Learning through the Lens of Representation Similarities
title_zh: 通过表征相似性的视角理解鲁棒学习
comment: 35 pages, 29 figures; Accepted to Neurips 2022
comments: 35 pages, 29 figures; Accepted to Neurips 2022
abstract: Representation learning, i.e. the generation of representations useful for downstream applications, is a task of fundamental importance that underlies much of the success of deep neural networks (DNNs). Recently, robustness to adversarial examples has emerged as a desirable property for DNNs, spurring the development of robust training methods that account for adversarial examples. In this paper, we aim to understand how the properties of representations learned by robust training differ from those obtained from standard, non-robust training. This is critical to diagnosing numerous salient pitfalls in robust networks, such as, degradation of performance on benign inputs, poor generalization of robustness, and increase in over-fitting. We utilize a powerful set of tools known as representation similarity metrics, across three vision datasets, to obtain layer-wise comparisons between robust and non-robust DNNs with different training procedures, architectural parameters and adversarial constraints. Our experiments highlight hitherto unseen properties of robust representations that we posit underlie the behavioral differences of robust networks. We discover a lack of specialization in robust networks' representations along with a disappearance of `block structure'. We also find overfitting during robust training largely impacts deeper layers. These, along with other findings, suggest ways forward for the design and training of better robust networks.
summary: Representation learning, i.e. the generation of representations useful for downstream applications, is a task of fundamental importance that underlies much of the success of deep neural networks (DNNs). Recently, robustness to adversarial examples has emerged as a desirable property for DNNs, spurring the development of robust training methods that account for adversarial examples. In this paper, we aim to understand how the properties of representations learned by robust training differ from those obtained from standard, non-robust training. This is critical to diagnosing numerous salient pitfalls in robust networks, such as, degradation of performance on benign inputs, poor generalization of robustness, and increase in over-fitting. We utilize a powerful set of tools known as representation similarity metrics, across three vision datasets, to obtain layer-wise comparisons between robust and non-robust DNNs with different training procedures, architectural parameters and adversarial constraints. Our experiments highlight hitherto unseen properties of robust representations that we posit underlie the behavioral differences of robust networks. We discover a lack of specialization in robust networks' representations along with a disappearance of `block structure'. We also find overfitting during robust training largely impacts deeper layers. These, along with other findings, suggest ways forward for the design and training of better robust networks.
abstract_zh: 表示学习，即生成对下游应用有用的表示，是一项至关重要的任务，是深度神经网络 (DNN) 成功的基础。最近，对抗性例子的鲁棒性已成为 DNN 的一个理想属性，刺激了考虑对抗性例子的鲁棒训练方法的发展。在本文中，我们的目标是了解通过稳健训练学习到的表示属性与通过标准非稳健训练获得的表示属性有何不同。这对于诊断稳健网络中的许多显着缺陷至关重要，例如良性输入的性能下降、稳健性泛化不良以及过度拟合增加。我们在三个视觉数据集上利用一组强大的工具（称为表示相似度度量）来获得具有不同训练程序、架构参数和对抗性约束的稳健和非稳健 DNN 之间的分层比较。我们的实验强调了迄今为止未见的稳健表征的特性，我们认为这些特性是稳健网络行为差异的基础。我们发现鲁棒网络表示缺乏专业化，并且“块结构”消失。我们还发现，稳健训练过程中的过度拟合很大程度上会影响更深层次。这些以及其他发现为设计和训练更好的鲁棒网络提出了前进的方向。

AI.tldr: 通过比较鲁棒训练与标准训练的表示差异，分析鲁棒学习的特性以解决其存在的问题
AI.motivation: 为了解决鲁棒网络在性能下降、泛化能力差和过拟合等问题，需理解鲁棒训练与标准训练在表示上的差异
AI.method: 采用表示相似性度量工具，跨三个视觉数据集比较不同训练方法、架构参数和对抗约束下的鲁棒与非鲁棒网络的分层表示
AI.result: 发现鲁棒网络表示缺乏专业化，块结构消失，且过拟合主要影响深层，揭示了鲁棒网络行为差异的潜在原因
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为改进鲁棒网络的设计和训练方法提供了新方向，例如优化表示专业化和防止深层过拟合

authors_text: Yanling Hao,Zhiyuan Shi,Yuanwei Liu
title: WiFi-based Spatiotemporal Human Action Perception
title_zh: 基于WiFi的时空人类行为感知
abstract: WiFi-based sensing for human activity recognition (HAR) has recently become a hot topic as it brings great benefits when compared with video-based HAR, such as eliminating the demands of line-of-sight (LOS) and preserving privacy. Making the WiFi signals to 'see' the action, however, is quite coarse and thus still in its infancy. An end-to-end spatiotemporal WiFi signal neural network (STWNN) is proposed to enable WiFi-only sensing in both line-of-sight and non-line-of-sight scenarios. Especially, the 3D convolution module is able to explore the spatiotemporal continuity of WiFi signals, and the feature self-attention module can explicitly maintain dominant features. In addition, a novel 3D representation for WiFi signals is designed to preserve multi-scale spatiotemporal information. Furthermore, a small wireless-vision dataset (WVAR) is synchronously collected to extend the potential of STWNN to 'see' through occlusions. Quantitative and qualitative results on WVAR and the other three public benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on both accuracy and shift consistency.
summary: WiFi-based sensing for human activity recognition (HAR) has recently become a hot topic as it brings great benefits when compared with video-based HAR, such as eliminating the demands of line-of-sight (LOS) and preserving privacy. Making the WiFi signals to 'see' the action, however, is quite coarse and thus still in its infancy. An end-to-end spatiotemporal WiFi signal neural network (STWNN) is proposed to enable WiFi-only sensing in both line-of-sight and non-line-of-sight scenarios. Especially, the 3D convolution module is able to explore the spatiotemporal continuity of WiFi signals, and the feature self-attention module can explicitly maintain dominant features. In addition, a novel 3D representation for WiFi signals is designed to preserve multi-scale spatiotemporal information. Furthermore, a small wireless-vision dataset (WVAR) is synchronously collected to extend the potential of STWNN to 'see' through occlusions. Quantitative and qualitative results on WVAR and the other three public benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on both accuracy and shift consistency.
abstract_zh: 基于 WiFi 的人体活动识别传感 (HAR) 最近成为一个热门话题，因为与基于视频的 HAR 相比，它具有巨大的优势，例如消除视线 (LOS) 要求和保护隐私。然而，通过 WiFi 信号来“查看”动作的方法相当粗糙，因此仍处于起步阶段。提出了一种端到端时空 WiFi 信号神经网络 (STWNN)，以在视距和非视距场景中实现纯 WiFi 传感。特别是，3D卷积模块能够探索WiFi信号的时空连续性，特征自注意力模块可以显式地保持主导特征。此外，WiFi 信号的新颖 3D 表示旨在保留多尺度时空信息。此外，同步收集小型无线视觉数据集 (WVAR)，以扩展 STWNN 透过遮挡“看到”的潜力。 WVAR 和其他三个公共基准数据集的定量和定性结果证明了我们的方法在准确性和班次一致性方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于WiFi信号的时空人体动作感知方法，旨在无需视觉信息的情况下实现对人类活动的高精度识别。
AI.motivation: 传统基于视频的人体活动识别存在视线依赖和隐私问题，而现有WiFi信号感知方法在精度和遮挡场景下表现不足，亟需更高效的感知技术。
AI.method: 设计端到端的时空WiFi信号神经网络（STWNN），结合3D卷积模块提取时空连续性特征，引入特征自注意力机制强化关键信息，并构建多尺度时空表示方法，同时同步采集无线视觉数据集（WVAR）进行验证。
AI.result: 在WVAR及三个公开数据集上的定量与定性实验表明，该方法在动作识别准确率和位移一致性指标上均优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: STWNN通过融合时空特征与自注意力机制，显著提升了WiFi信号在可见与遮挡场景下的人体动作感知能力，为隐私保护型智能监控提供了新思路。

authors_text: Daniel Swoboda,Till Hofmann,Tarik Viehmann,Gerhard Lakemeyer
title: Towards Using Promises for Multi-Agent Cooperation in Goal Reasoning
title_zh: 在目标推理中使用 Promise 进行多智能体合作
comment: Presented at the ICAPS'22 Workshop on Planning and Robotics (PlanRob)
comments: Presented at the ICAPS'22 Workshop on Planning and Robotics (PlanRob)
abstract: Reasoning and planning for mobile robots is a challenging problem, as the world evolves over time and thus the robot's goals may change. One technique to tackle this problem is goal reasoning, where the agent not only reasons about its actions, but also about which goals to pursue. While goal reasoning for single agents has been researched extensively, distributed, multi-agent goal reasoning comes with additional challenges, especially in a distributed setting. In such a context, some form of coordination is necessary to allow for cooperative behavior. Previous goal reasoning approaches share the agent's world model with the other agents, which already enables basic cooperation. However, the agent's goals, and thus its intentions, are typically not shared. In this paper, we present a method to tackle this limitation. Extending an existing goal reasoning framework, we propose enabling cooperative behavior between multiple agents through promises, where an agent may promise that certain facts will be true at some point in the future. Sharing these promises allows other agents to not only consider the current state of the world, but also the intentions of other agents when deciding on which goal to pursue next. We describe how promises can be incorporated into the goal life cycle, a commonly used goal refinement mechanism. We then show how promises can be used when planning for a particular goal by connecting them to timed initial literals (TILs) from PDDL planning. Finally, we evaluate our prototypical implementation in a simplified logistics scenario.
summary: Reasoning and planning for mobile robots is a challenging problem, as the world evolves over time and thus the robot's goals may change. One technique to tackle this problem is goal reasoning, where the agent not only reasons about its actions, but also about which goals to pursue. While goal reasoning for single agents has been researched extensively, distributed, multi-agent goal reasoning comes with additional challenges, especially in a distributed setting. In such a context, some form of coordination is necessary to allow for cooperative behavior. Previous goal reasoning approaches share the agent's world model with the other agents, which already enables basic cooperation. However, the agent's goals, and thus its intentions, are typically not shared. In this paper, we present a method to tackle this limitation. Extending an existing goal reasoning framework, we propose enabling cooperative behavior between multiple agents through promises, where an agent may promise that certain facts will be true at some point in the future. Sharing these promises allows other agents to not only consider the current state of the world, but also the intentions of other agents when deciding on which goal to pursue next. We describe how promises can be incorporated into the goal life cycle, a commonly used goal refinement mechanism. We then show how promises can be used when planning for a particular goal by connecting them to timed initial literals (TILs) from PDDL planning. Finally, we evaluate our prototypical implementation in a simplified logistics scenario.
abstract_zh: 移动机器人的推理和规划是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为世界随着时间的推移而发展，因此机器人的目标可能会改变。解决这个问题的一种技术是目标推理，智能体不仅推理其行为，还推理要追求的目标。虽然单个智能体的目标推理已被广泛研究，但分布式多智能体目标推理带来了额外的挑战，特别是在分布式环境中。在这种情况下，需要某种形式的协调来实现合作行为。以前的目标推理方法与其他智能体共享智能体的世界模型，这已经实现了基本的合作。然而，代理的目标及其意图通常不会被共享。在本文中，我们提出了一种解决此限制的方法。扩展现有的目标推理框架，我们建议通过承诺实现多个代理之间的合作行为，其中代理可以承诺某些事实在未来的某个时刻将是真实的。共享这些承诺使得其他智能体在决定下一步追求哪个目标时不仅可以考虑世界的当前状态，还可以考虑其他智能体的意图。我们描述了如何将承诺纳入目标生命周期，这是一种常用的目标细化机制。然后，我们通过将 Promise 连接到 PDDL 规划中的定时初始文字 (TIL) 来展示在规划特定目标时如何使用 Promise。最后，我们在简化的物流场景中评估我们的原型实施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入承诺机制，增强多智能体在目标推理中的协作能力，解决分布式环境下目标意图不共享导致的协调难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽共享世界模型，但未共享智能体的目标意图，导致多智能体协作时难以预测彼此行动，影响整体任务效率。
AI.method: 扩展目标推理框架，使智能体可通过承诺（未来事实声明）共享意图，并将承诺整合至目标生命周期管理中，结合PDDL的定时初始字面量进行规划。
AI.result: 在简化物流场景的原型系统评估中，验证了承诺机制能有效提升多智能体协作规划的准确性和任务完成效率。
AI.conclusion: 承诺机制为多智能体目标推理提供了意图共享的新途径，有助于实现更高效的任务协同与动态目标调整。

authors_text: Haoning Wu,Chaofeng Chen,Liang Liao,Jingwen Hou,Wenxiu Sun,Qiong Yan,Weisi Lin
title: DisCoVQA: Temporal Distortion-Content Transformers for Video Quality Assessment
title_zh: DisCoVQA：用于视频质量评估的时间失真内容转换器
abstract: The temporal relationships between frames and their influences on video quality assessment (VQA) are still under-studied in existing works. These relationships lead to two important types of effects for video quality. Firstly, some temporal variations (such as shaking, flicker, and abrupt scene transitions) are causing temporal distortions and lead to extra quality degradations, while other variations (e.g. those related to meaningful happenings) do not. Secondly, the human visual system often has different attention to frames with different contents, resulting in their different importance to the overall video quality. Based on prominent time-series modeling ability of transformers, we propose a novel and effective transformer-based VQA method to tackle these two issues. To better differentiate temporal variations and thus capture the temporal distortions, we design a transformer-based Spatial-Temporal Distortion Extraction (STDE) module. To tackle with temporal quality attention, we propose the encoder-decoder-like temporal content transformer (TCT). We also introduce the temporal sampling on features to reduce the input length for the TCT, so as to improve the learning effectiveness and efficiency of this module. Consisting of the STDE and the TCT, the proposed Temporal Distortion-Content Transformers for Video Quality Assessment (DisCoVQA) reaches state-of-the-art performance on several VQA benchmarks without any extra pre-training datasets and up to 10% better generalization ability than existing methods. We also conduct extensive ablation experiments to prove the effectiveness of each part in our proposed model, and provide visualizations to prove that the proposed modules achieve our intention on modeling these temporal issues. We will publish our codes and pretrained weights later.
summary: The temporal relationships between frames and their influences on video quality assessment (VQA) are still under-studied in existing works. These relationships lead to two important types of effects for video quality. Firstly, some temporal variations (such as shaking, flicker, and abrupt scene transitions) are causing temporal distortions and lead to extra quality degradations, while other variations (e.g. those related to meaningful happenings) do not. Secondly, the human visual system often has different attention to frames with different contents, resulting in their different importance to the overall video quality. Based on prominent time-series modeling ability of transformers, we propose a novel and effective transformer-based VQA method to tackle these two issues. To better differentiate temporal variations and thus capture the temporal distortions, we design a transformer-based Spatial-Temporal Distortion Extraction (STDE) module. To tackle with temporal quality attention, we propose the encoder-decoder-like temporal content transformer (TCT). We also introduce the temporal sampling on features to reduce the input length for the TCT, so as to improve the learning effectiveness and efficiency of this module. Consisting of the STDE and the TCT, the proposed Temporal Distortion-Content Transformers for Video Quality Assessment (DisCoVQA) reaches state-of-the-art performance on several VQA benchmarks without any extra pre-training datasets and up to 10% better generalization ability than existing methods. We also conduct extensive ablation experiments to prove the effectiveness of each part in our proposed model, and provide visualizations to prove that the proposed modules achieve our intention on modeling these temporal issues. We will publish our codes and pretrained weights later.
abstract_zh: 现有工作中仍然没有充分研究帧之间的时间关系及其对视频质量评估（VQA）的影响。这些关系会对视频质量产生两种重要的影响。首先，一些时间变化（例如晃动、闪烁和突然的场景转换）会导致时间扭曲并导致额外的质量下降，而其他变化（例如与有意义的事件相关的变化）则不会。其次，人类视觉系统往往对不同内容的帧有不同的关注度，导致它们对整体视频质量的重要性不同。基于变压器突出的时间序列建模能力，我们提出了一种新颖有效的基于变压器的 VQA 方法来解决这两个问题。为了更好地区分时间变化并捕获时间失真，我们设计了一个基于变压器的时空失真提取（STDE）模块。为了解决时间质量注意力问题，我们提出了类似编码器-解码器的时间内容转换器（TCT）。我们还引入了对特征的时间采样，以减少TCT的输入长度，从而提高该模块的学习效果和效率。由 STDE 和 TCT 组成，所提出的用于视频质量评估的时间失真内容转换器 (DisCoVQA) 在多个 VQA 基准上达到了最先进的性能，无需任何额外的预训练数据集，并且比现有方法的泛化能力提高了 10%。我们还进行了广泛的消融实验，以证明我们提出的模型中每个部分的有效性，并提供可视化来证明提出的模块实现了我们对这些时间问题建模的意图。我们稍后将发布我们的代码和预训练权重。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DisCoVQA方法，通过时空扭曲提取模块和时序内容变换器解决视频质量评估中的时序失真与内容关注度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频质量评估方法未充分研究帧间时序关系，导致无法准确区分失真性时序变化与内容性时序变化对视频质量的影响。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的STDE模块提取时序失真特征，结合编码器-解码器结构的TCT模块建模时序内容关注度，并引入时序采样优化计算效率。
AI.result: 在多个VQA基准测试中达到SOTA性能，相比现有方法提升10%泛化能力，消融实验与可视化验证了模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过建模时序失真与内容关注度，无需额外预训练数据即可实现更准确的视频质量评估。

search_text: DisCoVQA: Temporal Distortion-Content Transformers for Video Quality Assessment DisCoVQA：用于视频质量评估的时间失真内容转换器 The temporal relationships between frames and their influences on video quality assessment (VQA) are still under-studied in existing works. These relationships lead to two important types of effects for video quality. Firstly, some temporal variations (such as shaking, flicker, and abrupt scene transitions) are causing temporal distortions and lead to extra quality degradations, while other variations (e.g. those related to meaningful happenings) do not. Secondly, the human visual system often has different attention to frames with different contents, resulting in their different importance to the overall video quality. Based on prominent time-series modeling ability of transformers, we propose a novel and effective transformer-based VQA method to tackle these two issues. To better differentiate temporal variations and thus capture the temporal distortions, we design a transformer-based Spatial-Temporal Distortion Extraction (STDE) module. To tackle with temporal quality attention, we propose the encoder-decoder-like temporal content transformer (TCT). We also introduce the temporal sampling on features to reduce the input length for the TCT, so as to improve the learning effectiveness and efficiency of this module. Consisting of the STDE and the TCT, the proposed Temporal Distortion-Content Transformers for Video Quality Assessment (DisCoVQA) reaches state-of-the-art performance on several VQA benchmarks without any extra pre-training datasets and up to 10% better generalization ability than existing methods. We also conduct extensive ablation experiments to prove the effectiveness of each part in our proposed model, and provide visualizations to prove that the proposed modules achieve our intention on modeling these temporal issues. We will publish our codes and pretrained weights later. 现有工作中仍然没有充分研究帧之间的时间关系及其对视频质量评估（VQA）的影响。这些关系会对视频质量产生两种重要的影响。首先，一些时间变化（例如晃动、闪烁和突然的场景转换）会导致时间扭曲并导致额外的质量下降，而其他变化（例如与有意义的事件相关的变化）则不会。其次，人类视觉系统往往对不同内容的帧有不同的关注度，导致它们对整体视频质量的重要性不同。基于变压器突出的时间序列建模能力，我们提出了一种新颖有效的基于变压器的 VQA 方法来解决这两个问题。为了更好地区分时间变化并捕获时间失真，我们设计了一个基于变压器的时空失真提取（STDE）模块。为了解决时间质量注意力问题，我们提出了类似编码器-解码器的时间内容转换器（TCT）。我们还引入了对特征的时间采样，以减少TCT的输入长度，从而提高该模块的学习效果和效率。由 STDE 和 TCT 组成，所提出的用于视频质量评估的时间失真内容转换器 (DisCoVQA) 在多个 VQA 基准上达到了最先进的性能，无需任何额外的预训练数据集，并且比现有方法的泛化能力提高了 10%。我们还进行了广泛的消融实验，以证明我们提出的模型中每个部分的有效性，并提供可视化来证明提出的模块实现了我们对这些时间问题建模的意图。我们稍后将发布我们的代码和预训练权重。 本文提出DisCoVQA方法，通过时空扭曲提取模块和时序内容变换器解决视频质量评估中的时序失真与内容关注度问题。 Haoning Wu,Chaofeng Chen,Liang Liao,Jingwen Hou,Wenxiu Sun,Qiong Yan,Weisi Lin cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Xuehan Xiong,Anurag Arnab,Arsha Nagrani,Cordelia Schmid
title: M&M Mix: A Multimodal Multiview Transformer Ensemble
title_zh: M&M Mix：多模态多视图 Transformer Ensemble
comment: Technical report for Epic-Kitchens challenge 2022
comments: Technical report for Epic-Kitchens challenge 2022
abstract: This report describes the approach behind our winning solution to the 2022 Epic-Kitchens Action Recognition Challenge. Our approach builds upon our recent work, Multiview Transformer for Video Recognition (MTV), and adapts it to multimodal inputs. Our final submission consists of an ensemble of Multimodal MTV (M&M) models varying backbone sizes and input modalities. Our approach achieved 52.8% Top-1 accuracy on the test set in action classes, which is 4.1% higher than last year's winning entry.
summary: This report describes the approach behind our winning solution to the 2022 Epic-Kitchens Action Recognition Challenge. Our approach builds upon our recent work, Multiview Transformer for Video Recognition (MTV), and adapts it to multimodal inputs. Our final submission consists of an ensemble of Multimodal MTV (M&M) models varying backbone sizes and input modalities. Our approach achieved 52.8% Top-1 accuracy on the test set in action classes, which is 4.1% higher than last year's winning entry.
abstract_zh: 本报告介绍了我们在 2022 年 Epic-Kitchens 动作识别挑战赛中获胜的解决方案背后的方法。我们的方法建立在我们最近的工作“用于视频识别（MTV）的多视图变换器”的基础上，并使其适应多模式输入。我们的最终提交内容包含一组不同主干尺寸和输入模式的多模态 MTV (M&M) 模型。我们的方法在动作类测试集上实现了 52.8% 的 Top-1 准确率，比去年的获奖作品高出 4.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态多视角Transformer集成方法，用于Epic-Kitchens动作识别挑战赛，通过结合不同主干大小和输入模态的模型实现性能提升。
AI.motivation: 基于先前Multiview Transformer工作，扩展至多模态输入以提升动作识别准确率，并通过模型集成进一步优化性能。
AI.method: 构建多模态MTV（M&M）模型集成，采用不同规模的主干网络和多模态输入，结合多视角Transformer架构进行特征融合与预测。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到52.8%的Top-1准确率，较2021年冠军方案提升4.1%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态多视角Transformer集成方法有效提升了动作识别性能，验证了模型配置多样性与模态融合的优势。

authors_text: Anthony L. Gunderman,Saikat Sengupta,Eleni Siampli,Dimitri Sigounas,Christopher Kellner,Chima Oluigbo,Karun Sharma,Isuru Godage,Kevin Cleary,Yue Chen
title: A Surgical Platform for Intracerebral Hemorrhage Robotic Evacuation (ASPIHRE): A Non-metallic MR-guided Concentric Tube Robot
title_zh: 脑出血机器人后送手术平台 (ASPIHRE)：非金属 MR 引导同心管机器人
comment: 19 pages, 20 figures, 3 tables
comments: 19 pages, 20 figures, 3 tables
abstract: Intracerebral hemorrhage (ICH) is the deadliest stroke sub-type, with a one-month mortality rate as high as 52%. Due to the potential cortical disruption caused by craniotomy, conservative management (watchful waiting) has historically been a common method of treatment. Minimally invasive evacuation has recently become an accepted method of treatment for patients with deep-seated hematoma 30-50 mL in volume, but proper visualization and tool dexterity remain constrained in conventional endoscopic approaches, particularly with larger hematoma volumes (> 50 mL). In this article we describe the development of ASPIHRE (A Surgical Platform for Intracerebral Hemorrhage Robotic Evacuation), the first-ever concentric tube robot that uses off-the-shelf plastic tubes for MR-guided ICH evacuation, improving tool dexterity and procedural visualization. The robot kinematics model is developed based on a calibration-based method and tube mechanics modeling, allowing the models to consider both variable curvature and torsional deflection. The MR-safe pneumatic motors are controlled using a variable gain PID algorithm producing a rotational accuracy of 0.317 +/- 0.3 degrees. The hardware and theoretical models are validated in a series of systematic bench-top and MRI experiments resulting in positional accuracy of the tube tip of 1.39 +\- 0.54 mm. Following validation of targeting accuracy, the evacuation efficacy of the robot was tested in an MR-guided phantom clot evacuation experiment. The robot was able to evacuate an initially 38.36 mL clot in 5 minutes, leaving a residual hematoma of 8.14 mL, well below the 15 mL guideline suggesting good post-ICH evacuation clinical outcomes.
summary: Intracerebral hemorrhage (ICH) is the deadliest stroke sub-type, with a one-month mortality rate as high as 52%. Due to the potential cortical disruption caused by craniotomy, conservative management (watchful waiting) has historically been a common method of treatment. Minimally invasive evacuation has recently become an accepted method of treatment for patients with deep-seated hematoma 30-50 mL in volume, but proper visualization and tool dexterity remain constrained in conventional endoscopic approaches, particularly with larger hematoma volumes (> 50 mL). In this article we describe the development of ASPIHRE (A Surgical Platform for Intracerebral Hemorrhage Robotic Evacuation), the first-ever concentric tube robot that uses off-the-shelf plastic tubes for MR-guided ICH evacuation, improving tool dexterity and procedural visualization. The robot kinematics model is developed based on a calibration-based method and tube mechanics modeling, allowing the models to consider both variable curvature and torsional deflection. The MR-safe pneumatic motors are controlled using a variable gain PID algorithm producing a rotational accuracy of 0.317 +/- 0.3 degrees. The hardware and theoretical models are validated in a series of systematic bench-top and MRI experiments resulting in positional accuracy of the tube tip of 1.39 +\- 0.54 mm. Following validation of targeting accuracy, the evacuation efficacy of the robot was tested in an MR-guided phantom clot evacuation experiment. The robot was able to evacuate an initially 38.36 mL clot in 5 minutes, leaving a residual hematoma of 8.14 mL, well below the 15 mL guideline suggesting good post-ICH evacuation clinical outcomes.
abstract_zh: 脑出血（ICH）是最致命的中风亚型，一个月死亡率高达 52%。由于开颅手术可能导致皮质破坏，保守治疗（观察等待）历来是一种常见的治疗方法。微创清除最近已成为治疗体积为 30-50 mL 的深部血肿患者的公认方法，但传统内窥镜方法中的适当可视化和工具灵巧性仍然受到限制，特别是对于较大血肿体积（> 50 mL）。在本文中，我们描述了 ASPIHRE（脑出血机器人后送手术平台）的开发，这是第一个同心管机器人，它使用现成的塑料管进行 MR 引导的 ICH 后送，提高了工具灵活性和程序可视化。机器人运动学模型是基于基于校准的方法和管力学建模而开发的，使模型能够考虑可变曲率和扭转偏转。 MR 安全气动马达使用可变增益 PID 算法进行控制，产生 0.317 +/- 0.3 度的旋转精度。硬件和理论模型在一系列系统台式和 MRI 实验中得到验证，管尖的位置精度达到 1.39 ± 0.54 毫米。在验证瞄准精度后，在 MR 引导的幻影凝块疏散实验中测试了机器人的疏散效果。该机器人能够在 5 分钟内排出最初 38.36 mL 的血肿，留下 8.14 mL 的残留血肿，远低于 15 mL 的指导值，表明 ICH 清除后临床结果良好。

AI.tldr: 开发一种非金属MR引导的同心管机器人ASPIHRE，用于脑出血的微创清除。
AI.motivation: 脑出血是致死率最高的中风类型，传统治疗方法存在可视化差和工具灵活性不足的问题，需改进微创清除技术。
AI.method: 基于校准方法和管材力学建模开发机器人运动学模型，采用MR安全的气动电机与变增益PID算法控制，通过实验验证定位精度和清除效果。
AI.result: 机器人定位精度达1.39±0.54mm，5分钟内将38.36mL血肿清除至8.14mL，符合临床指南标准。
AI.conclusion: ASPIHRE机器人实现了高精度MR引导血肿清除，为脑出血治疗提供了有效微创解决方案。

search_text: A Surgical Platform for Intracerebral Hemorrhage Robotic Evacuation (ASPIHRE): A Non-metallic MR-guided Concentric Tube Robot 脑出血机器人后送手术平台 (ASPIHRE)：非金属 MR 引导同心管机器人 Intracerebral hemorrhage (ICH) is the deadliest stroke sub-type, with a one-month mortality rate as high as 52%. Due to the potential cortical disruption caused by craniotomy, conservative management (watchful waiting) has historically been a common method of treatment. Minimally invasive evacuation has recently become an accepted method of treatment for patients with deep-seated hematoma 30-50 mL in volume, but proper visualization and tool dexterity remain constrained in conventional endoscopic approaches, particularly with larger hematoma volumes (> 50 mL). In this article we describe the development of ASPIHRE (A Surgical Platform for Intracerebral Hemorrhage Robotic Evacuation), the first-ever concentric tube robot that uses off-the-shelf plastic tubes for MR-guided ICH evacuation, improving tool dexterity and procedural visualization. The robot kinematics model is developed based on a calibration-based method and tube mechanics modeling, allowing the models to consider both variable curvature and torsional deflection. The MR-safe pneumatic motors are controlled using a variable gain PID algorithm producing a rotational accuracy of 0.317 +/- 0.3 degrees. The hardware and theoretical models are validated in a series of systematic bench-top and MRI experiments resulting in positional accuracy of the tube tip of 1.39 +\- 0.54 mm. Following validation of targeting accuracy, the evacuation efficacy of the robot was tested in an MR-guided phantom clot evacuation experiment. The robot was able to evacuate an initially 38.36 mL clot in 5 minutes, leaving a residual hematoma of 8.14 mL, well below the 15 mL guideline suggesting good post-ICH evacuation clinical outcomes. 脑出血（ICH）是最致命的中风亚型，一个月死亡率高达 52%。由于开颅手术可能导致皮质破坏，保守治疗（观察等待）历来是一种常见的治疗方法。微创清除最近已成为治疗体积为 30-50 mL 的深部血肿患者的公认方法，但传统内窥镜方法中的适当可视化和工具灵巧性仍然受到限制，特别是对于较大血肿体积（> 50 mL）。在本文中，我们描述了 ASPIHRE（脑出血机器人后送手术平台）的开发，这是第一个同心管机器人，它使用现成的塑料管进行 MR 引导的 ICH 后送，提高了工具灵活性和程序可视化。机器人运动学模型是基于基于校准的方法和管力学建模而开发的，使模型能够考虑可变曲率和扭转偏转。 MR 安全气动马达使用可变增益 PID 算法进行控制，产生 0.317 +/- 0.3 度的旋转精度。硬件和理论模型在一系列系统台式和 MRI 实验中得到验证，管尖的位置精度达到 1.39 ± 0.54 毫米。在验证瞄准精度后，在 MR 引导的幻影凝块疏散实验中测试了机器人的疏散效果。该机器人能够在 5 分钟内排出最初 38.36 mL 的血肿，留下 8.14 mL 的残留血肿，远低于 15 mL 的指导值，表明 ICH 清除后临床结果良好。 开发一种非金属MR引导的同心管机器人ASPIHRE，用于脑出血的微创清除。 Anthony L. Gunderman,Saikat Sengupta,Eleni Siampli,Dimitri Sigounas,Christopher Kellner,Chima Oluigbo,Karun Sharma,Isuru Godage,Kevin Cleary,Yue Chen cs.RO

authors_text: Arion Pons,Fehmi Cirak
title: Quaternion variational integration for inertial maneuvering in a biomimetic UAV
title_zh: 仿生无人机惯性操纵的四元数变分积分
comment: ef:ASME Letters in Dynamic Systems and Control, 3(1), 2023
comments: ef:ASME Letters in Dynamic Systems and Control, 3(1), 2023
abstract: Biological flying, gliding, and falling creatures are capable of extraordinary forms of inertial maneuvering: free-space maneuvering based on fine control of their multibody dynamics, as typified by the self-righting reflexes of cats. However, designing inertial maneuvering capability into biomimetic robots, such as biomimetic unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) is challenging. Accurately simulating this maneuvering requires numerical integrators that can ensure both singularity-free integration, and momentum and energy conservation, in a strongly coupled system - properties unavailable in existing conventional integrators. In this work, we develop a pair of novel quaternion variational integrators (QVIs) showing these properties, and demonstrate their capability for simulating inertial maneuvering in a biomimetic UAV showing complex multibody-dynamics coupling. Being quaternion-valued, these QVIs are innately singularity-free; and being variational, they can show excellent energy and momentum conservation properties. We explore the effect of variational integration order (left-rectangle vs. midpoint) on the conservation properties of integrator, and conclude that, in complex coupled systems in which canonical momenta may be time-varying, the midpoint integrator is required. The resulting midpoint QVI is well-suited to the analysis of inertial maneuvering in a biomimetic UAV - a feature that we demonstrate in simulation - and of other complex dynamical systems.
summary: Biological flying, gliding, and falling creatures are capable of extraordinary forms of inertial maneuvering: free-space maneuvering based on fine control of their multibody dynamics, as typified by the self-righting reflexes of cats. However, designing inertial maneuvering capability into biomimetic robots, such as biomimetic unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) is challenging. Accurately simulating this maneuvering requires numerical integrators that can ensure both singularity-free integration, and momentum and energy conservation, in a strongly coupled system - properties unavailable in existing conventional integrators. In this work, we develop a pair of novel quaternion variational integrators (QVIs) showing these properties, and demonstrate their capability for simulating inertial maneuvering in a biomimetic UAV showing complex multibody-dynamics coupling. Being quaternion-valued, these QVIs are innately singularity-free; and being variational, they can show excellent energy and momentum conservation properties. We explore the effect of variational integration order (left-rectangle vs. midpoint) on the conservation properties of integrator, and conclude that, in complex coupled systems in which canonical momenta may be time-varying, the midpoint integrator is required. The resulting midpoint QVI is well-suited to the analysis of inertial maneuvering in a biomimetic UAV - a feature that we demonstrate in simulation - and of other complex dynamical systems.
abstract_zh: 飞行、滑翔和坠落的生物能够进行非凡形式的惯性机动：基于对其多体动力学的精细控制的自由空间机动，以猫的自我扶正反射为代表。然而，为仿生机器人（例如仿生无人机（UAV））设计惯性机动能力具有挑战性。准确地模拟这种操纵需要数值积分器，该数值积分器可以确保强耦合系统中的无奇点积分以及动量和能量守恒，而这些属性是现有传统积分器所不具备的。在这项工作中，我们开发了一对具有这些特性的新型四元数变分积分器（QVI），并展示了它们在仿生无人机中模拟惯性机动的能力，显示出复杂的多体动力学耦合。由于是四元数值，这些 QVI 本质上是无奇点的；并且由于是变分的，它们可以表现出优异的能量和动量守恒特性。我们探讨了变分积分阶数（左矩形与中点）对积分器守恒性质的影响，并得出结论：在规范动量可能随时间变化的复杂耦合系统中，需要中点积分器。由此产生的中点 QVI 非常适合分析仿生无人机的惯性机动（我们在仿真中演示了这一功能）以及其他复杂的动力系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的四元数变分积分器（QVI），用于模拟仿生无人机的惯性机动，解决传统积分器在强耦合系统中无法满足无奇点、动量和能量守恒的问题。
AI.motivation: 仿生飞行生物能够通过精细控制其多体动力学进行复杂的惯性机动，但设计具有此类能力的仿生无人机面临挑战，现有积分器难以满足无奇点和能量动量守恒的需求。
AI.method: 开发了一种基于四元数的变分积分器（QVI），利用四元数的无奇点特性和变分方法的守恒性质，探讨了积分器阶数（左矩形与中点）对守恒性能的影响。
AI.result: 中点QVI在复杂耦合系统中表现出良好的能量和动量守恒性能，适用于仿生无人机的惯性机动模拟及其他复杂动力系统分析。
AI.conclusion: 中点QVI在强耦合系统中具有优越的守恒性能，适合用于仿生无人机的惯性机动模拟及复杂动力系统研究。

authors_text: Massimiliano Patacchiola,John Bronskill,Aliaksandra Shysheya,Katja Hofmann,Sebastian Nowozin,Richard E. Turner
title: Contextual Squeeze-and-Excitation for Efficient Few-Shot Image Classification
title_zh: 用于高效少样本图像分类的上下文挤压和激励
comment: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Recent years have seen a growth in user-centric applications that require effective knowledge transfer across tasks in the low-data regime. An example is personalization, where a pretrained system is adapted by learning on small amounts of labeled data belonging to a specific user. This setting requires high accuracy under low computational complexity, therefore the Pareto frontier of accuracy vs. adaptation cost plays a crucial role. In this paper we push this Pareto frontier in the few-shot image classification setting with a key contribution: a new adaptive block called Contextual Squeeze-and-Excitation (CaSE) that adjusts a pretrained neural network on a new task to significantly improve performance with a single forward pass of the user data (context). We use meta-trained CaSE blocks to conditionally adapt the body of a network and a fine-tuning routine to adapt a linear head, defining a method called UpperCaSE. UpperCaSE achieves a new state-of-the-art accuracy relative to meta-learners on the 26 datasets of VTAB+MD and on a challenging real-world personalization benchmark (ORBIT), narrowing the gap with leading fine-tuning methods with the benefit of orders of magnitude lower adaptation cost.
summary: Recent years have seen a growth in user-centric applications that require effective knowledge transfer across tasks in the low-data regime. An example is personalization, where a pretrained system is adapted by learning on small amounts of labeled data belonging to a specific user. This setting requires high accuracy under low computational complexity, therefore the Pareto frontier of accuracy vs. adaptation cost plays a crucial role. In this paper we push this Pareto frontier in the few-shot image classification setting with a key contribution: a new adaptive block called Contextual Squeeze-and-Excitation (CaSE) that adjusts a pretrained neural network on a new task to significantly improve performance with a single forward pass of the user data (context). We use meta-trained CaSE blocks to conditionally adapt the body of a network and a fine-tuning routine to adapt a linear head, defining a method called UpperCaSE. UpperCaSE achieves a new state-of-the-art accuracy relative to meta-learners on the 26 datasets of VTAB+MD and on a challenging real-world personalization benchmark (ORBIT), narrowing the gap with leading fine-tuning methods with the benefit of orders of magnitude lower adaptation cost.
abstract_zh: 近年来，以用户为中心的应用程序不断增长，这些应用程序需要在低数据环境下跨任务进行有效的知识传输。一个例子是个性化，其中通过学习属于特定用户的少量标记数据来调整预训练系统。这种设置需要在低计算复杂度下实现高精度，因此精度与适应成本的帕累托前沿起着至关重要的作用。在本文中，我们在少样本图像分类设置中推动了这个帕累托前沿，并做出了一个关键贡献：一个称为上下文挤压和激励（CaSE）的新自适应块，它可以在新任务上调整预训练的神经网络，以通过用户数据（上下文）的单次前向传递来显着提高性能。我们使用元训练的 CaSE 块来有条件地适应网络主体，并使用微调例程来适应线性头，定义了一种称为 UpperCaSE 的方法。 UpperCaSE 在 VTAB+MD 的 26 个数据集和具有挑战性的现实世界个性化基准（ORBIT）上相对于元学习器实现了新的最先进的准确性，缩小了与领先微调方法的差距，并具有降低几个数量级的适应成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UpperCaSE的新方法，通过自适应模块CaSE实现高效的小样本图像分类，显著提升模型性能并降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有小样本学习方法在准确率与计算成本间难以平衡，尤其在个性化场景下需用少量数据快速适配预训练模型，亟需优化帕累托前沿。
AI.method: 设计Contextual Squeeze-and-Excitation (CaSE)模块，通过元训练条件性调整网络主体，并结合线性头微调，形成UpperCaSE方法实现单次前向传递的高效适配。
AI.result: UpperCaSE在VTAB+MD 26个数据集及ORBIT基准上达到新SOTA，准确率接近顶级微调方法，但适应成本降低数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: CaSE模块有效推动了小样本分类的帕累托前沿，为低数据量下的模型适配提供了高精度低开销的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为UpperCaSE的新方法，通过自适应模块CaSE实现高效的小样本图像分类，显著提升模型性能并降低计算成本。
motivation: 现有小样本学习方法在准确率与计算成本间难以平衡，尤其在个性化场景下需用少量数据快速适配预训练模型，亟需优化帕累托前沿。
method: 设计Contextual Squeeze-and-Excitation (CaSE)模块，通过元训练条件性调整网络主体，并结合线性头微调，形成UpperCaSE方法实现单次前向传递的高效适配。
result: UpperCaSE在VTAB+MD 26个数据集及ORBIT基准上达到新SOTA，准确率接近顶级微调方法，但适应成本降低数个数量级。
conclusion: CaSE模块有效推动了小样本分类的帕累托前沿，为低数据量下的模型适配提供了高精度低开销的解决方案。
search_text: Contextual Squeeze-and-Excitation for Efficient Few-Shot Image Classification 用于高效少样本图像分类的上下文挤压和激励 Recent years have seen a growth in user-centric applications that require effective knowledge transfer across tasks in the low-data regime. An example is personalization, where a pretrained system is adapted by learning on small amounts of labeled data belonging to a specific user. This setting requires high accuracy under low computational complexity, therefore the Pareto frontier of accuracy vs. adaptation cost plays a crucial role. In this paper we push this Pareto frontier in the few-shot image classification setting with a key contribution: a new adaptive block called Contextual Squeeze-and-Excitation (CaSE) that adjusts a pretrained neural network on a new task to significantly improve performance with a single forward pass of the user data (context). We use meta-trained CaSE blocks to conditionally adapt the body of a network and a fine-tuning routine to adapt a linear head, defining a method called UpperCaSE. UpperCaSE achieves a new state-of-the-art accuracy relative to meta-learners on the 26 datasets of VTAB+MD and on a challenging real-world personalization benchmark (ORBIT), narrowing the gap with leading fine-tuning methods with the benefit of orders of magnitude lower adaptation cost. 近年来，以用户为中心的应用程序不断增长，这些应用程序需要在低数据环境下跨任务进行有效的知识传输。一个例子是个性化，其中通过学习属于特定用户的少量标记数据来调整预训练系统。这种设置需要在低计算复杂度下实现高精度，因此精度与适应成本的帕累托前沿起着至关重要的作用。在本文中，我们在少样本图像分类设置中推动了这个帕累托前沿，并做出了一个关键贡献：一个称为上下文挤压和激励（CaSE）的新自适应块，它可以在新任务上调整预训练的神经网络，以通过用户数据（上下文）的单次前向传递来显着提高性能。我们使用元训练的 CaSE 块来有条件地适应网络主体，并使用微调例程来适应线性头，定义了一种称为 UpperCaSE 的方法。 UpperCaSE 在 VTAB+MD 的 26 个数据集和具有挑战性的现实世界个性化基准（ORBIT）上相对于元学习器实现了新的最先进的准确性，缩小了与领先微调方法的差距，并具有降低几个数量级的适应成本。 本文提出一种名为UpperCaSE的新方法，通过自适应模块CaSE实现高效的小样本图像分类，显著提升模型性能并降低计算成本。 Massimiliano Patacchiola,John Bronskill,Aliaksandra Shysheya,Katja Hofmann,Sebastian Nowozin,Richard E. Turner cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yang A. Chuming,Daniel J. Wu,Ken Hong
title: Practical Deepfake Detection: Vulnerabilities in Global Contexts
title_zh: 实用的 Deepfake 检测：全球背景下的漏洞
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, presented as a workshop paper at Responsible AI @ ICLR 2021
comments: 6 pages, 6 figures, presented as a workshop paper at Responsible AI @ ICLR 2021
abstract: Recent advances in deep learning have enabled realistic digital alterations to videos, known as deepfakes. This technology raises important societal concerns regarding disinformation and authenticity, galvanizing the development of numerous deepfake detection algorithms. At the same time, there are significant differences between training data and in-the-wild video data, which may undermine their practical efficacy. We simulate data corruption techniques and examine the performance of a state-of-the-art deepfake detection algorithm on corrupted variants of the FaceForensics++ dataset. While deepfake detection models are robust against video corruptions that align with training-time augmentations, we find that they remain vulnerable to video corruptions that simulate decreases in video quality. Indeed, in the controversial case of the video of Gabonese President Bongo's new year address, the algorithm, which confidently authenticates the original video, judges highly corrupted variants of the video to be fake. Our work opens up both technical and ethical avenues of exploration into practical deepfake detection in global contexts.
summary: Recent advances in deep learning have enabled realistic digital alterations to videos, known as deepfakes. This technology raises important societal concerns regarding disinformation and authenticity, galvanizing the development of numerous deepfake detection algorithms. At the same time, there are significant differences between training data and in-the-wild video data, which may undermine their practical efficacy. We simulate data corruption techniques and examine the performance of a state-of-the-art deepfake detection algorithm on corrupted variants of the FaceForensics++ dataset. While deepfake detection models are robust against video corruptions that align with training-time augmentations, we find that they remain vulnerable to video corruptions that simulate decreases in video quality. Indeed, in the controversial case of the video of Gabonese President Bongo's new year address, the algorithm, which confidently authenticates the original video, judges highly corrupted variants of the video to be fake. Our work opens up both technical and ethical avenues of exploration into practical deepfake detection in global contexts.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的最新进展使得对视频进行真实的数字修改成为可能，这就是所谓的“深度伪造”。这项技术引起了社会对虚假信息和真实性的重要关注，刺激了众多深度造假检测算法的发展。同时，训练数据和野外视频数据之间存在显着差异，这可能会损害其实际效果。我们模拟数据损坏技术，并检查最先进的 Deepfake 检测算法在 FaceForensics++ 数据集损坏变体上的性能。虽然 Deepfake 检测模型对于与训练时间增强相一致的视频损坏具有鲁棒性，但我们发现它们仍然容易受到模拟视频质量下降的视频损坏的影响。事实上，在加蓬总统邦戈新年致辞视频这一颇具争议的案例中，算法可以自信地验证原始视频的真实性，并将高度损坏的视频变体判断为假视频。我们的工作为探索全球背景下的实用深度伪造检测开辟了技术和伦理途径。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度伪造检测算法在实际应用中因视频质量下降等数据损坏情况下的脆弱性，并通过模拟数据损坏技术验证了检测模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度伪造检测算法已取得进展，但训练数据与真实世界视频数据的差异可能导致其实际效果受限，需探索算法在全局实际场景中的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过模拟视频损坏技术，测试先进检测算法在FaceForensics++数据集及其损坏变体上的表现，并分析加蓬总统新年致辞视频的案例。
AI.result: 检测模型对训练时增强的损坏具有鲁棒性，但对模拟视频质量下降的损坏敏感；在高度损坏的加蓬总统视频案例中，模型错误判定为伪造。
AI.conclusion: 深度伪造检测在实际应用中面临技术挑战和伦理问题，需进一步提升算法对全局真实场景适应性的研究。

authors_text: Andrea Campagner,Davide Ciucci,Thierry Denœux
title: A Distributional Approach for Soft Clustering Comparison and Evaluation
title_zh: 软聚类比较和评估的分布式方法
comment: This is the extended version of article "A Distributional Approach for Soft Clustering Comparison and Evaluation", accepted at BELIEF 2022 (http://hebergement.universite-paris-saclay.fr/belief2022/). Please cite the proceedings version of the article
comments: This is the extended version of article "A Distributional Approach for Soft Clustering Comparison and Evaluation", accepted at BELIEF 2022 (http://hebergement.universite-paris-saclay.fr/belief2022/). Please cite the proceedings version of the article
abstract: The development of external evaluation criteria for soft clustering (SC) has received limited attention: existing methods do not provide a general approach to extend comparison measures to SC, and are unable to account for the uncertainty represented in the results of SC algorithms. In this article, we propose a general method to address these limitations, grounding on a novel interpretation of SC as distributions over hard clusterings, which we call \emph{distributional measures}. We provide an in-depth study of complexity- and metric-theoretic properties of the proposed approach, and we describe approximation techniques that can make the calculations tractable. Finally, we illustrate our approach through a simple but illustrative experiment.
summary: The development of external evaluation criteria for soft clustering (SC) has received limited attention: existing methods do not provide a general approach to extend comparison measures to SC, and are unable to account for the uncertainty represented in the results of SC algorithms. In this article, we propose a general method to address these limitations, grounding on a novel interpretation of SC as distributions over hard clusterings, which we call \emph{distributional measures}. We provide an in-depth study of complexity- and metric-theoretic properties of the proposed approach, and we describe approximation techniques that can make the calculations tractable. Finally, we illustrate our approach through a simple but illustrative experiment.
abstract_zh: 软聚类（SC）外部评估标准的发展受到的关注有限：现有方法没有提供将比较措施扩展到 SC 的通用方法，并且无法解释 SC 算法结果中所代表的不确定性。在本文中，我们提出了一种解决这些局限性的通用方法，该方法基于对 SC 作为硬聚类分布的新颖解释，我们称之为 \emph{分布度量}。我们对所提出的方法的复杂性和度量理论特性进行了深入研究，并描述了可以使计算易于处理的近似技术。最后，我们通过一个简单但具有说明性的实验来说明我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布的软聚类比较与评估方法，解决现有方法无法处理软聚类结果不确定性的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有软聚类评估方法缺乏通用扩展性，且无法有效表征聚类结果中的不确定性，需开发更合理的评估框架。
AI.method: 将软聚类解释为硬聚类的分布（分布度量），结合复杂度与度量理论分析其性质，并设计近似计算技术以保证可计算性。
AI.result: 通过简单实验验证了该方法的有效性，展示了分布度量在处理软聚类不确定性方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 分布度量方法为软聚类评估提供了理论基础与实用工具，未来可进一步优化计算效率并拓展应用场景。

authors_text: Qizhi Pei,Lijun Wu,Jinhua Zhu,Yingce Xia,Shufang Xie,Tao Qin,Haiguang Liu,Tie-Yan Liu,Rui Yan
title: SSM-DTA: Breaking the Barriers of Data Scarcity in Drug-Target Affinity Prediction
title_zh: SSM-DTA：打破药物靶标亲和力预测中数据稀缺的障碍
comment: Accepted by Briefings in Bioinformatics 2023
comments: Accepted by Briefings in Bioinformatics 2023
abstract: Accurate prediction of Drug-Target Affinity (DTA) is of vital importance in early-stage drug discovery, facilitating the identification of drugs that can effectively interact with specific targets and regulate their activities. While wet experiments remain the most reliable method, they are time-consuming and resource-intensive, resulting in limited data availability that poses challenges for deep learning approaches. Existing methods have primarily focused on developing techniques based on the available DTA data, without adequately addressing the data scarcity issue. To overcome this challenge, we present the SSM-DTA framework, which incorporates three simple yet highly effective strategies: (1) A multi-task training approach that combines DTA prediction with masked language modeling (MLM) using paired drug-target data. (2) A semi-supervised training method that leverages large-scale unpaired molecules and proteins to enhance drug and target representations. This approach differs from previous methods that only employed molecules or proteins in pre-training. (3) The integration of a lightweight cross-attention module to improve the interaction between drugs and targets, further enhancing prediction accuracy. Through extensive experiments on benchmark datasets such as BindingDB, DAVIS, and KIBA, we demonstrate the superior performance of our framework. Additionally, we conduct case studies on specific drug-target binding activities, virtual screening experiments, drug feature visualizations, and real-world applications, all of which showcase the significant potential of our work. In conclusion, our proposed SSM-DTA framework addresses the data limitation challenge in DTA prediction and yields promising results, paving the way for more efficient and accurate drug discovery processes. Our code is available at $\href{https://github.com/QizhiPei/SSM-DTA}{Github}$.
summary: Accurate prediction of Drug-Target Affinity (DTA) is of vital importance in early-stage drug discovery, facilitating the identification of drugs that can effectively interact with specific targets and regulate their activities. While wet experiments remain the most reliable method, they are time-consuming and resource-intensive, resulting in limited data availability that poses challenges for deep learning approaches. Existing methods have primarily focused on developing techniques based on the available DTA data, without adequately addressing the data scarcity issue. To overcome this challenge, we present the SSM-DTA framework, which incorporates three simple yet highly effective strategies: (1) A multi-task training approach that combines DTA prediction with masked language modeling (MLM) using paired drug-target data. (2) A semi-supervised training method that leverages large-scale unpaired molecules and proteins to enhance drug and target representations. This approach differs from previous methods that only employed molecules or proteins in pre-training. (3) The integration of a lightweight cross-attention module to improve the interaction between drugs and targets, further enhancing prediction accuracy. Through extensive experiments on benchmark datasets such as BindingDB, DAVIS, and KIBA, we demonstrate the superior performance of our framework. Additionally, we conduct case studies on specific drug-target binding activities, virtual screening experiments, drug feature visualizations, and real-world applications, all of which showcase the significant potential of our work. In conclusion, our proposed SSM-DTA framework addresses the data limitation challenge in DTA prediction and yields promising results, paving the way for more efficient and accurate drug discovery processes. Our code is available at $\href{https://github.com/QizhiPei/SSM-DTA}{Github}$.
abstract_zh: 准确预测药物靶点亲和力（DTA）对于早期药物发现至关重要，有助于识别能够有效与特定靶点相互作用并调节其活性的药物。虽然湿实验仍然是最可靠的方法，但它们非常耗时且资源密集，导致数据可用性有限，这给深度学习方法带来了挑战。现有方法主要侧重于基于可用 DTA 数据开发技术，而没有充分解决数据稀缺问题。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了 SSM-DTA 框架，其中包含三种简单但高效的策略：（1）一种多任务训练方法，将 DTA 预测与使用配对药物靶标数据的掩码语言建模（MLM）相结合。 （2）一种半监督训练方法，利用大规模不配对的分子和蛋白质来增强药物和靶标的表征。这种方法不同于以前仅在预训练中使用分子或蛋白质的方法。 （3）集成轻量级交叉注意力模块，改善药物与靶点之间的相互作用，进一步提高预测精度。通过在 BindingDB、DAVIS 和 KIBA 等基准数据集上进行大量实验，我们展示了我们框架的卓越性能。此外，我们还对特定药物靶点结合活性、虚拟筛选实验、药物特征可视化和实际应用进行案例研究，所有这些都展示了我们工作的巨大潜力。总之，我们提出的 SSM-DTA 框架解决了 DTA 预测中的数据限制挑战，并产生了有希望的结果，为更高效、更准确的药物发现过程铺平了道路。我们的代码可在 $\href{https://github.com/QizhiPei/SSM-DTA}{Github}$ 获取。
