search_text: SSM-DTA: Breaking the Barriers of Data Scarcity in Drug-Target Affinity Prediction SSM-DTA：打破药物靶标亲和力预测中数据稀缺的障碍 Accurate prediction of Drug-Target Affinity (DTA) is of vital importance in early-stage drug discovery, facilitating the identification of drugs that can effectively interact with specific targets and regulate their activities. While wet experiments remain the most reliable method, they are time-consuming and resource-intensive, resulting in limited data availability that poses challenges for deep learning approaches. Existing methods have primarily focused on developing techniques based on the available DTA data, without adequately addressing the data scarcity issue. To overcome this challenge, we present the SSM-DTA framework, which incorporates three simple yet highly effective strategies: (1) A multi-task training approach that combines DTA prediction with masked language modeling (MLM) using paired drug-target data. (2) A semi-supervised training method that leverages large-scale unpaired molecules and proteins to enhance drug and target representations. This approach differs from previous methods that only employed molecules or proteins in pre-training. (3) The integration of a lightweight cross-attention module to improve the interaction between drugs and targets, further enhancing prediction accuracy. Through extensive experiments on benchmark datasets such as BindingDB, DAVIS, and KIBA, we demonstrate the superior performance of our framework. Additionally, we conduct case studies on specific drug-target binding activities, virtual screening experiments, drug feature visualizations, and real-world applications, all of which showcase the significant potential of our work. In conclusion, our proposed SSM-DTA framework addresses the data limitation challenge in DTA prediction and yields promising results, paving the way for more efficient and accurate drug discovery processes. authors_text: Han Xiao,Ziwei Wang,Zheng Zhu,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: Shapley-NAS: Discovering Operation Contribution for Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: Shapley-NAS：发现神经架构搜索的操作贡献
comment: Accepted to CVPR2022
comments: Accepted to CVPR2022
abstract: In this paper, we propose a Shapley value based method to evaluate operation contribution (Shapley-NAS) for neural architecture search. Differentiable architecture search (DARTS) acquires the optimal architectures by optimizing the architecture parameters with gradient descent, which significantly reduces the search cost. However, the magnitude of architecture parameters updated by gradient descent fails to reveal the actual operation importance to the task performance and therefore harms the effectiveness of obtained architectures. By contrast, we propose to evaluate the direct influence of operations on validation accuracy. To deal with the complex relationships between supernet components, we leverage Shapley value to quantify their marginal contributions by considering all possible combinations. Specifically, we iteratively optimize the supernet weights and update the architecture parameters by evaluating operation contributions via Shapley value, so that the optimal architectures are derived by selecting the operations that contribute significantly to the tasks. Since the exact computation of Shapley value is NP-hard, the Monte-Carlo sampling based algorithm with early truncation is employed for efficient approximation, and the momentum update mechanism is adopted to alleviate fluctuation of the sampling process. Extensive experiments on various datasets and various search spaces show that our Shapley-NAS outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a considerable margin with light search cost. The code is available at https://github.com/Euphoria16/Shapley-NAS.git
summary: In this paper, we propose a Shapley value based method to evaluate operation contribution (Shapley-NAS) for neural architecture search. Differentiable architecture search (DARTS) acquires the optimal architectures by optimizing the architecture parameters with gradient descent, which significantly reduces the search cost. However, the magnitude of architecture parameters updated by gradient descent fails to reveal the actual operation importance to the task performance and therefore harms the effectiveness of obtained architectures. By contrast, we propose to evaluate the direct influence of operations on validation accuracy. To deal with the complex relationships between supernet components, we leverage Shapley value to quantify their marginal contributions by considering all possible combinations. Specifically, we iteratively optimize the supernet weights and update the architecture parameters by evaluating operation contributions via Shapley value, so that the optimal architectures are derived by selecting the operations that contribute significantly to the tasks. Since the exact computation of Shapley value is NP-hard, the Monte-Carlo sampling based algorithm with early truncation is employed for efficient approximation, and the momentum update mechanism is adopted to alleviate fluctuation of the sampling process. Extensive experiments on various datasets and various search spaces show that our Shapley-NAS outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a considerable margin with light search cost. The code is available at https://github.com/Euphoria16/Shapley-NAS.git
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Shapley 值的方法来评估神经架构搜索的操作贡献（Shapley-NAS）。可微架构搜索（DARTS）通过梯度下降优化架构参数来获取最优架构，显着降低了搜索成本。然而，梯度下降更新的架构参数的大小无法揭示实际操作对任务性能的重要性，因此损害了所获得架构的有效性。相比之下，我们建议评估操作对验证准确性的直接影响。为了处理超网组件之间的复杂关系，我们利用 Shapley 值通过考虑所有可能的组合来量化它们的边际贡献。具体来说，我们通过 Shapley 值评估操作贡献来迭代优化超网权重并更新架构参数，以便通过选择对任务贡献显着的操作来导出最佳架构。由于Shapley值的精确计算是NP困难的，因此采用基于早期截断的蒙特卡罗采样算法进行高效逼近，并采用动量更新机制来减轻采样过程的波动。对各种数据集和各种搜索空间的广泛实验表明，我们的 Shapley-NAS 在搜索成本较低的情况下远远优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/Euphoria16/Shapley-NAS.git 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Shapley值的Shapley-NAS方法，通过量化操作对验证准确率的边际贡献来改进神经网络架构搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有DARTS方法依赖梯度下降优化架构参数，但参数幅度无法准确反映操作对任务性能的真实贡献，导致搜索效果受限。
AI.method: 利用Shapley值衡量操作在所有可能组合中的边际贡献，结合蒙特卡洛采样与早停机制进行高效近似，并采用动量更新稳定采样过程。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和搜索空间实验中，Shapley-NAS在搜索效率和性能上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过直接评估操作贡献提升了NAS效果，为架构搜索提供了更合理的评估指标。

search_text: Shapley-NAS: Discovering Operation Contribution for Neural Architecture Search Shapley-NAS：发现神经架构搜索的操作贡献 In this paper, we propose a Shapley value based method to evaluate operation contribution (Shapley-NAS) for neural architecture search. Differentiable architecture search (DARTS) acquires the optimal architectures by optimizing the architecture parameters with gradient descent, which significantly reduces the search cost. However, the magnitude of architecture parameters updated by gradient descent fails to reveal the actual operation importance to the task performance and therefore harms the effectiveness of obtained architectures. By contrast, we propose to evaluate the direct influence of operations on validation accuracy. To deal with the complex relationships between supernet components, we leverage Shapley value to quantify their marginal contributions by considering all possible combinations. Specifically, we iteratively optimize the supernet weights and update the architecture parameters by evaluating operation contributions via Shapley value, so that the optimal architectures are derived by selecting the operations that contribute significantly to the tasks. Since the exact computation of Shapley value is NP-hard, the Monte-Carlo sampling based algorithm with early truncation is employed for efficient approximation, and the momentum update mechanism is adopted to alleviate fluctuation of the sampling process. Extensive experiments on various datasets and various search spaces show that our Shapley-NAS outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a considerable margin with light search cost. authors_text: Guile Wu,Chao Zhang,Stephan Liwicki
title: Self-Supervised Consistent Quantization for Fully Unsupervised Image Retrieval
title_zh: 用于完全无监督图像检索的自监督一致量化
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures
comments: 10 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Unsupervised image retrieval aims to learn an efficient retrieval system without expensive data annotations, but most existing methods rely heavily on handcrafted feature descriptors or pre-trained feature extractors. To minimize human supervision, recent advance proposes deep fully unsupervised image retrieval aiming at training a deep model from scratch to jointly optimize visual features and quantization codes. However, existing approach mainly focuses on instance contrastive learning without considering underlying semantic structure information, resulting in sub-optimal performance. In this work, we propose a novel self-supervised consistent quantization approach to deep fully unsupervised image retrieval, which consists of part consistent quantization and global consistent quantization. In part consistent quantization, we devise part neighbor semantic consistency learning with codeword diversity regularization. This allows to discover underlying neighbor structure information of sub-quantized representations as self-supervision. In global consistent quantization, we employ contrastive learning for both embedding and quantized representations and fuses these representations for consistent contrastive regularization between instances. This can make up for the loss of useful representation information during quantization and regularize consistency between instances. With a unified learning objective of part and global consistent quantization, our approach exploits richer self-supervision cues to facilitate model learning. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show the superiority of our approach over the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Unsupervised image retrieval aims to learn an efficient retrieval system without expensive data annotations, but most existing methods rely heavily on handcrafted feature descriptors or pre-trained feature extractors. To minimize human supervision, recent advance proposes deep fully unsupervised image retrieval aiming at training a deep model from scratch to jointly optimize visual features and quantization codes. However, existing approach mainly focuses on instance contrastive learning without considering underlying semantic structure information, resulting in sub-optimal performance. In this work, we propose a novel self-supervised consistent quantization approach to deep fully unsupervised image retrieval, which consists of part consistent quantization and global consistent quantization. In part consistent quantization, we devise part neighbor semantic consistency learning with codeword diversity regularization. This allows to discover underlying neighbor structure information of sub-quantized representations as self-supervision. In global consistent quantization, we employ contrastive learning for both embedding and quantized representations and fuses these representations for consistent contrastive regularization between instances. This can make up for the loss of useful representation information during quantization and regularize consistency between instances. With a unified learning objective of part and global consistent quantization, our approach exploits richer self-supervision cues to facilitate model learning. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show the superiority of our approach over the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 无监督图像检索旨在学习高效的检索系统，而无需昂贵的数据注释，但大多数现有方法严重依赖于手工制作的特征描述符或预先训练的特征提取器。为了最大限度地减少人类监督，最近的进展提出了深度完全无监督图像检索，旨在从头开始训练深度模型以联合优化视觉特征和量化代码。然而，现有方法主要关注实例对比学习，没有考虑底层语义结构信息，导致性能次优。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督一致量化方法来进行深度完全无监督图像检索，其中包括部分一致量化和全局一致量化。在部分一致量化中，我们设计了具有码字多样性正则化的部分邻居语义一致性学习。这允许发现子量化表示的底层邻居结构信息作为自监督。在全局一致量化中，我们对嵌入和量化表示采用对比学习，并融合这些表示以实现实例之间的一致对比正则化。这可以弥补量化过程中有用表示信息的损失，并规范实例之间的一致性。通过部分和全局一致量化的统一学习目标，我们的方法利用更丰富的自我监督线索来促进模型学习。对三个基准数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法相对于最先进的方法具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督一致量化方法，用于完全无监督的图像检索，通过联合优化视觉特征和量化码提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督图像检索方法依赖手工特征或预训练模型，难以充分利用语义结构信息，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 设计部分一致量化（子量化表示的邻居语义一致性学习）和全局一致量化（嵌入与量化表示的对比学习融合），通过统一目标联合优化特征与量化码。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘子量化表示的语义结构信息和对比学习的联合优化，自监督一致量化能有效提升无监督图像检索性能。

search_text: Self-Supervised Consistent Quantization for Fully Unsupervised Image Retrieval 用于完全无监督图像检索的自监督一致量化 Unsupervised image retrieval aims to learn an efficient retrieval system without expensive data annotations, but most existing methods rely heavily on handcrafted feature descriptors or pre-trained feature extractors. To minimize human supervision, recent advance proposes deep fully unsupervised image retrieval aiming at training a deep model from scratch to jointly optimize visual features and quantization codes. However, existing approach mainly focuses on instance contrastive learning without considering underlying semantic structure information, resulting in sub-optimal performance. In this work, we propose a novel self-supervised consistent quantization approach to deep fully unsupervised image retrieval, which consists of part consistent quantization and global consistent quantization. In part consistent quantization, we devise part neighbor semantic consistency learning with codeword diversity regularization. This allows to discover underlying neighbor structure information of sub-quantized representations as self-supervision. In global consistent quantization, we employ contrastive learning for both embedding and quantized representations and fuses these representations for consistent contrastive regularization between instances. This can make up for the loss of useful representation information during quantization and regularize consistency between instances. With a unified learning objective of part and global consistent quantization, our approach exploits richer self-supervision cues to facilitate model learning. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show the superiority of our approach over the state-of-the-art methods. 无监督图像检索旨在学习高效的检索系统，而无需昂贵的数据注释，但大多数现有方法严重依赖于手工制作的特征描述符或预先训练的特征提取器。为了最大限度地减少人类监督，最近的进展提出了深度完全无监督图像检索，旨在从头开始训练深度模型以联合优化视觉特征和量化代码。然而，现有方法主要关注实例对比学习，没有考虑底层语义结构信息，导致性能次优。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督一致量化方法来进行深度完全无监督图像检索，其中包括部分一致量化和全局一致量化。在部分一致量化中，我们设计了具有码字多样性正则化的部分邻居语义一致性学习。这允许发现子量化表示的底层邻居结构信息作为自监督。在全局一致量化中，我们对嵌入和量化表示采用对比学习，并融合这些表示以实现实例之间的一致对比正则化。这可以弥补量化过程中有用表示信息的损失，并规范实例之间的一致性。通过部分和全局一致量化的统一学习目标，我们的方法利用更丰富的自我监督线索来促进模型学习。对三个基准数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法相对于最先进的方法具有优越性。 本文提出一种自监督一致量化方法，用于完全无监督的图像检索，通过联合优化视觉特征和量化码提升检索性能。 Guile Wu,Chao Zhang,Stephan Liwicki cs.CV

authors_text: Yicheng Xiao,Junpeng Zhang
title: Knowledge Distillation for Oriented Object Detection on Aerial Images
title_zh: 航空图像定向目标检测的知识蒸馏
abstract: Deep convolutional neural network with increased number of parameters has achieved improved precision in task of object detection on natural images, where objects of interests are annotated with horizontal boundary boxes. On aerial images captured from the bird-view perspective, these improvements on model architecture and deeper convolutional layers can also boost the performance on oriented object detection task. However, it is hard to directly apply those state-of-the-art object detectors on the devices with limited computation resources, which necessitates lightweight models through model compression. In order to address this issue, we present a model compression method for rotated object detection on aerial images by knowledge distillation, namely KD-RNet. With a well-trained teacher oriented object detector with a large number of parameters, the obtained object category and location information are both transferred to a compact student network in KD-RNet by collaborative training strategy. Transferring the category information is achieved by knowledge distillation on predicted probability distribution, and a soft regression loss is adopted for handling displacement in location information transfer. The experimental result on a large-scale aerial object detection dataset (DOTA) demonstrates that the proposed KD-RNet model can achieve improved mean-average precision (mAP) with reduced number of parameters, at the same time, KD-RNet boost the performance on providing high quality detections with higher overlap with groundtruth annotations.
summary: Deep convolutional neural network with increased number of parameters has achieved improved precision in task of object detection on natural images, where objects of interests are annotated with horizontal boundary boxes. On aerial images captured from the bird-view perspective, these improvements on model architecture and deeper convolutional layers can also boost the performance on oriented object detection task. However, it is hard to directly apply those state-of-the-art object detectors on the devices with limited computation resources, which necessitates lightweight models through model compression. In order to address this issue, we present a model compression method for rotated object detection on aerial images by knowledge distillation, namely KD-RNet. With a well-trained teacher oriented object detector with a large number of parameters, the obtained object category and location information are both transferred to a compact student network in KD-RNet by collaborative training strategy. Transferring the category information is achieved by knowledge distillation on predicted probability distribution, and a soft regression loss is adopted for handling displacement in location information transfer. The experimental result on a large-scale aerial object detection dataset (DOTA) demonstrates that the proposed KD-RNet model can achieve improved mean-average precision (mAP) with reduced number of parameters, at the same time, KD-RNet boost the performance on providing high quality detections with higher overlap with groundtruth annotations.
abstract_zh: 参数数量增加的深度卷积神经网络在自然图像上的对象检测任务中实现了更高的精度，其中感兴趣的对象用水平边界框注释。在从鸟瞰角度捕获的航空图像上，模型架构和更深的卷积层的这些改进也可以提高定向目标检测任务的性能。然而，很难在计算资源有限的设备上直接应用这些最先进的目标检测器，这需要通过模型压缩来实现轻量级模型。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种通过知识蒸馏对航空图像进行旋转目标检测的模型压缩方法，即 KD-RNet。通过训练有素、面向教师的具有大量参数的目标检测器，获得的目标类别和位置信息通过协作训练策略都转移到 KD-RNet 中的紧凑学生网络中。通过对预测概率分布的知识蒸馏来实现类别信息的传递，并采用软回归损失来处理位置信息传递中的位移。在大规模航空目标检测数据集（DOTA）上的实验结果表明，所提出的 KD-RNet 模型可以通过减少参数数量来提高平均精度（mAP），同时 KD-RNet 提高了提供高质量检测的性能，与真实注释具有更高的重叠度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KD-RNet方法，通过知识蒸馏实现航拍图像定向目标检测的模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有高性能目标检测模型参数量大，难以部署在计算资源受限设备中，需通过模型压缩技术实现轻量化。
AI.method: 设计知识蒸馏框架KD-RNet，利用教师模型的类别概率分布和软回归损失传递定位信息至学生网络。
AI.result: 在DOTA数据集上实验表明，KD-RNet在参数量减少的情况下提升mAP指标，并提高检测结果与真实标注的重合度。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏有效提升航拍图像定向检测的模型压缩效果，为实际部署提供可行方案。

authors_text: Jonathan Mukiibi,Andrew Katumba,Joyce Nakatumba-Nabende,Ali Hussein,Josh Meyer
title: The Makerere Radio Speech Corpus: A Luganda Radio Corpus for Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 马凯雷雷无线电语音语料库：用于自动语音识别的卢干达无线电语料库
comment: Proceedings of the 13th Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC 2022), pages 1945 to 1954 Marseille, 20 to 25 June 2022
comments: Proceedings of the 13th Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC 2022), pages 1945 to 1954 Marseille, 20 to 25 June 2022
abstract: Building a usable radio monitoring automatic speech recognition (ASR) system is a challenging task for under-resourced languages and yet this is paramount in societies where radio is the main medium of public communication and discussions. Initial efforts by the United Nations in Uganda have proved how understanding the perceptions of rural people who are excluded from social media is important in national planning. However, these efforts are being challenged by the absence of transcribed speech datasets. In this paper, The Makerere Artificial Intelligence research lab releases a Luganda radio speech corpus of 155 hours. To our knowledge, this is the first publicly available radio dataset in sub-Saharan Africa. The paper describes the development of the voice corpus and presents baseline Luganda ASR performance results using Coqui STT toolkit, an open source speech recognition toolkit.
summary: Building a usable radio monitoring automatic speech recognition (ASR) system is a challenging task for under-resourced languages and yet this is paramount in societies where radio is the main medium of public communication and discussions. Initial efforts by the United Nations in Uganda have proved how understanding the perceptions of rural people who are excluded from social media is important in national planning. However, these efforts are being challenged by the absence of transcribed speech datasets. In this paper, The Makerere Artificial Intelligence research lab releases a Luganda radio speech corpus of 155 hours. To our knowledge, this is the first publicly available radio dataset in sub-Saharan Africa. The paper describes the development of the voice corpus and presents baseline Luganda ASR performance results using Coqui STT toolkit, an open source speech recognition toolkit.
abstract_zh: 对于资源匮乏的语言来说，构建可用的无线电监测自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统是一项具有挑战性的任务，但对于无线电作为公共交流和讨论的主要媒介的社会来说，这一点至关重要。联合国在乌干达的初步努力证明，了解被排除在社交媒体之外的农村人口的看法对于国家规划非常重要。然而，这些努力因缺乏转录的语音数据集而受到挑战。在本文中，马凯雷雷人工智能研究实验室发布了155小时的卢干达语广播语音语料库。据我们所知，这是撒哈拉以南非洲地区第一个公开可用的无线电数据集。该论文描述了语音语料库的开发，并展示了使用 Coqui STT 工具包（一种开源语音识别工具包）的基线 Luganda ASR 性能结果。

AI.tldr: 构建一个用于自动语音识别的卢干达语广播语料库，并评估其基线性能。
AI.motivation: 为资源匮乏语言（如卢干达语）开发ASR系统，以支持依赖广播的地区的信息获取和国家规划，但缺乏转录数据集是主要挑战。
AI.method: 开发了一个包含155小时卢干达语广播的语音语料库，并使用Coqui STT开源工具包进行基线ASR性能评估。
AI.result: 使用Coqui STT实现了卢干达语ASR的基线性能，证明了该语料库的可用性。
AI.conclusion: 该语料库是撒哈拉以南非洲首个公开的卢干达语广播数据集，为低资源语言的ASR研究提供了重要基础。

ai_content_json.method: 开发了一个包含155小时卢干达语广播的语音语料库，并使用Coqui STT开源工具包进行基线ASR性能评估。
ai_content_json.result: 使用Coqui STT实现了卢干达语ASR的基线性能，证明了该语料库的可用性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该语料库是撒哈拉以南非洲首个公开的卢干达语广播数据集，为低资源语言的ASR研究提供了重要基础。

search_text: The Makerere Radio Speech Corpus: A Luganda Radio Corpus for Automatic Speech Recognition 马凯雷雷无线电语音语料库：用于自动语音识别的卢干达无线电语料库 Building a usable radio monitoring automatic speech recognition (ASR) system is a challenging task for under-resourced languages and yet this is paramount in societies where radio is the main medium of public communication and discussions. Initial efforts by the United Nations in Uganda have proved how understanding the perceptions of rural people who are excluded from social media is important in national planning. However, these efforts are being challenged by the absence of transcribed speech datasets. In this paper, The Makerere Artificial Intelligence research lab releases a Luganda radio speech corpus of 155 hours. To our knowledge, this is the first publicly available radio dataset in sub-Saharan Africa. The paper describes the development of the voice corpus and presents baseline Luganda ASR performance results using Coqui STT toolkit, an open source speech recognition toolkit. 对于资源匮乏的语言来说，构建可用的无线电监测自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统是一项具有挑战性的任务，但对于无线电作为公共交流和讨论的主要媒介的社会来说，这一点至关重要。联合国在乌干达的初步努力证明，了解被排除在社交媒体之外的农村人口的看法对于国家规划非常重要。然而，这些努力因缺乏转录的语音数据集而受到挑战。在本文中，马凯雷雷人工智能研究实验室发布了155小时的卢干达语广播语音语料库。据我们所知，这是撒哈拉以南非洲地区第一个公开可用的无线电数据集。该论文描述了语音语料库的开发，并展示了使用 Coqui STT 工具包（一种开源语音识别工具包）的基线 Luganda ASR 性能结果。 构建一个用于自动语音识别的卢干达语广播语料库，并评估其基线性能。 Jonathan Mukiibi,Andrew Katumba,Joyce Nakatumba-Nabende,Ali Hussein,Josh Meyer cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Han Zhu,Gaofeng Cheng,Jindong Wang,Wenxin Hou,Pengyuan Zhang,Yonghong Yan
title: Boosting Cross-Domain Speech Recognition with Self-Supervision
title_zh: 通过自我监督促进跨域语音识别
comment: Accepted by IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech and Language Processing (TASLP), 2023
comments: Accepted by IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech and Language Processing (TASLP), 2023
abstract: The cross-domain performance of automatic speech recognition (ASR) could be severely hampered due to the mismatch between training and testing distributions. Since the target domain usually lacks labeled data, and domain shifts exist at acoustic and linguistic levels, it is challenging to perform unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) for ASR. Previous work has shown that self-supervised learning (SSL) or pseudo-labeling (PL) is effective in UDA by exploiting the self-supervisions of unlabeled data. However, these self-supervisions also face performance degradation in mismatched domain distributions, which previous work fails to address. This work presents a systematic UDA framework to fully utilize the unlabeled data with self-supervision in the pre-training and fine-tuning paradigm. On the one hand, we apply continued pre-training and data replay techniques to mitigate the domain mismatch of the SSL pre-trained model. On the other hand, we propose a domain-adaptive fine-tuning approach based on the PL technique with three unique modifications: Firstly, we design a dual-branch PL method to decrease the sensitivity to the erroneous pseudo-labels; Secondly, we devise an uncertainty-aware confidence filtering strategy to improve pseudo-label correctness; Thirdly, we introduce a two-step PL approach to incorporate target domain linguistic knowledge, thus generating more accurate target domain pseudo-labels. Experimental results on various cross-domain scenarios demonstrate that the proposed approach effectively boosts the cross-domain performance and significantly outperforms previous approaches.
summary: The cross-domain performance of automatic speech recognition (ASR) could be severely hampered due to the mismatch between training and testing distributions. Since the target domain usually lacks labeled data, and domain shifts exist at acoustic and linguistic levels, it is challenging to perform unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) for ASR. Previous work has shown that self-supervised learning (SSL) or pseudo-labeling (PL) is effective in UDA by exploiting the self-supervisions of unlabeled data. However, these self-supervisions also face performance degradation in mismatched domain distributions, which previous work fails to address. This work presents a systematic UDA framework to fully utilize the unlabeled data with self-supervision in the pre-training and fine-tuning paradigm. On the one hand, we apply continued pre-training and data replay techniques to mitigate the domain mismatch of the SSL pre-trained model. On the other hand, we propose a domain-adaptive fine-tuning approach based on the PL technique with three unique modifications: Firstly, we design a dual-branch PL method to decrease the sensitivity to the erroneous pseudo-labels; Secondly, we devise an uncertainty-aware confidence filtering strategy to improve pseudo-label correctness; Thirdly, we introduce a two-step PL approach to incorporate target domain linguistic knowledge, thus generating more accurate target domain pseudo-labels. Experimental results on various cross-domain scenarios demonstrate that the proposed approach effectively boosts the cross-domain performance and significantly outperforms previous approaches.
abstract_zh: 由于训练和测试分布之间的不匹配，自动语音识别（ASR）的跨域性能可能会受到严重阻碍。由于目标域通常缺乏标记数据，并且声学和语言层面存在域转移，因此对 ASR 执行无监督域适应 (UDA) 具有挑战性。之前的工作表明，通过利用未标记数据的自我监督，自我监督学习（SSL）或伪标签（PL）在 UDA 中是有效的。然而，这些自我监督还面临着不匹配的域分布中的性能下降，这是以前的工作未能解决的问题。这项工作提出了一个系统的 UDA 框架，以在预训练和微调范式中充分利用具有自我监督功能的未标记数据。一方面，我们应用持续的预训练和数据重放技术来减轻 SSL 预训练模型的域不匹配。另一方面，我们提出了一种基于 PL 技术的域自适应微调方法，并进行了三个独特的修改：首先，我们设计了一种双分支 PL 方法来降低对错误伪标签的敏感性；其次，我们设计了一种不确定性感知置信度过滤策略来提高伪标签的正确性；第三，我们引入了一种两步 PL 方法来合并目标领域语言知识，从而生成更准确的目标领域伪标签。各种跨域场景的实验结果表明，所提出的方法有效地提高了跨域性能，并显着优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的跨领域语音识别方法，通过改进伪标签技术和领域自适应策略提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 跨领域语音识别因训练与测试分布不匹配导致性能下降，传统无监督领域自适应方法在领域偏移场景下效果有限，需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 框架包含两部分：1）通过持续预训练和数据回放缓解SSL模型的领域偏移；2）改进伪标签技术，包括双分支结构降低错误标签敏感度、不确定性置信度过滤及两阶段伪标签生成以融入目标领域语言知识。
AI.result: 在多种跨领域场景实验中，该方法显著优于现有技术，有效提升模型跨领域识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的系统化框架通过自监督与伪标签优化有效解决跨领域ASR问题，为无监督领域自适应提供新思路。

authors_text: Chentian Jiang,Christopher G. Lucas
title: Actively learning to learn causal relationships
title_zh: 主动学习，了解因果关系
abstract: How do people actively learn to learn? That is, how and when do people choose actions that facilitate long-term learning and choosing future actions that are more informative? We explore these questions in the domain of active causal learning. We propose a hierarchical Bayesian model that goes beyond past models by predicting that people pursue information not only about the causal relationship at hand but also about causal overhypotheses$\unicode{x2014}$abstract beliefs about causal relationships that span multiple situations and constrain how we learn the specifics in each situation. In two active "blicket detector" experiments with 14 between-subjects manipulations, our model was supported by both qualitative trends in participant behavior and an individual-differences-based model comparison. Our results suggest when there are abstract similarities across active causal learning problems, people readily learn and transfer overhypotheses about these similarities. Moreover, people exploit these overhypotheses to facilitate long-term active learning.
summary: How do people actively learn to learn? That is, how and when do people choose actions that facilitate long-term learning and choosing future actions that are more informative? We explore these questions in the domain of active causal learning. We propose a hierarchical Bayesian model that goes beyond past models by predicting that people pursue information not only about the causal relationship at hand but also about causal overhypotheses$\unicode{x2014}$abstract beliefs about causal relationships that span multiple situations and constrain how we learn the specifics in each situation. In two active "blicket detector" experiments with 14 between-subjects manipulations, our model was supported by both qualitative trends in participant behavior and an individual-differences-based model comparison. Our results suggest when there are abstract similarities across active causal learning problems, people readily learn and transfer overhypotheses about these similarities. Moreover, people exploit these overhypotheses to facilitate long-term active learning.
abstract_zh: 人们如何主动学习？也就是说，人们如何以及何时选择有利于长期学习的行动并选择信息更丰富的未来行动？我们在主动因果学习领域探索这些问题。我们提出了一种超越过去模型的分层贝叶斯模型，它预测人们不仅追求有关当前因果关系的信息，而且追求有关因果过度假设$\unicode{x2014}$关于跨越多种情况的因果关系的抽象信念，并限制我们如何了解每种情况的具体情况。在两个活跃的“blicket detector”实验中，进行了 14 次受试者间操作，我们的模型得到了参与者行为的定性趋势和基于个体差异的模型比较的支持。我们的结果表明，当主动因果学习问题之间存在抽象相似性时，人们很容易学习并转移关于这些相似性的过度假设。此外，人们利用这些过度假设来促进长期主动学习。

AI.tldr: 本文研究人类如何主动学习因果关系，并提出一个分层贝叶斯模型来解释人们如何通过抽象假设促进长期学习。
AI.motivation: 现有模型未能解释人类如何利用跨情境的抽象因果假设来指导学习，因此作者旨在探讨人们如何主动选择信息以优化长期学习。
AI.method: 提出分层贝叶斯模型，通过两个主动‘blicket探测器’实验（含14种被试间操作）验证模型，结合行为趋势与个体差异模型比较分析。
AI.result: 模型得到参与者行为趋势和个体差异模型比较的支持，表明人们能学习并转移跨情境的抽象假设，进而促进长期主动学习。
AI.conclusion: 当存在抽象因果相似性时，人类能有效学习并利用这些‘超假设’优化主动学习策略，提升学习效率。

In two active "blicket detector" experiments with 14 between-subjects manipulations, our model was supported by both qualitative trends in participant behavior and an individual-differences-based model comparison. Our results suggest when there are abstract similarities across active causal learning problems, people readily learn and transfer overhypotheses about these similarities. Moreover, people exploit these overhypotheses to facilitate long-term active learning. 人们如何主动学习？也就是说，人们如何以及何时选择有利于长期学习的行动并选择信息更丰富的未来行动？我们在主动因果学习领域探索这些问题。我们提出了一种超越过去模型的分层贝叶斯模型，它预测人们不仅追求有关当前因果关系的信息，而且追求有关因果过度假设$\unicode{x2014}$关于跨越多种情况的因果关系的抽象信念，并限制我们如何了解每种情况的具体情况。在两个活跃的“blicket detector”实验中，进行了 14 次受试者间操作，我们的模型得到了参与者行为的定性趋势和基于个体差异的模型比较的支持。我们的结果表明，当主动因果学习问题之间存在抽象相似性时，人们很容易学习并转移关于这些相似性的过度假设。此外，人们利用这些过度假设来促进长期主动学习。 本文研究人类如何主动学习因果关系，并提出一个分层贝叶斯模型来解释人们如何通过抽象假设促进长期学习。 Chentian Jiang,Christopher G. Lucas cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhengxia Zou,Rusheng Zhang,Shengyin Shen,Gaurav Pandey,Punarjay Chakravarty,Armin Parchami,Henry X. Liu
title: Real-time Full-stack Traffic Scene Perception for Autonomous Driving with Roadside Cameras
title_zh: 路边摄像头自动驾驶实时全栈交通场景感知
comment: This paper is accepted and presented in ICRA 2022
comments: This paper is accepted and presented in ICRA 2022
abstract: We propose a novel and pragmatic framework for traffic scene perception with roadside cameras. The proposed framework covers a full-stack of roadside perception pipeline for infrastructure-assisted autonomous driving, including object detection, object localization, object tracking, and multi-camera information fusion. Unlike previous vision-based perception frameworks rely upon depth offset or 3D annotation at training, we adopt a modular decoupling design and introduce a landmark-based 3D localization method, where the detection and localization can be well decoupled so that the model can be easily trained based on only 2D annotations. The proposed framework applies to either optical or thermal cameras with pinhole or fish-eye lenses. Our framework is deployed at a two-lane roundabout located at Ellsworth Rd. and State St., Ann Arbor, MI, USA, providing 7x24 real-time traffic flow monitoring and high-precision vehicle trajectory extraction. The whole system runs efficiently on a low-power edge computing device with all-component end-to-end delay of less than 20ms.
summary: We propose a novel and pragmatic framework for traffic scene perception with roadside cameras. The proposed framework covers a full-stack of roadside perception pipeline for infrastructure-assisted autonomous driving, including object detection, object localization, object tracking, and multi-camera information fusion. Unlike previous vision-based perception frameworks rely upon depth offset or 3D annotation at training, we adopt a modular decoupling design and introduce a landmark-based 3D localization method, where the detection and localization can be well decoupled so that the model can be easily trained based on only 2D annotations. The proposed framework applies to either optical or thermal cameras with pinhole or fish-eye lenses. Our framework is deployed at a two-lane roundabout located at Ellsworth Rd. and State St., Ann Arbor, MI, USA, providing 7x24 real-time traffic flow monitoring and high-precision vehicle trajectory extraction. The whole system runs efficiently on a low-power edge computing device with all-component end-to-end delay of less than 20ms.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖实用的路边摄像头交通场景感知框架。所提出的框架涵盖了基础设施辅助自动驾驶的全栈路边感知管道，包括物体检测、物体定位、物体跟踪和多摄像头信息融合。与之前基于视觉的感知框架在训练时依赖深度偏移或3D注释不同，我们采用模块化解耦设计，并引入基于地标的3D定位方法，其中检测和定位可以很好地解耦，从而可以仅基于2D注释轻松训练模型。所提出的框架适用于带有针孔或鱼眼镜头的光学或热感相机。我们的框架部署在位于 Ellsworth 路的一个双车道环岛。以及美国密歇根州安阿伯市State St.，提供7x24实时交通流量监控和高精度车辆轨迹提取。整个系统在低功耗边缘计算设备上高效运行，全组件端到端延迟小于20ms。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于路边摄像头的实时全栈交通场景感知框架，用于基础设施辅助的自动驾驶系统，涵盖目标检测、定位、跟踪及多摄像头信息融合。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉感知框架依赖深度信息或3D标注，限制了实际应用。本文旨在通过模块化设计和基于路标的3D定位方法，仅使用2D标注实现高效训练与部署。
AI.method: 采用模块化解耦架构，结合基于路标的3D定位技术，支持光学或热成像摄像头及针孔/鱼眼镜头，通过端到端低延迟处理实现多摄像头数据融合。
AI.result: 系统部署于美国安娜堡两车道环岛，实现7×24小时实时交通监测与高精度轨迹提取，全栈延迟低于20ms，可在低功耗边缘设备上高效运行。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过2D标注与模块化设计解决了传统方法依赖3D数据的局限，为基础设施辅助自动驾驶提供了高效、实用的实时感知解决方案。

authors_text: Marin Scalbert,Maria Vakalopoulou,Florent Couzinié-Devy
title: Test-time image-to-image translation ensembling improves out-of-distribution generalization in histopathology
title_zh: 测试时图像到图像转换集成改善了组织病理学中的分布外泛化
comment: Accepted at MICCAI2022 Conference
comments: Accepted at MICCAI2022 Conference
abstract: Histopathology whole slide images (WSIs) can reveal significant inter-hospital variability such as illumination, color or optical artifacts. These variations, caused by the use of different scanning protocols across medical centers (staining, scanner), can strongly harm algorithms generalization on unseen protocols. This motivates development of new methods to limit such drop of performances. In this paper, to enhance robustness on unseen target protocols, we propose a new test-time data augmentation based on multi domain image-to-image translation. It allows to project images from unseen protocol into each source domain before classifying them and ensembling the predictions. This test-time augmentation method results in a significant boost of performances for domain generalization. To demonstrate its effectiveness, our method has been evaluated on 2 different histopathology tasks where it outperforms conventional domain generalization, standard H&E specific color augmentation/normalization and standard test-time augmentation techniques. Our code is publicly available at https://gitlab.com/vitadx/articles/test-time-i2i-translation-ensembling.
summary: Histopathology whole slide images (WSIs) can reveal significant inter-hospital variability such as illumination, color or optical artifacts. These variations, caused by the use of different scanning protocols across medical centers (staining, scanner), can strongly harm algorithms generalization on unseen protocols. This motivates development of new methods to limit such drop of performances. In this paper, to enhance robustness on unseen target protocols, we propose a new test-time data augmentation based on multi domain image-to-image translation. It allows to project images from unseen protocol into each source domain before classifying them and ensembling the predictions. This test-time augmentation method results in a significant boost of performances for domain generalization. To demonstrate its effectiveness, our method has been evaluated on 2 different histopathology tasks where it outperforms conventional domain generalization, standard H&E specific color augmentation/normalization and standard test-time augmentation techniques. Our code is publicly available at https://gitlab.com/vitadx/articles/test-time-i2i-translation-ensembling.
abstract_zh: 组织病理学全切片图像 (WSI) 可以揭示显着的医院间差异，例如照明、颜色或光学伪影。这些变化是由医疗中心使用不同的扫描协议（染色、扫描仪）引起的，可能会严重损害算法对未知协议的泛化。这促使人们开发新方法来限制这种性能下降。在本文中，为了增强对未见过的目标协议的鲁棒性，我们提出了一种基于多域图像到图像转换的新测试时数据增强。它允许将来自看不见的协议的图像投影到每个源域中，然后对它们进行分类并组合预测。这种测试时间增强方法可以显着提高领域泛化的性能。为了证明其有效性，我们的方法在 2 种不同的组织病理学任务上进行了评估，其性能优于传统的域概括、标准 H&E 特定颜色增强/标准化和标准测试时间增强技术。我们的代码可在 https://gitlab.com/vitadx/articles/test-time-i2i-translation-ensembling 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多领域图像到图像翻译的测试时数据增强方法，以提升组织病理学图像分类在未知协议下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 不同医院的扫描协议差异（如染色、扫描仪）会导致组织病理学图像的光照、颜色等变化，从而严重影响算法在未知协议下的性能。
AI.method: 在测试阶段，通过多领域图像到图像翻译技术将未知协议图像投影到各个源领域，对齐不同域的特征分布，并对分类结果进行集成。
AI.result: 该方法在两个组织病理学任务中均优于传统领域泛化方法、标准H&E染色增强/归一化及常规测试时增强技术。
AI.conclusion: 测试时图像翻译集成方法能有效提升组织病理学图像分类模型在未知分布下的鲁棒性与泛化性能。

authors_text: Babak Haghighi,Warren B. Gefter,Lauren Pantalone,Despina Kontos,Eduardo Mortani Barbosa Jr
title: Quantitative CT texture-based method to predict diagnosis and prognosis of fibrosing interstitial lung disease patterns
title_zh: 基于定量 CT 纹理的方法预测纤维化间质性肺疾病模式的诊断和预后
abstract: Purpose: To utilize high-resolution quantitative CT (QCT) imaging features for prediction of diagnosis and prognosis in fibrosing interstitial lung diseases (ILD). Approach: 40 ILD patients (20 usual interstitial pneumonia (UIP), 20 non-UIP pattern ILD) were classified by expert consensus of 2 radiologists and followed for 7 years. Clinical variables were recorded. Following segmentation of the lung field, a total of 26 texture features were extracted using a lattice-based approach (TM model). The TM model was compared with previously histogram-based model (HM) for their abilities to classify UIP vs non-UIP. For prognostic assessment, survival analysis was performed comparing the expert diagnostic labels versus TM metrics. Results: In the classification analysis, the TM model outperformed the HM method with AUC of 0.70. While survival curves of UIP vs non-UIP expert labels in Cox regression analysis were not statistically different, TM QCT features allowed statistically significant partition of the cohort. Conclusions: TM model outperformed HM model in distinguishing UIP from non-UIP patterns. Most importantly, TM allows for partitioning of the cohort into distinct survival groups, whereas expert UIP vs non-UIP labeling does not. QCT TM models may improve diagnosis of ILD and offer more accurate prognostication, better guiding patient management.
summary: Purpose: To utilize high-resolution quantitative CT (QCT) imaging features for prediction of diagnosis and prognosis in fibrosing interstitial lung diseases (ILD). Approach: 40 ILD patients (20 usual interstitial pneumonia (UIP), 20 non-UIP pattern ILD) were classified by expert consensus of 2 radiologists and followed for 7 years. Clinical variables were recorded. Following segmentation of the lung field, a total of 26 texture features were extracted using a lattice-based approach (TM model). The TM model was compared with previously histogram-based model (HM) for their abilities to classify UIP vs non-UIP. For prognostic assessment, survival analysis was performed comparing the expert diagnostic labels versus TM metrics. Results: In the classification analysis, the TM model outperformed the HM method with AUC of 0.70. While survival curves of UIP vs non-UIP expert labels in Cox regression analysis were not statistically different, TM QCT features allowed statistically significant partition of the cohort. Conclusions: TM model outperformed HM model in distinguishing UIP from non-UIP patterns. Most importantly, TM allows for partitioning of the cohort into distinct survival groups, whereas expert UIP vs non-UIP labeling does not. QCT TM models may improve diagnosis of ILD and offer more accurate prognostication, better guiding patient management.
abstract_zh: 目的：利用高分辨率定量 CT (QCT) 成像特征来预测纤维化间质性肺疾病 (ILD) 的诊断和预后。方法：40 名 ILD 患者（20 名普通型间质性肺炎（UIP），20 名非 UIP 型 ILD）根据 2 名放射科医生的专家共识进行分类，并随访 7 年。记录临床变量。对肺野进行分割后，使用基于点阵的方法（TM 模型）总共提取了 26 个纹理特征。将 TM 模型与之前基于直方图的模型 (HM) 进行比较，了解它们对 UIP 与非 UIP 进行分类的能力。对于预后评估，进行了生存分析，比较了专家诊断标签与 TM 指标。结果：在分类分析中，TM模型优于HM方法，AUC为0.70。虽然 Cox 回归分析中 UIP 与非 UIP 专家标签的生存曲线没有统计学差异，但 TM QCT 特征允许对队列进行统计上显着的划分。结论：在区分 UIP 和非 UIP 模式方面，TM 模型优于 HM 模型。最重要的是，TM 允许将队列划分为不同的生存组，而专家 UIP 与非 UIP 标记则不允许。 QCT TM 模型可以改善 ILD 的诊断并提供更准确的预测，更好地指导患者管理。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种基于定量CT纹理分析的方法，用于预测纤维化间质性肺病（ILD）的诊断和预后。
AI.motivation: 现有基于直方图的模型在区分UIP与非UIP模式的ILD及预后评估中存在局限性，需开发更精确的纹理分析方法以提高诊断和预后判断的准确性。
AI.method: 对40例ILD患者进行高分辨率定量CT（QCT）影像分析，提取26个基于晶格模型（TM）的纹理特征，并与传统直方图模型（HM）对比。通过生存分析评估TM模型与专家诊断标签的预后关联性。
AI.result: TM模型在分类分析中AUC达0.70，优于HM方法；尽管专家标签的生存曲线无显著差异，但TM纹理特征可将队列显著分区，显示其预后分层能力。
AI.conclusion: TM模型在区分UIP与非UIP模式及预后分层上优于HM模型，可为ILD诊断和患者管理提供更精准的依据。

authors_text: Helin Cihan,Yunhan Wu,Paola Peña,Justin Edwards,Benjamin Cowan
title: Bilingual by default: Voice Assistants and the role of code-switching in creating a bilingual user experience
title_zh: 默认情况下双语：语音助手和代码转换在创建双语用户体验中的作用
comment: ef:4th Conference on Conversational User Interfaces 4th Conference on Conversational User Interfaces (CUI 2022)
comments: ef:4th Conference on Conversational User Interfaces 4th Conference on Conversational User Interfaces (CUI 2022)
abstract: Conversational User Interfaces such as Voice Assistants are hugely popular. Yet they are designed to be monolingual by default, lacking support for, or sensitivity to, the bilingual dialogue experience. In this provocation paper, we highlight the language production challenges faced in VA interaction for bilingual users. We argue that, by facilitating phenomena seen in bilingual interaction, such as code-switching, we can foster a more inclusive and improved user experience for bilingual users. We also explore ways that this might be achieved, through the support of multiple language recognition as well as being sensitive to the preferences of code-switching in speech output.
summary: Conversational User Interfaces such as Voice Assistants are hugely popular. Yet they are designed to be monolingual by default, lacking support for, or sensitivity to, the bilingual dialogue experience. In this provocation paper, we highlight the language production challenges faced in VA interaction for bilingual users. We argue that, by facilitating phenomena seen in bilingual interaction, such as code-switching, we can foster a more inclusive and improved user experience for bilingual users. We also explore ways that this might be achieved, through the support of multiple language recognition as well as being sensitive to the preferences of code-switching in speech output.
abstract_zh: 语音助手等会话用户界面非常受欢迎。然而，它们默认被设计为单语，缺乏对双语对话体验的支持或敏感性。在这篇挑衅性的论文中，我们强调了双语用户在 VA 交互中面临的语言生成挑战。我们认为，通过促进双语交互中出现的现象（例如语码转换），我们可以为双语用户提供更具包容性和更好的用户体验。我们还探索了通过支持多语言识别以及对语音输出中的代码转换偏好敏感来实现这一目标的方法。

AI.tldr: 探讨语音助手在双语用户中的默认单语设计问题，提出通过代码切换提升用户体验的方法
AI.motivation: 现有语音助手缺乏对双语对话的支持，导致双语用户在使用中遇到语言生产障碍，需更包容的设计
AI.method: 通过多语言识别技术及对用户代码切换偏好的敏感性设计，优化语音助手的交互方式
AI.result: 提出支持多语言识别和代码切换的框架，为未来研究提供方向
AI.conclusion: 语音助手应默认支持双语交互，如代码切换，以创造更包容的用户体验

authors_text: Longlong Weng,Yashu Kang,Kezhao Jiang,Chunlei Chen
title: Time Gated Convolutional Neural Networks for Crop Classification
title_zh: 用于作物分类的时间门控卷积神经网络
abstract: This paper presented a state-of-the-art framework, Time Gated Convolutional Neural Network (TGCNN) that takes advantage of temporal information and gating mechanisms for the crop classification problem. Besides, several vegetation indices were constructed to expand dimensions of input data to take advantage of spectral information. Both spatial (channel-wise) and temporal (step-wise) correlation are considered in TGCNN. Specifically, our preliminary analysis indicates that step-wise information is of greater importance in this data set. Lastly, the gating mechanism helps capture high-order relationship. Our TGCNN solution achieves $0.973$ F1 score, $0.977$ AUC ROC and $0.948$ IoU, respectively. In addition, it outperforms three other benchmarks in different local tasks (Kenya, Brazil and Togo). Overall, our experiments demonstrate that TGCNN is advantageous in this earth observation time series classification task.
summary: This paper presented a state-of-the-art framework, Time Gated Convolutional Neural Network (TGCNN) that takes advantage of temporal information and gating mechanisms for the crop classification problem. Besides, several vegetation indices were constructed to expand dimensions of input data to take advantage of spectral information. Both spatial (channel-wise) and temporal (step-wise) correlation are considered in TGCNN. Specifically, our preliminary analysis indicates that step-wise information is of greater importance in this data set. Lastly, the gating mechanism helps capture high-order relationship. Our TGCNN solution achieves $0.973$ F1 score, $0.977$ AUC ROC and $0.948$ IoU, respectively. In addition, it outperforms three other benchmarks in different local tasks (Kenya, Brazil and Togo). Overall, our experiments demonstrate that TGCNN is advantageous in this earth observation time series classification task.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种最先进的框架——时间门控卷积神经网络（TGCNN），它利用时间信息和门控机制来解决作物分类问题。此外，还构建了几个植被指数来扩展输入数据的维度以利用光谱信息。 TGCNN 中同时考虑了空间（通道）和时间（逐步）相关性。具体来说，我们的初步分析表明，逐步信息在此数据集中更为重要。最后，门控机制有助于捕获高阶关系。我们的 TGCNN 解决方案分别实现了 0.973 美元的 F1 分数、0.977 美元的 AUC ROC 和 0.948 美元的 IoU。此外，它在不同的本地任务（肯尼亚、巴西和多哥）中优于其他三个基准。总的来说，我们的实验表明 TGCNN 在地球观测时间序列分类任务中具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为时间门控卷积神经网络（TGCNN）的框架，用于作物分类任务，结合了时间信息、门控机制和植被指数以提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理作物分类任务时未能充分挖掘时间序列数据和光谱信息的潜力，需设计新型网络结构以提升分类精度。
AI.method: 构建TGCNN框架，融合时间门控机制与空间通道相关性，通过植被指数扩展输入数据维度，并强调步进式时间信息的重要性。
AI.result: TGCNN在测试集上达到0.973 F1分数、0.977 AUC ROC和0.948 IoU，优于肯尼亚、巴西和多哥等地的三种基准方法。
AI.conclusion: TGCNN通过有效整合时间序列与光谱信息，在地球观测时序分类任务中展现出显著优势。

motivation: 传统方法在处理作物分类任务时未能充分挖掘时间序列数据和光谱信息的潜力，需设计新型网络结构以提升分类精度。
method: 构建TGCNN框架，融合时间门控机制与空间通道相关性，通过植被指数扩展输入数据维度，并强调步进式时间信息的重要性。
result: TGCNN在测试集上达到0.973 F1分数、0.977 AUC ROC和0.948 IoU，优于肯尼亚、巴西和多哥等地的三种基准方法。
conclusion: TGCNN通过有效整合时间序列与光谱信息，在地球观测时序分类任务中展现出显著优势。
search_text: Time Gated Convolutional Neural Networks for Crop Classification 用于作物分类的时间门控卷积神经网络 This paper presented a state-of-the-art framework, Time Gated Convolutional Neural Network (TGCNN) that takes advantage of temporal information and gating mechanisms for the crop classification problem. Besides, several vegetation indices were constructed to expand dimensions of input data to take advantage of spectral information. Both spatial (channel-wise) and temporal (step-wise) correlation are considered in TGCNN. Specifically, our preliminary analysis indicates that step-wise information is of greater importance in this data set. Lastly, the gating mechanism helps capture high-order relationship. Our TGCNN solution achieves $0.973$ F1 score, $0.977$ AUC ROC and $0.948$ IoU, respectively. In addition, it outperforms three other benchmarks in different local tasks (Kenya, Brazil and Togo). Overall, our experiments demonstrate that TGCNN is advantageous in this earth observation time series classification task. 本文提出了一种最先进的框架——时间门控卷积神经网络（TGCNN），它利用时间信息和门控机制来解决作物分类问题。此外，还构建了几个植被指数来扩展输入数据的维度以利用光谱信息。 TGCNN 中同时考虑了空间（通道）和时间（逐步）相关性。具体来说，我们的初步分析表明，逐步信息在此数据集中更为重要。最后，门控机制有助于捕获高阶关系。我们的 TGCNN 解决方案分别实现了 0.973 美元的 F1 分数、0.977 美元的 AUC ROC 和 0.948 美元的 IoU。此外，它在不同的本地任务（肯尼亚、巴西和多哥）中优于其他三个基准。总的来说，我们的实验表明 TGCNN 在地球观测时间序列分类任务中具有优势。 本文提出了一种名为时间门控卷积神经网络（TGCNN）的框架，用于作物分类任务，结合了时间信息、门控机制和植被指数以提升分类性能。 Longlong Weng,Yashu Kang,Kezhao Jiang,Chunlei Chen cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Fawaz Sammani,Boris Joukovsky,Nikos Deligiannis
title: Visualizing and Understanding Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 可视化和理解对比学习
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
abstract: Contrastive learning has revolutionized the field of computer vision, learning rich representations from unlabeled data, which generalize well to diverse vision tasks. Consequently, it has become increasingly important to explain these approaches and understand their inner workings mechanisms. Given that contrastive models are trained with interdependent and interacting inputs and aim to learn invariance through data augmentation, the existing methods for explaining single-image systems (e.g., image classification models) are inadequate as they fail to account for these factors and typically assume independent inputs. Additionally, there is a lack of evaluation metrics designed to assess pairs of explanations, and no analytical studies have been conducted to investigate the effectiveness of different techniques used to explaining contrastive learning. In this work, we design visual explanation methods that contribute towards understanding similarity learning tasks from pairs of images. We further adapt existing metrics, used to evaluate visual explanations of image classification systems, to suit pairs of explanations and evaluate our proposed methods with these metrics. Finally, we present a thorough analysis of visual explainability methods for contrastive learning, establish their correlation with downstream tasks and demonstrate the potential of our approaches to investigate their merits and drawbacks.
summary: Contrastive learning has revolutionized the field of computer vision, learning rich representations from unlabeled data, which generalize well to diverse vision tasks. Consequently, it has become increasingly important to explain these approaches and understand their inner workings mechanisms. Given that contrastive models are trained with interdependent and interacting inputs and aim to learn invariance through data augmentation, the existing methods for explaining single-image systems (e.g., image classification models) are inadequate as they fail to account for these factors and typically assume independent inputs. Additionally, there is a lack of evaluation metrics designed to assess pairs of explanations, and no analytical studies have been conducted to investigate the effectiveness of different techniques used to explaining contrastive learning. In this work, we design visual explanation methods that contribute towards understanding similarity learning tasks from pairs of images. We further adapt existing metrics, used to evaluate visual explanations of image classification systems, to suit pairs of explanations and evaluate our proposed methods with these metrics. Finally, we present a thorough analysis of visual explainability methods for contrastive learning, establish their correlation with downstream tasks and demonstrate the potential of our approaches to investigate their merits and drawbacks.
abstract_zh: 对比学习彻底改变了计算机视觉领域，从未标记的数据中学习丰富的表示，这可以很好地推广到不同的视觉任务。因此，解释这些方法并了解其内部工作机制变得越来越重要。鉴于对比模型是通过相互依赖和交互的输入进行训练的，并且旨在通过数据增强来学习不变性，解释单图像系统（例如图像分类模型）的现有方法是不够的，因为它们无法考虑这些因素并且通常假设独立的输入。此外，缺乏旨在评估成对解释的评估指标，也没有进行分析研究来调查用于解释对比学习的不同技术的有效性。在这项工作中，我们设计了视觉解释方法，有助于理解图像对的相似性学习任务。我们进一步调整用于评估图像分类系统的视觉解释的现有指标，以适应成对的解释，并使用这些指标评估我们提出的方法。最后，我们对对比学习的视觉可解释性方法进行了全面分析，建立了它们与下游任务的相关性，并展示了我们的方法研究其优缺点的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文设计可视化解释方法以理解对比学习中的相似性学习任务，并通过改进的评估指标分析不同解释技术的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像系统的解释方法无法处理对比学习中依赖交互的输入和数据增强机制，且缺乏针对图像对解释的评估指标。
AI.method: 提出适用于图像对的可视化解释方法，改进分类模型解释评估指标以适应对比学习场景，并通过实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 分析了多种可视化方法与下游任务的关联性，证明了所提方法在评估对比学习模型解释性方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 建立了对比学习可视化解释的评估框架，揭示了不同技术的优劣及其与模型性能的关系。

authors_text: Hans L. Bodlaender,Carla Groenland,Hugo Jacob
title: List Colouring Trees in Logarithmic Space
title_zh: 列出对数空间中的着色树
comment: 18 pages, accepted to ESA
comments: 18 pages, accepted to ESA
abstract: We show that List Colouring can be solved on $n$-vertex trees by a deterministic Turing machine using $O(\log n)$ bits on the worktape. Given an $n$-vertex graph $G=(V,E)$ and a list $L(v)\subseteq\{1,\dots,n\}$ of available colours for each $v\in V$, a list colouring for $G$ is a proper colouring $c$ such that $c(v)\in L(v)$ for all $v$.
summary: We show that List Colouring can be solved on $n$-vertex trees by a deterministic Turing machine using $O(\log n)$ bits on the worktape. Given an $n$-vertex graph $G=(V,E)$ and a list $L(v)\subseteq\{1,\dots,n\}$ of available colours for each $v\in V$, a list colouring for $G$ is a proper colouring $c$ such that $c(v)\in L(v)$ for all $v$.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，可以通过确定性图灵机使用工作带上的 $O(\log n)$ 位在 $n$ 顶点树上解决列表着色问题。给定一个 $n$ 顶点图 $G=(V,E)$ 和每个 $v\in V$ 的可用颜色列表 $L(v)\subseteq\{1,\dots,n\}$，$G$ 的列表着色是正确的着色 $c$，使得所有 $v$ 的 $c(v)\in L(v)$ 可用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在树结构上使用对数空间解决列表着色问题的算法。
AI.motivation: 列表着色问题在一般图中是NP难的，但树作为特殊的图结构可能具有更高效的算法。研究其对数空间复杂性有助于理解计算复杂性理论中L类问题的边界。
AI.method: 设计了一种确定性图灵机算法，通过递归处理树的结构并利用分治策略，在工作磁带上仅使用O(log n)空间完成着色。
AI.result: 证明了n顶点树的列表着色问题可以在O(log n)空间内被确定性图灵机解决。
AI.conclusion: 树的列表着色问题属于L复杂度类，为特殊图结构的高效算法设计提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Dhanoop Karunakaran,Julie Stephany Berrio,Stewart Worrall,Eduardo Nebot
title: Parameterisation of lane-change scenarios from real-world data
title_zh: 根据真实数据对变道场景进行参数化
comment: Accepted to IEEE ITSC 2022 conference
comments: Accepted to IEEE ITSC 2022 conference
abstract: Recent Autonomous Vehicles (AV) technology includes machine learning and probabilistic techniques that add significant complexity to the traditional verification and validation methods. The research community and industry have widely accepted scenario-based testing in the last few years. As it is focused directly on the relevant crucial road situations, it can reduce the effort required in testing. Encoding real-world traffic participants' behaviour is essential to efficiently assess the System Under Test (SUT) in scenario-based testing. So, it is necessary to capture the scenario parameters from the real-world data that can model scenarios realistically in simulation. The primary emphasis of the paper is to identify the list of meaningful parameters that adequately model real-world lane-change scenarios. With these parameters, it is possible to build a parameter space capable of generating a range of challenging scenarios for AV testing efficiently. We validate our approach using Root Mean Square Error(RMSE) to compare the scenarios generated using the proposed parameters against the real-world trajectory data. In addition to that, we demonstrate that adding a slight disturbance to a few scenario parameters can generate different scenarios and utilise Responsibility-Sensitive Safety (RSS) metric to measure the scenarios' risk.
summary: Recent Autonomous Vehicles (AV) technology includes machine learning and probabilistic techniques that add significant complexity to the traditional verification and validation methods. The research community and industry have widely accepted scenario-based testing in the last few years. As it is focused directly on the relevant crucial road situations, it can reduce the effort required in testing. Encoding real-world traffic participants' behaviour is essential to efficiently assess the System Under Test (SUT) in scenario-based testing. So, it is necessary to capture the scenario parameters from the real-world data that can model scenarios realistically in simulation. The primary emphasis of the paper is to identify the list of meaningful parameters that adequately model real-world lane-change scenarios. With these parameters, it is possible to build a parameter space capable of generating a range of challenging scenarios for AV testing efficiently. We validate our approach using Root Mean Square Error(RMSE) to compare the scenarios generated using the proposed parameters against the real-world trajectory data. In addition to that, we demonstrate that adding a slight disturbance to a few scenario parameters can generate different scenarios and utilise Responsibility-Sensitive Safety (RSS) metric to measure the scenarios' risk.
abstract_zh: 最近的自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 技术包括机器学习和概率技术，这些技术大大增加了传统验证和确认方法的复杂性。在过去几年中，研究界和业界已广泛接受基于场景的测试。由于它直接关注相关的关键道路情况，因此可以减少测试所需的工作量。对现实世界的交通参与者的行为进行编码对于在基于场景的测试中有效评估被测系统 (SUT) 至关重要。因此，有必要从现实世界的数据中捕获场景参数，以便在仿真中真实地建模场景。本文的主要重点是确定能够充分模拟现实世界换道场景的有意义的参数列表。有了这些参数，就可以构建一个能够有效生成一系列具有挑战性的 AV 测试场景的参数空间。我们使用均方根误差（RMSE）验证我们的方法，将使用建议的参数生成的场景与真实世界的轨迹数据进行比较。除此之外，我们证明对一些场景参数添加轻微的干扰可以生成不同的场景，并利用责任敏感安全（RSS）指标来衡量场景的风险。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从真实世界数据中识别关键参数，以高效建模和生成用于自动驾驶车辆测试的现实车道变更场景。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶技术的复杂性需要更高效的验证方法，而基于场景的测试需依赖真实交通行为参数以提升测试效率和真实性。
AI.method: 通过分析真实交通数据提取车道变更场景的关键参数，构建参数空间生成测试场景，并利用RMSE误差和责任敏感安全（RSS）指标验证场景有效性。
AI.result: 成功识别出关键参数并验证了其生成场景的准确性，通过参数扰动可生成多样化场景，RSS指标有效评估了场景风险。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动驾驶系统提供了高效、现实的场景生成框架，有助于提升测试覆盖率和安全性评估能力。

search_text: Parameterisation of lane-change scenarios from real-world data 根据真实数据对变道场景进行参数化 Recent Autonomous Vehicles (AV) technology includes machine learning and probabilistic techniques that add significant complexity to the traditional verification and validation methods. The research community and industry have widely accepted scenario-based testing in the last few years. As it is focused directly on the relevant crucial road situations, it can reduce the effort required in testing. Encoding real-world traffic participants' behaviour is essential to efficiently assess the System Under Test (SUT) in scenario-based testing. So, it is necessary to capture the scenario parameters from the real-world data that can model scenarios realistically in simulation. The primary emphasis of the paper is to identify the list of meaningful parameters that adequately model real-world lane-change scenarios. With these parameters, it is possible to build a parameter space capable of generating a range of challenging scenarios for AV testing efficiently. We validate our approach using Root Mean Square Error(RMSE) to compare the scenarios generated using the proposed parameters against the real-world trajectory data. In addition to that, we demonstrate that adding a slight disturbance to a few scenario parameters can generate different scenarios and utilise Responsibility-Sensitive Safety (RSS) metric to measure the scenarios' risk. 最近的自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 技术包括机器学习和概率技术，这些技术大大增加了传统验证和确认方法的复杂性。在过去几年中，研究界和业界已广泛接受基于场景的测试。由于它直接关注相关的关键道路情况，因此可以减少测试所需的工作量。对现实世界的交通参与者的行为进行编码对于在基于场景的测试中有效评估被测系统 (SUT) 至关重要。因此，有必要从现实世界的数据中捕获场景参数，以便在仿真中真实地建模场景。本文的主要重点是确定能够充分模拟现实世界换道场景的有意义的参数列表。有了这些参数，就可以构建一个能够有效生成一系列具有挑战性的 AV 测试场景的参数空间。我们使用均方根误差（RMSE）验证我们的方法，将使用建议的参数生成的场景与真实世界的轨迹数据进行比较。除此之外，我们证明对一些场景参数添加轻微的干扰可以生成不同的场景，并利用责任敏感安全（RSS）指标来衡量场景的风险。 本文旨在从真实世界数据中识别关键参数，以高效建模和生成用于自动驾驶车辆测试的现实车道变更场景。 Dhanoop Karunakaran,Julie Stephany Berrio,Stewart Worrall,Eduardo Nebot cs.RO

authors_text: Giuseppe Paolo,Jonas Gonzalez-Billandon,Albert Thomas,Balázs Kégl
title: Guided Safe Shooting: model based reinforcement learning with safety constraints
title_zh: 引导安全射击：具有安全约束的基于模型的强化学习
abstract: In the last decade, reinforcement learning successfully solved complex control tasks and decision-making problems, like the Go board game. Yet, there are few success stories when it comes to deploying those algorithms to real-world scenarios. One of the reasons is the lack of guarantees when dealing with and avoiding unsafe states, a fundamental requirement in critical control engineering systems. In this paper, we introduce Guided Safe Shooting (GuSS), a model-based RL approach that can learn to control systems with minimal violations of the safety constraints. The model is learned on the data collected during the operation of the system in an iterated batch fashion, and is then used to plan for the best action to perform at each time step. We propose three different safe planners, one based on a simple random shooting strategy and two based on MAP-Elites, a more advanced divergent-search algorithm. Experiments show that these planners help the learning agent avoid unsafe situations while maximally exploring the state space, a necessary aspect when learning an accurate model of the system. Furthermore, compared to model-free approaches, learning a model allows GuSS reducing the number of interactions with the real-system while still reaching high rewards, a fundamental requirement when handling engineering systems.
summary: In the last decade, reinforcement learning successfully solved complex control tasks and decision-making problems, like the Go board game. Yet, there are few success stories when it comes to deploying those algorithms to real-world scenarios. One of the reasons is the lack of guarantees when dealing with and avoiding unsafe states, a fundamental requirement in critical control engineering systems. In this paper, we introduce Guided Safe Shooting (GuSS), a model-based RL approach that can learn to control systems with minimal violations of the safety constraints. The model is learned on the data collected during the operation of the system in an iterated batch fashion, and is then used to plan for the best action to perform at each time step. We propose three different safe planners, one based on a simple random shooting strategy and two based on MAP-Elites, a more advanced divergent-search algorithm. Experiments show that these planners help the learning agent avoid unsafe situations while maximally exploring the state space, a necessary aspect when learning an accurate model of the system. Furthermore, compared to model-free approaches, learning a model allows GuSS reducing the number of interactions with the real-system while still reaching high rewards, a fundamental requirement when handling engineering systems.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，强化学习成功地解决了复杂的控制任务和决策问题，例如围棋棋盘游戏。然而，将这些算法部署到现实场景中的成功案例却很少。原因之一是在处理和避免不安全状态时缺乏保证，而这是关键控制工程系统的基本要求。在本文中，我们介绍了引导安全射击（GuSS），这是一种基于模型的强化学习方法，可以学习以最小程度地违反安全约束的方式控制系统。该模型以迭代批处理方式根据系统运行期间收集的数据进行学习，然后用于规划在每个时间步骤执行的最佳操作。我们提出了三种不同的安全规划器，一种基于简单的随机射击策略，两种基于 MAP-Elites（一种更先进的发散搜索算法）。实验表明，这些规划器可以帮助学习代理避免不安全的情况，同时最大限度地探索状态空间，这是学习系统的准确模型时的一个必要方面。此外，与无模型方法相比，学习模型可以让 GuSS 减少与真实系统的交互次数，同时仍然获得高回报，这是处理工程系统时的基本要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型的强化学习方法GuSS，通过安全约束规划器在保证系统安全性的前提下高效学习控制策略。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习算法在现实工程系统中应用受限，主要因缺乏对不安全状态的有效规避机制，而安全约束是关键控制系统的必要条件。
AI.method: GuSS采用迭代批次数据学习系统模型，并设计三种安全规划器（随机射击与两种MAP-Elites算法）在每一步规划最优动作，平衡安全与探索。
AI.result: 实验表明GuSS能有效避免危险状态并充分探索状态空间，相比无模型方法减少实际系统交互次数，同时保持高奖励水平。
AI.conclusion: GuSS通过模型学习与安全规划器结合，在保证安全性的同时提升学习效率，为工程控制系统的强化学习应用提供了有效解决方案。

Yet, there are few success stories when it comes to deploying those algorithms to real-world scenarios. One of the reasons is the lack of guarantees when dealing with and avoiding unsafe states, a fundamental requirement in critical control engineering systems. In this paper, we introduce Guided Safe Shooting (GuSS), a model-based RL approach that can learn to control systems with minimal violations of the safety constraints. Experiments show that these planners help the learning agent avoid unsafe situations while maximally exploring the state space, a necessary aspect when learning an accurate model of the system. authors_text: Pi Ko,Samuel A. Prieto,Borja Garcia de Soto
title: Developing a Free and Open-source Automated Building Exterior Crack Inspection Software for Construction and Facility Managers
title_zh: 为建筑和设施经理开发免费开源的自动化建筑外部裂缝检查软件
abstract: Inspection of cracks is an important process for properly monitoring and maintaining a building. However, manual crack inspection is time-consuming, inconsistent, and dangerous (e.g., in tall buildings). Due to the development of open-source AI technologies, the increase in available Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) and the availability of smartphone cameras, it has become possible to automate the building crack inspection process. This study presents the development of an easy-to-use, free and open-source Automated Building Exterior Crack Inspection Software (ABECIS) for construction and facility managers, using state-of-the-art segmentation algorithms to identify concrete cracks and generate a quantitative and qualitative report. ABECIS was tested using images collected from a UAV and smartphone cameras in real-world conditions and a controlled laboratory environment. From the raw output of the algorithm, the median Intersection over Unions for the test experiments is (1) 0.686 for indoor crack detection experiment in a controlled lab environment using a commercial drone, (2) 0.186 for indoor crack detection at a construction site using a smartphone and (3) 0.958 for outdoor crack detection on university campus using a commercial drone. These IoU results can be improved significantly to over 0.8 when a human operator selectively removes the false positives. In general, ABECIS performs best for outdoor drone images, and combining the algorithm predictions with human verification/intervention offers very accurate crack detection results. The software is available publicly and can be downloaded for out-of-the-box use at: https://github.com/SMART-NYUAD/ABECIS
summary: Inspection of cracks is an important process for properly monitoring and maintaining a building. However, manual crack inspection is time-consuming, inconsistent, and dangerous (e.g., in tall buildings). Due to the development of open-source AI technologies, the increase in available Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) and the availability of smartphone cameras, it has become possible to automate the building crack inspection process. This study presents the development of an easy-to-use, free and open-source Automated Building Exterior Crack Inspection Software (ABECIS) for construction and facility managers, using state-of-the-art segmentation algorithms to identify concrete cracks and generate a quantitative and qualitative report. ABECIS was tested using images collected from a UAV and smartphone cameras in real-world conditions and a controlled laboratory environment. From the raw output of the algorithm, the median Intersection over Unions for the test experiments is (1) 0.686 for indoor crack detection experiment in a controlled lab environment using a commercial drone, (2) 0.186 for indoor crack detection at a construction site using a smartphone and (3) 0.958 for outdoor crack detection on university campus using a commercial drone. These IoU results can be improved significantly to over 0.8 when a human operator selectively removes the false positives. In general, ABECIS performs best for outdoor drone images, and combining the algorithm predictions with human verification/intervention offers very accurate crack detection results. The software is available publicly and can be downloaded for out-of-the-box use at: https://github.com/SMART-NYUAD/ABECIS
abstract_zh: 裂缝检查是正确监测和维护建筑物的重要过程。然而，手动裂纹检查非常耗时、不一致且危险（例如，在高层建筑中）。由于开源人工智能技术的发展、可用无人机 (UAV) 的增加以及智能手机摄像头的可用性，建筑物裂缝检查过程的自动化已成为可能。本研究介绍了为建筑和设施经理开发的易于使用、免费和开源的自动化建筑外部裂缝检测软件 (ABECIS)，使用最先进的分割算法来识别混凝土裂缝并生成定量和定性报告。 ABECIS 使用无人机和智能手机摄像头在真实条件和受控实验室环境中收集的图像进行了测试。从算法的原始输出来看，测试实验的并交中值是 (1) 使用商用无人机在受控实验室环境中进行室内裂缝检测实验的 0.686，(2) 使用智能手机在建筑工地进行室内裂缝检测的 0.186，以及 (3) 使用商用无人机在大学校园进行室外裂缝检测的 0.958。当人类操作员有选择地消除误报时，这些 IoU 结果可以显着提高到 0.8 以上。一般来说，ABECIS 对于室外无人机图像表现最好，并将算法预测与人工验证/干预相结合，提供非常准确的裂纹检测结果。该软件是公开提供的，可以从以下网址下载以供开箱即用：https://github.com/SMART-NYUAD/ABECIS

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种免费开源的自动化建筑外墙裂缝检测软件ABECIS，利用AI分割算法实现裂缝识别与报告生成。
AI.motivation: 传统人工裂缝检测存在耗时、不一致及危险性等问题，而开源AI技术、无人机和智能手机相机的发展为自动化检测提供了可行性。
AI.method: 基于状态-of-the-art分割算法，结合无人机和智能手机采集的图像，开发开源软件ABECIS进行裂缝检测与量化分析。
AI.result: 实验室环境下无人机检测IoU达0.686，施工现场手机检测仅0.186，户外校园无人机检测高达0.958；人工干预后准确率可提升至0.8以上。
AI.conclusion: ABECIS在户外无人机图像中表现最佳，结合人工验证可显著提升检测精度，软件已开源供直接使用。

motivation: 传统人工裂缝检测存在耗时、不一致及危险性等问题，而开源AI技术、无人机和智能手机相机的发展为自动化检测提供了可行性。
method: 基于状态-of-the-art分割算法，结合无人机和智能手机采集的图像，开发开源软件ABECIS进行裂缝检测与量化分析。
result: 实验室环境下无人机检测IoU达0.686，施工现场手机检测仅0.186，户外校园无人机检测高达0.958；人工干预后准确率可提升至0.8以上。
conclusion: ABECIS在户外无人机图像中表现最佳，结合人工验证可显著提升检测精度，软件已开源供直接使用。
search_text: Developing a Free and Open-source Automated Building Exterior Crack Inspection Software for Construction and Facility Managers 为建筑和设施经理开发免费开源的自动化建筑外部裂缝检查软件 Inspection of cracks is an important process for properly monitoring and maintaining a building. However, manual crack inspection is time-consuming, inconsistent, and dangerous (e.g., in tall buildings). Due to the development of open-source AI technologies, the increase in available Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) and the availability of smartphone cameras, it has become possible to automate the building crack inspection process. This study presents the development of an easy-to-use, free and open-source Automated Building Exterior Crack Inspection Software (ABECIS) for construction and facility managers, using state-of-the-art segmentation algorithms to identify concrete cracks and generate a quantitative and qualitative report. ABECIS was tested using images collected from a UAV and smartphone cameras in real-world conditions and a controlled laboratory environment. From the raw output of the algorithm, the median Intersection over Unions for the test experiments is (1) 0.686 for indoor crack detection experiment in a controlled lab environment using a commercial drone, (2) 0.186 for indoor crack detection at a construction site using a smartphone and (3) 0.958 for outdoor crack detection on university campus using a commercial drone. These IoU results can be improved significantly to over 0.8 when a human operator selectively removes the false positives. In general, ABECIS performs best for outdoor drone images, and combining the algorithm predictions with human verification/intervention offers very accurate crack detection results. The software is available publicly and can be downloaded for out-of-the-box use at: https://github.com/SMART-NYUAD/ABECIS 裂缝检查是正确监测和维护建筑物的重要过程。然而，手动裂纹检查非常耗时、不一致且危险（例如，在高层建筑中）。由于开源人工智能技术的发展、可用无人机 (UAV) 的增加以及智能手机摄像头的可用性，建筑物裂缝检查过程的自动化已成为可能。本研究介绍了为建筑和设施经理开发的易于使用、免费和开源的自动化建筑外部裂缝检测软件 (ABECIS)，使用最先进的分割算法来识别混凝土裂缝并生成定量和定性报告。 ABECIS 使用无人机和智能手机摄像头在真实条件和受控实验室环境中收集的图像进行了测试。从算法的原始输出来看，测试实验的并交中值是 (1) 使用商用无人机在受控实验室环境中进行室内裂缝检测实验的 0.686，(2) 使用智能手机在建筑工地进行室内裂缝检测的 0.186，以及 (3) 使用商用无人机在大学校园进行室外裂缝检测的 0.958。当人类操作员有选择地消除误报时，这些 IoU 结果可以显着提高到 0.8 以上。一般来说，ABECIS 对于室外无人机图像表现最好，并将算法预测与人工验证/干预相结合，提供非常准确的裂纹检测结果。该软件是公开提供的，可以从以下网址下载以供开箱即用：https://github.com/SMART-NYUAD/ABECIS 本文开发了一种免费开源的自动化建筑外墙裂缝检测软件ABECIS，利用AI分割算法实现裂缝识别与报告生成。 Pi Ko,Samuel A. Prieto,Borja Garcia de Soto cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Gaochang Wu,Yuemei Zhou,Yebin Liu,Lu Fang,Tianyou Chai
title: Geo-NI: Geometry-aware Neural Interpolation for Light Field Rendering
title_zh: Geo-NI：用于光场渲染的几何感知神经插值
comment: Accepted by IEEE TPAMI, 16 pages, 14 figures, 6 tables
comments: Accepted by IEEE TPAMI, 16 pages, 14 figures, 6 tables
abstract: In this paper, we present a Geometry-aware Neural Interpolation (Geo-NI) framework for light field rendering. Previous learning-based approaches either rely on the capability of neural networks to perform direct interpolation, which we dubbed Neural Interpolation (NI), or explore scene geometry for novel view synthesis, also known as Depth Image-Based Rendering (DIBR). Instead, we incorporate the ideas behind these two kinds of approaches by launching the NI with a novel DIBR pipeline. Specifically, the proposed Geo-NI first performs NI using input light field sheared by a set of depth hypotheses. Then the DIBR is implemented by assigning the sheared light fields with a novel reconstruction cost volume according to the reconstruction quality under different depth hypotheses. The reconstruction cost is interpreted as a blending weight to render the final output light field by blending the reconstructed light fields along the dimension of depth hypothesis. By combining the superiorities of NI and DIBR, the proposed Geo-NI is able to render views with large disparity with the help of scene geometry while also reconstruct non-Lambertian effect when depth is prone to be ambiguous. Extensive experiments on various datasets demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed geometry-aware light field rendering framework.
summary: In this paper, we present a Geometry-aware Neural Interpolation (Geo-NI) framework for light field rendering. Previous learning-based approaches either rely on the capability of neural networks to perform direct interpolation, which we dubbed Neural Interpolation (NI), or explore scene geometry for novel view synthesis, also known as Depth Image-Based Rendering (DIBR). Instead, we incorporate the ideas behind these two kinds of approaches by launching the NI with a novel DIBR pipeline. Specifically, the proposed Geo-NI first performs NI using input light field sheared by a set of depth hypotheses. Then the DIBR is implemented by assigning the sheared light fields with a novel reconstruction cost volume according to the reconstruction quality under different depth hypotheses. The reconstruction cost is interpreted as a blending weight to render the final output light field by blending the reconstructed light fields along the dimension of depth hypothesis. By combining the superiorities of NI and DIBR, the proposed Geo-NI is able to render views with large disparity with the help of scene geometry while also reconstruct non-Lambertian effect when depth is prone to be ambiguous. Extensive experiments on various datasets demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed geometry-aware light field rendering framework.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于光场渲染的几何感知神经插值（Geo-NI）框架。以前基于学习的方法要么依赖神经网络执行直接插值的能力，我们将其称为神经插值（NI），要么探索场景几何以进行新颖的视图合成，也称为基于深度图像的渲染（DIBR）。相反，我们通过启动带有新颖 DIBR 管道的 NI 来整合这两种方法背后的想法。具体来说，所提出的 Geo-NI 首先使用由一组深度假设剪切的输入光场来执行 NI。然后根据不同深度假设下的重建质量，通过为剪切光场分配新的重建成本量来实现DIBR。重建成本被解释为混合权重，以通过沿着深度假设的维度混合重建的光场来渲染最终输出光场。通过结合 NI 和 DIBR 的优势，所提出的 Geo-NI 能够借助场景几何来渲染大视差视图，同时在深度容易模糊时重建非朗伯效应。对各种数据集的大量实验证明了所提出的几何感知光场渲染框架的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合神经插值与深度图像基于渲染的几何感知神经插值框架Geo-NI，用于光场渲染。
AI.motivation: 传统方法要么依赖神经网络直接插值（NI），要么通过场景几何进行新视角合成（DIBR），但难以同时处理大视差和非朗伯效应，且深度模糊时表现不佳。
AI.method: Geo-NI通过深度假设对输入光场进行剪切，生成多个剪切光场；随后基于不同深度假设的重建质量构建重建代价体，将代价解释为混合权重，沿深度假设维度融合重建光场生成最终输出。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，Geo-NI在处理大视差和深度模糊场景时，相比现有方法具有更优的光场渲染效果。
AI.conclusion: Geo-NI通过融合NI与DIBR的优势，有效结合了场景几何信息与神经插值能力，提升了光场渲染的质量与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Hasan AlMarzouqi,Lyes Saad Saoud
title: Semantic Labeling of High Resolution Images Using EfficientUNets and Transformers
title_zh: 使用 EfficientUNet 和 Transformers 对高分辨率图像进行语义标记
abstract: Semantic segmentation necessitates approaches that learn high-level characteristics while dealing with enormous amounts of data. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can learn unique and adaptive features to achieve this aim. However, due to the large size and high spatial resolution of remote sensing images, these networks cannot analyze an entire scene efficiently. Recently, deep transformers have proven their capability to record global interactions between different objects in the image. In this paper, we propose a new segmentation model that combines convolutional neural networks with transformers, and show that this mixture of local and global feature extraction techniques provides significant advantages in remote sensing segmentation. In addition, the proposed model includes two fusion layers that are designed to represent multi-modal inputs and output of the network efficiently. The input fusion layer extracts feature maps summarizing the relationship between image content and elevation maps (DSM). The output fusion layer uses a novel multi-task segmentation strategy where class labels are identified using class-specific feature extraction layers and loss functions. Finally, a fast-marching method is used to convert all unidentified class labels to their closest known neighbors. Our results demonstrate that the proposed methodology improves segmentation accuracy compared to state-of-the-art techniques.
summary: Semantic segmentation necessitates approaches that learn high-level characteristics while dealing with enormous amounts of data. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can learn unique and adaptive features to achieve this aim. However, due to the large size and high spatial resolution of remote sensing images, these networks cannot analyze an entire scene efficiently. Recently, deep transformers have proven their capability to record global interactions between different objects in the image. In this paper, we propose a new segmentation model that combines convolutional neural networks with transformers, and show that this mixture of local and global feature extraction techniques provides significant advantages in remote sensing segmentation. In addition, the proposed model includes two fusion layers that are designed to represent multi-modal inputs and output of the network efficiently. The input fusion layer extracts feature maps summarizing the relationship between image content and elevation maps (DSM). The output fusion layer uses a novel multi-task segmentation strategy where class labels are identified using class-specific feature extraction layers and loss functions. Finally, a fast-marching method is used to convert all unidentified class labels to their closest known neighbors. Our results demonstrate that the proposed methodology improves segmentation accuracy compared to state-of-the-art techniques.
abstract_zh: 语义分割需要在处理大量数据的同时学习高级特征的方法。卷积神经网络（CNN）可以学习独特的自适应特征来实现这一目标。然而，由于遥感图像尺寸大、空间分辨率高，这些网络无法有效地分析整个场景。最近，深度转换器已经证明了它们记录图像中不同对象之间的全局交互的能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种将卷积神经网络与变压器相结合的新分割模型，并表明这种局部和全局特征提取技术的混合在遥感分割中提供了显着的优势。此外，所提出的模型包括两个融合层，旨在有效地表示网络的多模态输入和输出。输入融合层提取特征图，总结图像内容和高程图（DSM）之间的关系。输出融合层使用一种新颖的多任务分割策略，其中使用特定于类的特征提取层和损失函数来识别类标签。最后，使用快速推进方法将所有未识别的类标签转换为其最接近的已知邻居。我们的结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，所提出的方法提高了分割准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合EfficientUNet和Transformer的模型，用于高分辨率遥感图像的语义分割，通过融合局部与全局特征提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在处理高分辨率遥感图像时效率不足，而Transformer能捕捉全局交互。需结合两者优势以解决大尺度场景分割问题。
AI.method: 设计包含输入融合层（整合图像与DSM数据）和输出融合层（多任务分割策略）的混合模型，结合CNN与Transformer，并采用快速行进法优化未标注区域。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在分割精度上优于现有最先进技术，尤其在复杂场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 融合CNN与Transformer的混合架构及多模态融合策略，有效提升了高分辨率遥感图像语义分割的性能。
