authors_text: Zhakshylyk Nurlanov,Daniel Cremers,Florian Bernard
title: Efficient and Flexible Sublabel-Accurate Energy Minimization
title_zh: 高效灵活的子标签-精确能量最小化
comment: To be published at ICPR 2022, Copyright 2022 IEEE
comments: To be published at ICPR 2022, Copyright 2022 IEEE
abstract: We address the problem of minimizing a class of energy functions consisting of data and smoothness terms that commonly occur in machine learning, computer vision, and pattern recognition. While discrete optimization methods are able to give theoretical optimality guarantees, they can only handle a finite number of labels and therefore suffer from label discretization bias. Existing continuous optimization methods can find sublabel-accurate solutions, but they are not efficient for large label spaces. In this work, we propose an efficient sublabel-accurate method that utilizes the best properties of both continuous and discrete models. We separate the problem into two sequential steps: (i) global discrete optimization for selecting the label range, and (ii) efficient continuous sublabel-accurate local refinement of a convex approximation of the energy function in the chosen range. Doing so allows us to achieve a boost in time and memory efficiency while practically keeping the accuracy at the same level as continuous convex relaxation methods, and in addition, providing theoretical optimality guarantees at the level of discrete methods. Finally, we show the flexibility of the proposed approach to general pairwise smoothness terms, so that it is applicable to a wide range of regularizations. Experiments on the illustrating example of the image denoising problem demonstrate the properties of the proposed method. The code reproducing experiments is available at \url{https://github.com/nurlanov-zh/sublabel-accurate-alpha-expansion}.
summary: We address the problem of minimizing a class of energy functions consisting of data and smoothness terms that commonly occur in machine learning, computer vision, and pattern recognition. While discrete optimization methods are able to give theoretical optimality guarantees, they can only handle a finite number of labels and therefore suffer from label discretization bias. Existing continuous optimization methods can find sublabel-accurate solutions, but they are not efficient for large label spaces. In this work, we propose an efficient sublabel-accurate method that utilizes the best properties of both continuous and discrete models. We separate the problem into two sequential steps: (i) global discrete optimization for selecting the label range, and (ii) efficient continuous sublabel-accurate local refinement of a convex approximation of the energy function in the chosen range. Doing so allows us to achieve a boost in time and memory efficiency while practically keeping the accuracy at the same level as continuous convex relaxation methods, and in addition, providing theoretical optimality guarantees at the level of discrete methods. Finally, we show the flexibility of the proposed approach to general pairwise smoothness terms, so that it is applicable to a wide range of regularizations. Experiments on the illustrating example of the image denoising problem demonstrate the properties of the proposed method. The code reproducing experiments is available at \url{https://github.com/nurlanov-zh/sublabel-accurate-alpha-expansion}.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了最小化一类由数据和平滑项组成的能量函数的问题，这些函数通常出现在机器学习、计算机视觉和模式识别中。虽然离散优化方法能够提供理论上的最优性保证，但它们只能处理有限数量的标签，因此会受到标签离散化偏差的影响。现有的连续优化方法可以找到子标签精确的解决方案，但对于大标签空间来说效率不高。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种有效的子标签精确方法，该方法利用了连续模型和离散模型的最佳属性。我们将问题分为两个连续的步骤：（i）用于选择标签范围的全局离散优化，以及（ii）所选范围内能量函数的凸近似的高效连续子标签精确局部细化。这样做使我们能够提高时间和内存效率，同时实际上将精度保持在与连续凸松弛方法相同的水平，此外，还提供离散方法级别的理论最优性保证。最后，我们展示了所提出的方法对一般成对平滑项的灵活性，因此它适用于广泛的正则化。对图像去噪问题的示例进行的实验证明了所提出方法的特性。重现实验的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/nurlanov-zh/sublabel-accurate-alpha-expansion} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效且灵活的子标签精确能量最小化方法，结合连续和离散模型的优势，解决机器学习和计算机视觉中的能量函数优化问题。
AI.motivation: 离散优化方法存在标签离散化偏差，连续方法在大标签空间效率低下，需兼顾效率与精度。
AI.method: 分两步：首先通过全局离散优化选择标签范围，再在选定范围内对凸近似能量函数进行高效连续局部优化。
AI.result: 在保持连续方法精度的同时提升时间与内存效率，并提供离散方法的理论最优性保证；图像去噪实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于多种正则化场景，兼具灵活性与高效性，为大规模标签空间优化提供新思路。

search_text: Efficient and Flexible Sublabel-Accurate Energy Minimization 高效灵活的子标签-精确能量最小化 We address the problem of minimizing a class of energy functions consisting of data and smoothness terms that commonly occur in machine learning, computer vision, and pattern recognition. While discrete optimization methods are able to give theoretical optimality guarantees, they can only handle a finite number of labels and therefore suffer from label discretization bias. Existing continuous optimization methods can find sublabel-accurate solutions, but they are not efficient for large label spaces. In this work, we propose an efficient sublabel-accurate method that utilizes the best properties of both continuous and discrete models. We separate the problem into two sequential steps: (i) global discrete optimization for selecting the label range, and (ii) efficient continuous sublabel-accurate local refinement of a convex approximation of the energy function in the chosen range. Doing so allows us to achieve a boost in time and memory efficiency while practically keeping the accuracy at the same level as continuous convex relaxation methods, and in addition, providing theoretical optimality guarantees at the level of discrete methods. Finally, we show the flexibility of the proposed approach to general pairwise smoothness terms, so that it is applicable to a wide range of regularizations. Experiments on the illustrating example of the image denoising problem demonstrate the properties of the proposed method. The code reproducing experiments is available at \url{https://github.com/nurlanov-zh/sublabel-accurate-alpha-expansion}. 我们解决了最小化一类由数据和平滑项组成的能量函数的问题，这些函数通常出现在机器学习、计算机视觉和模式识别中。虽然离散优化方法能够提供理论上的最优性保证，但它们只能处理有限数量的标签，因此会受到标签离散化偏差的影响。现有的连续优化方法可以找到子标签精确的解决方案，但对于大标签空间来说效率不高。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种有效的子标签精确方法，该方法利用了连续模型和离散模型的最佳属性。我们将问题分为两个连续的步骤：（i）用于选择标签范围的全局离散优化，以及（ii）所选范围内能量函数的凸近似的高效连续子标签精确局部细化。这样做使我们能够提高时间和内存效率，同时实际上将精度保持在与连续凸松弛方法相同的水平，此外，还提供离散方法级别的理论最优性保证。最后，我们展示了所提出的方法对一般成对平滑项的灵活性，因此它适用于广泛的正则化。对图像去噪问题的示例进行的实验证明了所提出方法的特性。重现实验的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/nurlanov-zh/sublabel-accurate-alpha-expansion} 获取。 本文提出一种高效且灵活的子标签精确能量最小化方法，结合连续和离散模型的优势，解决机器学习和计算机视觉中的能量函数优化问题。 Zhakshylyk Nurlanov,Daniel Cremers,Florian Bernard cs.CV,math.OC

authors_text: Yunhao Ge,Jiashu Xu,Brian Nlong Zhao,Neel Joshi,Laurent Itti,Vibhav Vineet
title: DALL-E for Detection: Language-driven Compositional Image Synthesis for Object Detection
title_zh: 用于检测的 DALL-E：用于对象检测的语言驱动的组合图像合成
comment: v3(same as v2) version, update structure (add foreground generation, stable diffusion), add more experiments
comments: v3(same as v2) version, update structure (add foreground generation, stable diffusion), add more experiments
abstract: We propose a new paradigm to automatically generate training data with accurate labels at scale using the text-toimage synthesis frameworks (e.g., DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, etc.). The proposed approach decouples training data generation into foreground object mask generation and background (context) image generation. For foreground object mask generation, we use a simple textual template with object class name as input to DALL-E to generate a diverse set of foreground images. A foreground-background segmentation algorithm is then used to generate foreground object masks. Next, in order to generate context images, first a language description of the context is generated by applying an image captioning method on a small set of images representing the context. These language descriptions are then used to generate diverse sets of context images using the DALL-E framework. These are then composited with object masks generated in the first step to provide an augmented training set for a classifier. We demonstrate the advantages of our approach on four object detection datasets including on Pascal VOC and COCO object detection tasks. Furthermore, we also highlight the compositional nature of our data generation approach on out-of-distribution and zero-shot data generation scenarios.
summary: We propose a new paradigm to automatically generate training data with accurate labels at scale using the text-toimage synthesis frameworks (e.g., DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, etc.). The proposed approach decouples training data generation into foreground object mask generation and background (context) image generation. For foreground object mask generation, we use a simple textual template with object class name as input to DALL-E to generate a diverse set of foreground images. A foreground-background segmentation algorithm is then used to generate foreground object masks. Next, in order to generate context images, first a language description of the context is generated by applying an image captioning method on a small set of images representing the context. These language descriptions are then used to generate diverse sets of context images using the DALL-E framework. These are then composited with object masks generated in the first step to provide an augmented training set for a classifier. We demonstrate the advantages of our approach on four object detection datasets including on Pascal VOC and COCO object detection tasks. Furthermore, we also highlight the compositional nature of our data generation approach on out-of-distribution and zero-shot data generation scenarios.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的范例，使用文本到图像合成框架（例如 DALL-E、稳定扩散等）自动大规模生成具有准确标签的训练数据。所提出的方法将训练数据生成解耦为前景对象掩模生成和背景（上下文）图像生成。对于前景对象掩码生成，我们使用一个简单的文本模板，其中对象类名称作为 DALL-E 的输入来生成一组不同的前景图像。然后使用前景-背景分割算法来生成前景对象掩模。接下来，为了生成上下文图像，首先通过对表示上下文的一小组图像应用图像字幕方法来生成上下文的语言描述。然后，使用 DALL-E 框架使用这些语言描述来生成不同的上下文图像集。然后将它们与第一步中生成的对象掩码组合起来，为分类器提供增强的训练集。我们在四个对象检测数据集（包括 Pascal VOC 和 COCO 对象检测任务）上展示了我们的方法的优势。此外，我们还强调了我们的数据生成方法在分布外和零样本数据生成场景中的组合性质。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用DALL-E等文本到图像合成框架自动生成带准确标签的训练数据的新范式，用于目标检测任务。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测任务依赖于大量人工标注的数据，而获取和标注这些数据既耗时又昂贵。因此，本文旨在探索一种自动化生成高质量训练数据的方法，以提高目标检测模型的性能。
AI.method: 该方法将训练数据生成过程分为两个步骤：前景对象掩码生成和背景（上下文）图像生成。首先，使用DALL-E根据对象类别名称生成多样化的前景图像，并通过分割算法提取前景对象掩码。然后，通过图像描述生成方法为背景生成语言描述，并利用DALL-E生成多样化的背景图像，最后将前景掩码和背景图像合成以形成增强的训练集。
AI.result: 作者在Pascal VOC和COCO等四个目标检测数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，并展示了其在分布外和零样本数据生成场景中的组合性优势。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法为自动化的训练数据生成提供了一种新范式，能够有效提升目标检测模型的性能，特别是在缺乏标注数据的情况下表现尤为突出。

authors_text: Zhiuxan Liang,Jiannong Cao,Shan Jiang,Divya Saxena,Jinlin Chen,Huafeng Xu
title: From Multi-agent to Multi-robot: A Scalable Training and Evaluation Platform for Multi-robot Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 从多智能体到多机器人：可扩展的多机器人强化学习训练和评估平台
comment: 13 pages
comments: 13 pages
abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has been gaining extensive attention from academia and industries in the past few decades. One of the fundamental problems in MARL is how to evaluate different approaches comprehensively. Most existing MARL methods are evaluated in either video games or simplistic simulated scenarios. It remains unknown how these methods perform in real-world scenarios, especially multi-robot systems. This paper introduces a scalable emulation platform for multi-robot reinforcement learning (MRRL) called SMART to meet this need. Precisely, SMART consists of two components: 1) a simulation environment that provides a variety of complex interaction scenarios for training and 2) a real-world multi-robot system for realistic performance evaluation. Besides, SMART offers agent-environment APIs that are plug-and-play for algorithm implementation. To illustrate the practicality of our platform, we conduct a case study on the cooperative driving lane change scenario. Building off the case study, we summarize several unique challenges of MRRL, which are rarely considered previously. Finally, we open-source the simulation environments, associated benchmark tasks, and state-of-the-art baselines to encourage and empower MRRL research.

Building off the case study, we summarize several unique challenges of MRRL, which are rarely considered previously. Finally, we open-source the simulation environments, associated benchmark tasks, and state-of-the-art baselines to encourage and empower MRRL research.
abstract_zh: 多智能体强化学习（MARL）在过去的几十年里得到了学术界和工业界的广泛关注。 MARL 的基本问题之一是如何综合评估不同的方法。大多数现有的 MARL 方法都是在视频游戏或简单的模拟场景中进行评估。目前尚不清楚这些方法在现实场景中的表现如何，尤其是多机器人系统。本文介绍了一种名为 SMART 的可扩展多机器人强化学习 (MRRL) 仿真平台来满足这一需求。准确地说，SMART由两个组成部分组成：1）为训练提供各种复杂交互场景的模拟环境；2）用于现实性能评估的真实多机器人系统。此外，SMART 还提供了即插即用的代理环境 API，用于算法实现。为了说明我们平台的实用性，我们对协同驾驶变道场景进行了案例研究。在案例研究的基础上，我们总结了 MRRL 的几个独特挑战，这些挑战以前很少考虑到。最后，我们开源模拟环境、相关基准测试任务和最先进的基线，以鼓励和授权 MRRL 研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个可扩展的多机器人强化学习训练与评估平台SMART，包含仿真环境和真实机器人系统。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL方法多在游戏或简单仿真中评估，缺乏对真实多机器人系统性能的验证，需构建综合评估平台。
AI.method: 设计SMART平台包含复杂交互场景的仿真环境、真实多机器人系统及即插即用的API接口，并通过协作变道场景案例验证。
AI.result: 揭示多机器人强化学习的独特挑战，开源仿真环境、基准任务及先进基线方法，推动MRRL研究。
AI.conclusion: SMART为多机器人强化学习提供可扩展解决方案，通过开源资源促进该领域研究发展。

search_text: From Multi-agent to Multi-robot: A Scalable Training and Evaluation Platform for Multi-robot Reinforcement Learning 从多智能体到多机器人：可扩展的多机器人强化学习训练和评估平台 Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has been gaining extensive attention from academia and industries in the past few decades. One of the fundamental problems in MARL is how to evaluate different approaches comprehensively. Most existing MARL methods are evaluated in either video games or simplistic simulated scenarios. It remains unknown how these methods perform in real-world scenarios, especially multi-robot systems. This paper introduces a scalable emulation platform for multi-robot reinforcement learning (MRRL) called SMART to meet this need. Precisely, SMART consists of two components: 1) a simulation environment that provides a variety of complex interaction scenarios for training and 2) a real-world multi-robot system for realistic performance evaluation. Besides, SMART offers agent-environment APIs that are plug-and-play for algorithm implementation. To illustrate the practicality of our platform, we conduct a case study on the cooperative driving lane change scenario. Building off the case study, we summarize several unique challenges of MRRL, which are rarely considered previously. Finally, we open-source the simulation environments, associated benchmark tasks, and state-of-the-art baselines to encourage and empower MRRL research. 多智能体强化学习（MARL）在过去的几十年里得到了学术界和工业界的广泛关注。 MARL 的基本问题之一是如何综合评估不同的方法。大多数现有的 MARL 方法都是在视频游戏或简单的模拟场景中进行评估。目前尚不清楚这些方法在现实场景中的表现如何，尤其是多机器人系统。本文介绍了一种名为 SMART 的可扩展多机器人强化学习 (MRRL) 仿真平台来满足这一需求。准确地说，SMART由两个组成部分组成：1）为训练提供各种复杂交互场景的模拟环境；2）用于现实性能评估的真实多机器人系统。此外，SMART 还提供了即插即用的代理环境 API，用于算法实现。为了说明我们平台的实用性，我们对协同驾驶变道场景进行了案例研究。在案例研究的基础上，我们总结了 MRRL 的几个独特挑战，这些挑战以前很少考虑到。最后，我们开源模拟环境、相关基准测试任务和最先进的基线，以鼓励和授权 MRRL 研究。 本文提出一个可扩展的多机器人强化学习训练与评估平台SMART，包含仿真环境和真实机器人系统。 Zhiuxan Liang,Jiannong Cao,Shan Jiang,Divya Saxena,Jinlin Chen,Huafeng Xu cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Wangwang Yang,Jinming Su,Yiting Duan,Tingyi Guo,Junfeng Luo
title: 5th Place Solution for YouTube-VOS Challenge 2022: Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 2022 年 YouTube-VOS 挑战赛第五名解决方案：视频对象分割
comment: 5th Place Solution for Video Object Segmentation in the 4th Large-scale Video Object Segmentation Challenge, CVPR 2022 Workshop
comments: 5th Place Solution for Video Object Segmentation in the 4th Large-scale Video Object Segmentation Challenge, CVPR 2022 Workshop
abstract: Video object segmentation (VOS) has made significant progress with the rise of deep learning. However, there still exist some thorny problems, for example, similar objects are easily confused and tiny objects are difficult to be found. To solve these problems and further improve the performance of VOS, we propose a simple yet effective solution for this task. In the solution, we first analyze the distribution of the Youtube-VOS dataset and supplement the dataset by introducing public static and video segmentation datasets. Then, we improve three network architectures with different characteristics and train several networks to learn the different characteristics of objects in videos. After that, we use a simple way to integrate all results to ensure that different models complement each other. Finally, subtle post-processing is carried out to ensure accurate video object segmentation with precise boundaries. Extensive experiments on Youtube-VOS dataset show that the proposed solution achieves the state-of-the-art performance with an 86.1% overall score on the YouTube-VOS 2022 test set, which is 5th place on the video object segmentation track of the Youtube-VOS Challenge 2022.
summary: Video object segmentation (VOS) has made significant progress with the rise of deep learning. However, there still exist some thorny problems, for example, similar objects are easily confused and tiny objects are difficult to be found. To solve these problems and further improve the performance of VOS, we propose a simple yet effective solution for this task. In the solution, we first analyze the distribution of the Youtube-VOS dataset and supplement the dataset by introducing public static and video segmentation datasets. Then, we improve three network architectures with different characteristics and train several networks to learn the different characteristics of objects in videos. After that, we use a simple way to integrate all results to ensure that different models complement each other. Finally, subtle post-processing is carried out to ensure accurate video object segmentation with precise boundaries. Extensive experiments on Youtube-VOS dataset show that the proposed solution achieves the state-of-the-art performance with an 86.1% overall score on the YouTube-VOS 2022 test set, which is 5th place on the video object segmentation track of the Youtube-VOS Challenge 2022.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的兴起，视频对象分割（VOS）取得了重大进展。然而，仍然存在一些棘手的问题，例如相似的物体很容易混淆，微小的物体很难被发现。为了解决这些问题并进一步提高 VOS 的性能，我们为此任务提出了一个简单而有效的解决方案。在解决方案中，我们首先分析Youtube-VOS数据集的分布，并通过引入公共静态和视频分割数据集来补充数据集。然后，我们改进了三种具有不同特征的网络架构，并训练了多个网络来学习视频中对象的不同特征。之后，我们使用一种简单的方法来整合所有结果，以确保不同模型相互补充。最后，进行精细的后处理，以确保精确的视频对象分割和精确的边界。在 Youtube-VOS 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，所提出的解决方案在 YouTube-VOS 2022 测试集上达到了最先进的性能，总得分为 86.1%，在 Youtube-VOS Challenge 2022 的视频对象分割赛道上排名第五。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对YouTube-VOS挑战赛的视频目标分割解决方案，旨在解决相似物体混淆和微小物体检测困难等问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习推动了视频目标分割(VOS)的发展，但相似物体易混淆、微小物体难检测等问题仍存在，需进一步提升性能。
AI.method: 通过分析YouTube-VOS数据集分布并引入公共静态和视频分割数据集扩充数据；改进三种不同特性的网络架构进行训练；采用简单方式融合多模型结果，并进行精细后处理以确保精确边界。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VOS 2022测试集上达到86.1%的总体得分，位列YouTube-VOS挑战赛视频目标分割赛道第五名。
AI.conclusion: 该方案通过数据增强、多模型协作与后处理有效提升了视频目标分割性能，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Zixuan Wang,Bin Sun
title: Explicit and implicit models in infrared and visible image fusion
title_zh: 红外和可见光图像融合中的显式和隐式模型
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Infrared and visible images, as multi-modal image pairs, show significant differences in the expression of the same scene. The image fusion task is faced with two problems: one is to maintain the unique features between different modalities, and the other is to maintain features at various levels like local and global features. This paper discusses the limitations of deep learning models in image fusion and the corresponding optimization strategies. Based on artificially designed structures and constraints, we divide models into explicit models, and implicit models that adaptively learn high-level features or can establish global pixel associations. Ten models for comparison experiments on 21 test sets were screened. The qualitative and quantitative results show that the implicit models have more comprehensive ability to learn image features. At the same time, the stability of them needs to be improved. Aiming at the advantages and limitations to be solved by existing algorithms, we discuss the main problems of multi-modal image fusion and future research directions.
summary: Infrared and visible images, as multi-modal image pairs, show significant differences in the expression of the same scene. The image fusion task is faced with two problems: one is to maintain the unique features between different modalities, and the other is to maintain features at various levels like local and global features. This paper discusses the limitations of deep learning models in image fusion and the corresponding optimization strategies. Based on artificially designed structures and constraints, we divide models into explicit models, and implicit models that adaptively learn high-level features or can establish global pixel associations. Ten models for comparison experiments on 21 test sets were screened. The qualitative and quantitative results show that the implicit models have more comprehensive ability to learn image features. At the same time, the stability of them needs to be improved. Aiming at the advantages and limitations to be solved by existing algorithms, we discuss the main problems of multi-modal image fusion and future research directions.
abstract_zh: 红外和可见光图像作为多模态图像对，对同一场景的表达表现出显着差异。图像融合任务面临两个问题：一是保持不同模态之间的独特特征，二是保持各个级别的特征，如局部特征和全局特征。本文讨论了深度学习模型在图像融合方面的局限性以及相应的优化策略。基于人工设计的结构和约束，我们将模型分为显式模型和隐式模型，隐式模型自适应学习高级特征或可以建立全局像素关联。筛选出10个模型在21个测试集上进行对比实验。定性和定量结果表明，隐式模型具有更全面的学习图像特征的能力。同时，其稳定性也有待提高。针对现有算法的优点和需要解决的局限性，讨论了多模态图像融合的主要问题和未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了红外与可见光图像融合中显式模型和隐式模型的优缺点，并通过实验比较了其性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在多模态图像融合任务中难以同时保留不同模态的独特特征及局部和全局特征，需优化模型设计。
AI.method: 基于人工设计结构与约束，将模型划分为显式模型和隐式模型，并在21个测试集上筛选10种模型进行对比实验。
AI.result: 隐式模型在图像特征学习能力上表现更全面，但稳定性需进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 隐式模型具有优势但存在稳定性问题，未来研究需针对多模态融合的挑战提出改进方案。

tldr: 本文探讨了红外与可见光图像融合中显式模型和隐式模型的优缺点，并通过实验比较了其性能。
motivation: 现有深度学习模型在多模态图像融合任务中难以同时保留不同模态的独特特征及局部和全局特征，需优化模型设计。
method: 基于人工设计结构与约束，将模型划分为显式模型和隐式模型，并在21个测试集上筛选10种模型进行对比实验。
result: 隐式模型在图像特征学习能力上表现更全面，但稳定性需进一步提升。
conclusion: 隐式模型具有优势但存在稳定性问题，未来研究需针对多模态融合的挑战提出改进方案。
search_text: Explicit and implicit models in infrared and visible image fusion 红外和可见光图像融合中的显式和隐式模型 Infrared and visible images, as multi-modal image pairs, show significant differences in the expression of the same scene. The image fusion task is faced with two problems: one is to maintain the unique features between different modalities, and the other is to maintain features at various levels like local and global features. This paper discusses the limitations of deep learning models in image fusion and the corresponding optimization strategies. Based on artificially designed structures and constraints, we divide models into explicit models, and implicit models that adaptively learn high-level features or can establish global pixel associations. Ten models for comparison experiments on 21 test sets were screened. The qualitative and quantitative results show that the implicit models have more comprehensive ability to learn image features. At the same time, the stability of them needs to be improved. Aiming at the advantages and limitations to be solved by existing algorithms, we discuss the main problems of multi-modal image fusion and future research directions. 红外和可见光图像作为多模态图像对，对同一场景的表达表现出显着差异。图像融合任务面临两个问题：一是保持不同模态之间的独特特征，二是保持各个级别的特征，如局部特征和全局特征。本文讨论了深度学习模型在图像融合方面的局限性以及相应的优化策略。基于人工设计的结构和约束，我们将模型分为显式模型和隐式模型，隐式模型自适应学习高级特征或可以建立全局像素关联。筛选出10个模型在21个测试集上进行对比实验。定性和定量结果表明，隐式模型具有更全面的学习图像特征的能力。同时，其稳定性也有待提高。针对现有算法的优点和需要解决的局限性，讨论了多模态图像融合的主要问题和未来的研究方向。 本文探讨了红外与可见光图像融合中显式模型和隐式模型的优缺点，并通过实验比较了其性能。 Zixuan Wang,Bin Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Xin Ma,Renyi Bao,Jinpeng Jiang,Yang Liu,Arthur Jiang,Jun Yan,Xin Liu,Zhisong Pan
title: FedSSO: A Federated Server-Side Second-Order Optimization Algorithm
title_zh: FedSSO：联合服务器端二阶优化算法
abstract: In this work, we propose FedSSO, a server-side second-order optimization method for federated learning (FL). In contrast to previous works in this direction, we employ a server-side approximation for the Quasi-Newton method without requiring any training data from the clients. In this way, we not only shift the computation burden from clients to server, but also eliminate the additional communication for second-order updates between clients and server entirely. We provide theoretical guarantee for convergence of our novel method, and empirically demonstrate our fast convergence and communication savings in both convex and non-convex settings.
summary: In this work, we propose FedSSO, a server-side second-order optimization method for federated learning (FL). In contrast to previous works in this direction, we employ a server-side approximation for the Quasi-Newton method without requiring any training data from the clients. In this way, we not only shift the computation burden from clients to server, but also eliminate the additional communication for second-order updates between clients and server entirely. We provide theoretical guarantee for convergence of our novel method, and empirically demonstrate our fast convergence and communication savings in both convex and non-convex settings.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 FedSSO，一种用于联邦学习（FL）的服务器端二阶优化方法。与此方向上的先前工作相比，我们对拟牛顿方法采用服务器端近似，而不需要来自客户端的任何训练数据。通过这种方式，我们不仅将计算负担从客户端转移到服务器，而且完全消除了客户端和服务器之间二阶更新的额外通信。我们为我们的新方法的收敛提供了理论保证，并凭经验证明了我们在凸和非凸设置中的快速收敛和通信节省。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedSSO，一种无需客户端数据的联邦学习服务器端二阶优化算法，旨在降低计算和通信开销。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习二阶优化方法依赖客户端计算和通信，导致高开销与隐私风险，需设计无需客户端参与的替代方案。
AI.method: 基于服务器端拟牛顿法近似，通过聚合客户端梯度信息构建二阶更新，完全消除客户端与服务器间的额外通信。
AI.result: 理论证明收敛性，实验显示在凸/非凸任务中均实现更快收敛速度与显著通信节省。
AI.conclusion: FedSSO通过服务器端二阶优化有效平衡了联邦学习的效率与通信成本，为资源受限场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Yoshihide Sawada,Keigo Nakamura
title: C-SENN: Contrastive Self-Explaining Neural Network
title_zh: C-SENN：对比自解释神经网络
comment: 10 pages
comments: 10 pages
abstract: In this study, we use a self-explaining neural network (SENN), which learns unsupervised concepts, to acquire concepts that are easy for people to understand automatically. In concept learning, the hidden layer retains verbalizable features relevant to the output, which is crucial when adapting to real-world environments where explanations are required. However, it is known that the interpretability of concepts output by SENN is reduced in general settings, such as autonomous driving scenarios. Thus, this study combines contrastive learning with concept learning to improve the readability of concepts and the accuracy of tasks. We call this model Contrastive Self-Explaining Neural Network (C-SENN).
summary: In this study, we use a self-explaining neural network (SENN), which learns unsupervised concepts, to acquire concepts that are easy for people to understand automatically. In concept learning, the hidden layer retains verbalizable features relevant to the output, which is crucial when adapting to real-world environments where explanations are required. However, it is known that the interpretability of concepts output by SENN is reduced in general settings, such as autonomous driving scenarios. Thus, this study combines contrastive learning with concept learning to improve the readability of concepts and the accuracy of tasks. We call this model Contrastive Self-Explaining Neural Network (C-SENN).
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们使用自解释神经网络（SENN）来学习无监督概念，以自动获取人们容易理解的概念。在概念学习中，隐藏层保留与输出相关的可语言特征，这在适应需要解释的现实环境时至关重要。然而，众所周知，SENN 输出的概念的可解释性在一般设置中会降低，例如自动驾驶场景。因此，本研究将对比学习与概念学习相结合，以提高概念的可读性和任务的准确性。我们将此模型称为对比自解释神经网络（C-SENN）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出C-SENN模型，通过结合对比学习与概念学习，提升自解释神经网络在现实场景中的可解释性与任务准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统SENN在自动驾驶等实际场景中概念可解释性下降，需在保持任务性能的同时增强模型的可读性。
AI.method: 将对比学习引入SENN框架，通过对比学习优化概念表示，使隐藏层保留更易被人类理解的可解释特征。
AI.result: C-SENN在概念可读性与任务准确率上均优于传统SENN，验证了对比学习对解释性与性能的双重提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习与SENN的结合有效平衡了模型的可解释性与任务性能，为需要可解释性的现实应用场景提供了新方法。

authors_text: Ko-Wei Tai,HuaYen Lee,Hsin-Huei Chen,Jeng-Sheng Yeh,Ming Ouhyoung
title: Guardian Angel: A Novel Walking Aid for the Visually Impaired
title_zh: 守护天使：视障人士的新型助行器
comment: 2 pages, 1 figure
comments: 2 pages, 1 figure
abstract: This work introduces Guardian Angel, an Android App that assists visually impaired people to avoid danger in complex traffic environment. The system, consisting of object detection by pretrained YOLO model, distance estimation and moving direction estimation, provides information about surrounding vehicles and alarms users of potential danger without expensive special purpose device. With an experiment of 8 subjects, we corroborate that in terms of satisfaction score in pedestrian-crossing experiment with the assistance of our App using a smartphone is better than when without under 99% confidence level. The time needed to cross a road is shorter on average with the assistance of our system, however, not reaching significant difference by our experiment. The App has been released in Google Play Store, open to the public for free.
summary: This work introduces Guardian Angel, an Android App that assists visually impaired people to avoid danger in complex traffic environment. The system, consisting of object detection by pretrained YOLO model, distance estimation and moving direction estimation, provides information about surrounding vehicles and alarms users of potential danger without expensive special purpose device. With an experiment of 8 subjects, we corroborate that in terms of satisfaction score in pedestrian-crossing experiment with the assistance of our App using a smartphone is better than when without under 99% confidence level. The time needed to cross a road is shorter on average with the assistance of our system, however, not reaching significant difference by our experiment. The App has been released in Google Play Store, open to the public for free.
abstract_zh: 本作品介绍了守护天使，一款帮助视障人士在复杂交通环境中避免危险的Android应用程序。该系统由预训练的YOLO模型进行目标检测、距离估计和移动方向估计组成，无需昂贵的专用设备即可提供周围车辆的信息并向用户发出潜在危险的警报。通过对 8 名受试者进行的实验，我们证实，在使用智能手机的应用程序的帮助下进行的人行横道实验的满意度得分优于没有低于 99% 置信水平的情况。在我们的系统的帮助下，过马路所需的平均时间较短，但我们的实验并未达到显着差异。该应用程序已在Google Play商店发布，免费向公众开放。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于智能手机的辅助应用，帮助视障人士在复杂交通环境中避开危险
AI.motivation: 视障人士在复杂交通环境中面临安全风险，现有辅助设备成本高，需开发经济实惠的解决方案
AI.method: 使用预训练YOLO模型进行物体检测，结合距离和移动方向估计，通过智能手机提供周围车辆信息及危险警报
AI.result: 实验表明，使用该应用的满意度评分显著提高（99%置信水平），过马路时间缩短但未达统计学显著性
AI.conclusion: 该应用有效提升用户满意度，虽时间缩短未达显著，但作为免费工具已发布，具备实际应用价值

result: 实验表明，使用该应用的满意度评分显著提高（99%置信水平），过马路时间缩短但未达统计学显著性
conclusion: 该应用有效提升用户满意度，虽时间缩短未达显著，但作为免费工具已发布，具备实际应用价值
search_text: Guardian Angel: A Novel Walking Aid for the Visually Impaired 守护天使：视障人士的新型助行器 This work introduces Guardian Angel, an Android App that assists visually impaired people to avoid danger in complex traffic environment. The system, consisting of object detection by pretrained YOLO model, distance estimation and moving direction estimation, provides information about surrounding vehicles and alarms users of potential danger without expensive special purpose device. With an experiment of 8 subjects, we corroborate that in terms of satisfaction score in pedestrian-crossing experiment with the assistance of our App using a smartphone is better than when without under 99% confidence level. The time needed to cross a road is shorter on average with the assistance of our system, however, not reaching significant difference by our experiment. The App has been released in Google Play Store, open to the public for free. 本作品介绍了守护天使，一款帮助视障人士在复杂交通环境中避免危险的Android应用程序。该系统由预训练的YOLO模型进行目标检测、距离估计和移动方向估计组成，无需昂贵的专用设备即可提供周围车辆的信息并向用户发出潜在危险的警报。通过对 8 名受试者进行的实验，我们证实，在使用智能手机的应用程序的帮助下进行的人行横道实验的满意度得分优于没有低于 99% 置信水平的情况。在我们的系统的帮助下，过马路所需的平均时间较短，但我们的实验并未达到显着差异。该应用程序已在Google Play商店发布，免费向公众开放。 开发一种基于智能手机的辅助应用，帮助视障人士在复杂交通环境中避开危险 Ko-Wei Tai,HuaYen Lee,Hsin-Huei Chen,Jeng-Sheng Yeh,Ming Ouhyoung cs.HC,cs.CV

authors_text: Chenglizhao Chen,Hengsen Wang,Yuming Fang,Chong Peng
title: A Novel Long-term Iterative Mining Scheme for Video Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 一种用于视频显着目标检测的新型长期迭代挖掘方案
abstract: The existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) video salient object detection (VSOD) models have widely followed short-term methodology, which dynamically determines the balance between spatial and temporal saliency fusion by solely considering the current consecutive limited frames. However, the short-term methodology has one critical limitation, which conflicts with the real mechanism of our visual system -- a typical long-term methodology. As a result, failure cases keep showing up in the results of the current SOTA models, and the short-term methodology becomes the major technical bottleneck. To solve this problem, this paper proposes a novel VSOD approach, which performs VSOD in a complete long-term way. Our approach converts the sequential VSOD, a sequential task, to a data mining problem, i.e., decomposing the input video sequence to object proposals in advance and then mining salient object proposals as much as possible in an easy-to-hard way. Since all object proposals are simultaneously available, the proposed approach is a complete long-term approach, which can alleviate some difficulties rooted in conventional short-term approaches. In addition, we devised an online updating scheme that can grasp the most representative and trustworthy pattern profile of the salient objects, outputting framewise saliency maps with rich details and smoothing both spatially and temporally. The proposed approach outperforms almost all SOTA models on five widely used benchmark datasets.
summary: The existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) video salient object detection (VSOD) models have widely followed short-term methodology, which dynamically determines the balance between spatial and temporal saliency fusion by solely considering the current consecutive limited frames. However, the short-term methodology has one critical limitation, which conflicts with the real mechanism of our visual system -- a typical long-term methodology. As a result, failure cases keep showing up in the results of the current SOTA models, and the short-term methodology becomes the major technical bottleneck. To solve this problem, this paper proposes a novel VSOD approach, which performs VSOD in a complete long-term way. Our approach converts the sequential VSOD, a sequential task, to a data mining problem, i.e., decomposing the input video sequence to object proposals in advance and then mining salient object proposals as much as possible in an easy-to-hard way. Since all object proposals are simultaneously available, the proposed approach is a complete long-term approach, which can alleviate some difficulties rooted in conventional short-term approaches. In addition, we devised an online updating scheme that can grasp the most representative and trustworthy pattern profile of the salient objects, outputting framewise saliency maps with rich details and smoothing both spatially and temporally. The proposed approach outperforms almost all SOTA models on five widely used benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 现有最先进的（SOTA）视频显着性对象检测（VSOD）模型广泛遵循短期方法，该方法仅通过考虑当前连续的有限帧来动态确定空间和时间显着性融合之间的平衡。然而，短期方法有一个关键的局限性，它与我们视觉系统的真实机制——典型的长期方法相冲突。因此，当前SOTA模型的结果中不断出现失败案例，短期方法论成为主要技术瓶颈。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种新颖的 VSOD 方法，以完整的长期方式执行 VSOD。我们的方法将顺序 VSOD（顺序任务）转换为数据挖掘问题，即将输入视频序列提前分解为对象建议，然后以由易到难的方式尽可能多地挖掘显着对象建议。由于所有目标提案同时可用，因此所提出的方法是一种完整的长期方法，可以缓解传统短期方法中存在的一些困难。此外，我们设计了一种在线更新方案，可以掌握显着对象最具代表性和最可信的模式轮廓，输出具有丰富细节的逐帧显着图，并在空间和时间上进行平滑。在五个广泛使用的基准数据集上，所提出的方法优于几乎所有 SOTA 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全新的长时迭代挖掘方案，用于视频显著性目标检测（VSOD），通过将顺序任务转化为数据挖掘问题，提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有VSOD模型多采用短时方法，仅依赖连续有限帧动态平衡时空显著性融合，与人类视觉系统的长时机制冲突，导致检测失败案例频发。
AI.method: 将视频序列分解为对象提案，通过易到难的挖掘策略提取显著性提案，并设计在线更新方案，同步优化空间与时间维度的显著性图。
AI.result: 在五个主流基准数据集上，该方法优于几乎所有现有最先进模型，显著提升检测精度与细节表现。
AI.conclusion: 长时迭代挖掘方案有效解决了短时方法的技术瓶颈，为VSOD领域提供了新思路与更优解决方案。

authors_text: Yixin Chen,Tonmoy Dey,Alan Kuhnle
title: Scalable Distributed Algorithms for Size-Constrained Submodular Maximization in the MapReduce and Adaptive Complexity Models
title_zh: MapReduce 和自适应复杂性模型中尺寸受限子模最大化的可扩展分布式算法
comment: ef:Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research 80 (2024): 1575-1622
comments: ef:Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research 80 (2024): 1575-1622
abstract: Distributed maximization of a submodular function in the MapReduce (MR) model has received much attention, culminating in two frameworks that allow a centralized algorithm to be run in the MR setting without loss of approximation, as long as the centralized algorithm satisfies a certain consistency property -- which had previously only been known to be satisfied by the standard greedy and continous greedy algorithms. A separate line of work has studied parallelizability of submodular maximization in the adaptive complexity model, where each thread may have access to the entire ground set. For the size-constrained maximization of a monotone and submodular function, we show that several sublinearly adaptive (highly parallelizable) algorithms satisfy the consistency property required to work in the MR setting, which yields practical, parallelizable and distributed algorithms. Separately, we develop the first distributed algorithm with linear query complexity for this problem. Finally, we provide a method to increase the maximum cardinality constraint for MR algorithms at the cost of additional MR rounds.
summary: Distributed maximization of a submodular function in the MapReduce (MR) model has received much attention, culminating in two frameworks that allow a centralized algorithm to be run in the MR setting without loss of approximation, as long as the centralized algorithm satisfies a certain consistency property -- which had previously only been known to be satisfied by the standard greedy and continous greedy algorithms. A separate line of work has studied parallelizability of submodular maximization in the adaptive complexity model, where each thread may have access to the entire ground set. For the size-constrained maximization of a monotone and submodular function, we show that several sublinearly adaptive (highly parallelizable) algorithms satisfy the consistency property required to work in the MR setting, which yields practical, parallelizable and distributed algorithms. Separately, we develop the first distributed algorithm with linear query complexity for this problem. Finally, we provide a method to increase the maximum cardinality constraint for MR algorithms at the cost of additional MR rounds.
abstract_zh: MapReduce (MR) 模型中子模函数的分布式最大化受到了广泛关注，最终出现了两个框架，这些框架允许集中式算法在 MR 设置中运行而不会损失近似值，只要集中式算法满足一定的一致性属性——以前只知道标准贪婪和连续贪婪算法可以满足该一致性属性。一项单独的工作研究了自适应复杂性模型中子模最大化的并行性，其中每个线程可以访问整个地面集。对于单调和子模函数的大小约束最大化，我们证明了几种次线性自适应（高度可并行化）算法满足在 MR 设置中工作所需的一致性属性，从而产生实用的、可并行的和分布式算法。另外，我们针对这个问题开发了第一个具有线性查询复杂度的分布式算法。最后，我们提供了一种以额外 MR 轮为代价增加 MR 算法最大基数约束的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在MapReduce和自适应复杂度模型中对规模受限的子模函数进行可扩展分布式最大化的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的子模函数最大化算法在分布式环境中存在适应性差和查询复杂度高的问题，因此需要开发适用于MapReduce模型和具有高并行性的算法。
AI.method: 本文通过验证多个次线性自适应算法满足一致性属性，使其适用于MapReduce模型，并开发了首个具有线性查询复杂度的分布式算法。
AI.result: 实现了可扩展、并行且分布式的子模函数最大化算法，并提出了增加最大基数约束的方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文为规模受限的子模函数最大化问题提供了实用的分布式解决方案，并在查询复杂度和并行性方面取得了进展。
